ast.name: description
ast.source: Lines are packed toward the center of the flex container.
ast.target: 行向弹性容器的中心方向堆叠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lines are packed toward the end of the flex container.
ast.target: 行向弹性容器的末端方向堆叠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lines are packed toward the start of the flex container.
ast.target: 行向弹性容器的起始方向堆叠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lines are evenly distributed in the flex container, with half-size spaces on either end.
ast.target: 行在弹性容器中均匀分布，两端各有半尺寸的间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lines are evenly distributed in the flex container.
ast.target: 行在弹性容器中均匀分布。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lines stretch to take up the remaining space.
ast.target: 行拉伸以占据剩余空间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns a flex container's lines within the flex container when there is extra space in the cross-axis, similar to how 'justify-content' aligns individual items within the main-axis.
ast.target: 当交叉轴方向存在额外空间时，对齐弹性容器内的行，类似于 'justify-content' 在主轴方向上对齐单个项目的方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the flex item's inline axis is the same as the cross axis, this value is identical to 'flex-start'. Otherwise, it participates in baseline alignment.
ast.target: 如果弹性项目的内联轴与交叉轴相同，则此值等同于 'flex-start'。否则，它将参与基线对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flex item's margin box is centered in the cross axis within the line.
ast.target: 弹性项目的外边距框在行内交叉轴方向上居中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cross-end margin edge of the flex item is placed flush with the cross-end edge of the line.
ast.target: 弹性项目的交叉末端外边距边缘与行的交叉末端边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cross-start margin edge of the flex item is placed flush with the cross-start edge of the line.
ast.target: 弹性项目的交叉起始外边距边缘与行的交叉起始边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the cross size property of the flex item computes to auto, and neither of the cross-axis margins are auto, the flex item is stretched.
ast.target: 如果弹性项目的交叉尺寸属性计算值为 auto，且交叉轴方向的外边距均不为 auto，则该项目将被拉伸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns flex items along the cross axis of the current line of the flex container.
ast.target: 沿弹性容器当前行的交叉轴对齐弹性项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: "Flex items are packed toward the end of the line."
ast.target: 弹性项目向行的末端方向堆叠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: "Flex items are packed toward the start of the line."
ast.target: 弹性项目向行的起始方向堆叠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The item is packed flush to the edge of the alignment container of the end side of the item, in the appropriate axis.
ast.target: 项目紧贴对齐容器的末端边缘，在相应的轴上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The item is packed flush to the edge of the alignment container of the start side of the item, in the appropriate axis..
ast.target: 项目紧贴对齐容器的起始边缘，在相应的轴上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The items are packed flush to each other toward the center of the of the alignment container.
ast.target: 项目彼此紧贴，并向对齐容器的中心方向堆叠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the default justify-self for all items of the box, giving them the default way of justifying each box along the appropriate axis
ast.target: 定义框内所有项目的默认 justify-self，为它们提供沿相应轴对齐每个框的默认方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the way of justifying a box inside its container along the appropriate axis.
ast.target: 定义框在其容器内沿相应轴进行对齐的方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Computes to the value of 'align-items' on the element's parent, or 'stretch' if the element has no parent. On absolutely positioned elements, it computes to itself.
ast.target: 计算为其父元素的 'align-items' 值，如果元素没有父元素则为 'stretch'。对于绝对定位元素，计算为其自身。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows the default alignment along the cross axis to be overridden for individual flex items.
ast.target: 允许为单个弹性项目覆盖沿交叉轴的默认对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand that resets all properties except 'direction' and 'unicode-bidi'.
ast.target: 简写属性，用于重置除 'direction' 和 'unicode-bidi' 之外的所有属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides alternative text for assistive technology to replace the generated content of a ::before or ::after element.
ast.target: 为辅助技术提供替代文本，以替换 ::before 或 ::after 元素生成的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The animation cycle iterations that are odd counts are played in the normal direction, and the animation cycle iterations that are even counts are played in a reverse direction.
ast.target: 动画周期迭代中奇数次播放方向为正向，偶数次播放方向为反向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The animation cycle iterations that are odd counts are played in the reverse direction, and the animation cycle iterations that are even counts are played in a normal direction.
ast.target: 动画周期迭代中奇数次播放方向为反向，偶数次播放方向为正向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The beginning property value (as defined in the first @keyframes at-rule) is applied before the animation is displayed, during the period defined by 'animation-delay'.
ast.target: 在动画显示之前，在 'animation-delay' 定义的期间内，应用起始属性值（如第一个 @keyframes 规则中所定义）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Both forwards and backwards fill modes are applied.
ast.target: 同时应用向前和向后填充模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The final property value (as defined in the last @keyframes at-rule) is maintained after the animation completes.
ast.target: 动画完成后，保持最终属性值（如最后一个 @keyframes 规则中所定义）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Causes the animation to repeat forever.
ast.target: 使动画无限重复播放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No animation is performed
ast.target: 不执行任何动画。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Normal playback.
ast.target: 正常播放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All iterations of the animation are played in the reverse direction from the way they were specified.
ast.target: 动画的所有迭代均以与指定方向相反的方向播放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property combines six of the animation properties into a single property.
ast.target: 简写属性，将六个动画属性合并为一个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines when the animation will start.
ast.target: 定义动画何时开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines whether or not the animation should play in reverse on alternate cycles.
ast.target: 定义动画是否应在交替周期中反向播放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the length of time that an animation takes to complete one cycle.
ast.target: 定义动画完成一个周期所需的时间长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: There is no change to the property value between the time the animation is applied and the time the animation begins playing or after the animation completes.
ast.target: 在动画应用到动画开始播放之间，以及动画完成之后，属性值没有变化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines what values are applied by the animation outside the time it is executing.
ast.target: 定义动画在未执行期间应用的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the number of times an animation cycle is played. The default value is one, meaning the animation will play from beginning to end once.
ast.target: 定义动画周期播放的次数。默认值为一，表示动画将从头到尾播放一次。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines a list of animations that apply. Each name is used to select the keyframe at-rule that provides the property values for the animation.
ast.target: 定义要应用的动画列表。每个名称用于选择提供动画属性值的 @keyframes 规则。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A running animation will be paused.
ast.target: 正在运行的动画将被暂停。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resume playback of a paused animation.
ast.target: 恢复已暂停动画的播放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines whether the animation is running or paused.
ast.target: 定义动画是正在运行还是已暂停。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes how the animation will progress over one cycle of its duration.
ast.target: 描述动画在其持续时间的一个周期内将如何进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Back side is hidden.
ast.target: 背面不可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Back side is visible.
ast.target: 背面可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether or not the 'back' side of a transformed element is visible when facing the viewer. With an identity transform, the front side of an element faces the viewer.
ast.target: 确定当变换后的元素面向查看者时，其 '背面' 是否可见。在恒等变换下，元素的正面面向查看者。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The background is fixed with regard to the viewport. In paged media where there is no viewport, a 'fixed' background is fixed with respect to the page box and therefore replicated on every page.
ast.target: 背景相对于视口固定。在没有视口的分页媒体中，'fixed' 背景相对于页面框固定，因此会在每一页上重复。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The background is fixed with regard to the element's contents: if the element has a scrolling mechanism, the background scrolls with the element's contents.
ast.target: 背景相对于元素的内容固定：如果元素具有滚动机制，背景将随元素的内容一起滚动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A value of 'none' counts as an image layer but draws nothing.
ast.target: 'none' 值算作一个图像层，但不绘制任何内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The background is fixed with regard to the element itself and does not scroll with its contents. (It is effectively attached to the element's border.)
ast.target: 背景相对于元素本身固定，不随其内容滚动。（它实际上附着在元素的边框上。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting most background properties at the same place in the style sheet.
ast.target: 简写属性，用于在样式表中同时设置大多数背景属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether the background images are fixed with regard to the viewport ('fixed') or scroll along with the element ('scroll') or its contents ('local').
ast.target: 指定背景图像是相对于视口固定（'fixed'），还是随元素滚动（'scroll'）或随其内容滚动（'local'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default attribute which specifies no blending
ast.target: 默认属性，指定不进行混合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The source color is multiplied by the destination color and replaces the destination.
ast.target: 源颜色与目标颜色相乘，并替换目标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multiplies the complements of the backdrop and source color values, then complements the result.
ast.target: 将背景色和源颜色值的补数相乘，然后对结果取补。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multiplies or screens the colors, depending on the backdrop color value.
ast.target: 根据背景色值，对颜色进行相乘或滤色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects the darker of the backdrop and source colors.
ast.target: 选择背景色和源颜色中较暗的一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects the lighter of the backdrop and source colors.
ast.target: 选择背景色和源颜色中较亮的一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Brightens the backdrop color to reflect the source color.
ast.target: 提亮背景色以反映源颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Darkens the backdrop color to reflect the source color.
ast.target: 加深背景色以反映源颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Multiplies or screens the colors, depending on the source color value.
ast.target: 根据源颜色值，对颜色进行相乘或滤色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Darkens or lightens the colors, depending on the source color value.
ast.target: 根据源颜色值，加深或提亮颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Subtracts the darker of the two constituent colors from the lighter color..
ast.target: 从较亮的颜色中减去两种组成颜色中较暗的一个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces an effect similar to that of the Difference mode but lower in contrast.
ast.target: 产生与差值模式类似但对比度较低的效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a color with the hue of the source color and the saturation and luminosity of the backdrop color.
ast.target: 创建一种颜色，其色相来自源颜色，饱和度和亮度来自背景色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a color with the saturation of the source color and the hue and luminosity of the backdrop color.
ast.target: 创建一种颜色，其饱和度来自源颜色，色相和亮度来自背景色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a color with the hue and saturation of the source color and the luminosity of the backdrop color.
ast.target: 创建一种颜色，其色相和饱和度来自源颜色，亮度来自背景色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates a color with the luminosity of the source color and the hue and saturation of the backdrop color.
ast.target: 创建一种颜色，其亮度来自源颜色，色相和饱和度来自背景色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the blending mode of each background layer.
ast.target: 定义每个背景层的混合模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the background painting area.
ast.target: 确定背景绘制区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the background color of an element.
ast.target: 设置元素的背景颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Counts as an image layer but draws nothing.
ast.target: 算作一个图像层，但不绘制任何内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the background image(s) of an element.
ast.target: 设置元素的背景图像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For elements rendered as a single box, specifies the background positioning area. For elements rendered as multiple boxes (e.g., inline boxes on several lines, boxes on several pages) specifies which boxes 'box-decoration-break' operates on to determine the background positioning area(s).
ast.target: 对于渲染为单个框的元素，指定背景定位区域。对于渲染为多个框的元素（例如，多行上的内联框、多页上的框），指定 'box-decoration-break' 操作的框以确定背景定位区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the initial position of the background image(s) (after any resizing) within their corresponding background positioning area.
ast.target: 指定背景图像（在任何调整大小后）在其相应的背景定位区域内的初始位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Equivalent to '50%' ('left 50%') for the horizontal position if the horizontal position is not otherwise specified, or '50%' ('top 50%') for the vertical position if it is.
ast.target: 如果未另外指定水平位置，则相当于 '50%'（'left 50%'）；如果已指定，则相当于 '50%'（'top 50%'）用于垂直位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Equivalent to '0%' for the horizontal position if one or two values are given, otherwise specifies the left edge as the origin for the next offset.
ast.target: 如果给出一个或两个值，则相当于水平位置的 '0%'；否则，指定左边缘作为下一个偏移量的原点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Equivalent to '100%' for the horizontal position if one or two values are given, otherwise specifies the right edge as the origin for the next offset.
ast.target: 如果给出一个或两个值，则相当于水平位置的 '100%'；否则，指定右边缘作为下一个偏移量的原点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If background images have been specified, this property specifies their initial position (after any resizing) within their corresponding background positioning area.
ast.target: 如果已指定背景图像，此属性指定它们（在任何调整大小后）在其相应的背景定位区域内的初始位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Equivalent to '100%' for the vertical position if one or two values are given, otherwise specifies the bottom edge as the origin for the next offset.
ast.target: 如果给出一个或两个值，则相当于垂直位置的 '100%'；否则，指定底边缘作为下一个偏移量的原点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Equivalent to '0%' for the vertical position if one or two values are given, otherwise specifies the top edge as the origin for the next offset.
ast.target: 如果给出一个或两个值，则相当于垂直位置的 '0%'；否则，指定顶边缘作为下一个偏移量的原点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how background images are tiled after they have been sized and positioned.
ast.target: 指定背景图像在调整大小和定位后如何平铺。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Resolved by using the image's intrinsic ratio and the size of the other dimension, or failing that, using the image's intrinsic size, or failing that, treating it as 100%.
ast.target: 通过使用图像的固有纵横比和另一维度的大小来解析，如果失败，则使用图像的固有大小，如果再失败，则将其视为 100%。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scale the image, while preserving its intrinsic aspect ratio (if any), to the largest size such that both its width and its height can fit inside the background positioning area.
ast.target: 缩放图像，同时保留其固有纵横比（如果有），使其宽度和高度都能适合背景定位区域的最大尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scale the image, while preserving its intrinsic aspect ratio (if any), to the smallest size such that both its width and its height can completely cover the background positioning area.
ast.target: 缩放图像，同时保留其固有纵横比（如果有），使其宽度和高度都能完全覆盖背景定位区域的最小尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the size of the background images.
ast.target: 指定背景图像的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: IE only. Used to extend behaviors of the browser.
ast.target: 仅限 IE。用于扩展浏览器的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Depends on the values of other properties.
ast.target: 取决于其他属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Size of an element in the direction opposite that of the direction specified by 'writing-mode'.
ast.target: 元素在 'writing-mode' 指定方向的相反方向上的尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting border width, style, and color.
ast.target: 简写属性，用于设置边框宽度、样式和颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-bottom'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'border-bottom'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-top'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'border-top'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-bottom-color'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'border-bottom-color'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-top-color'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'border-top-color'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-bottom-style'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'border-bottom-style'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-top-style'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'border-top-style'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-bottom-width'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'border-bottom-width'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-top-width'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑属性 'border-top-width'。其映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting border width, style and color.
ast.target: 用于设置边框宽度、样式和颜色的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the bottom border.
ast.target: 设置下边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the radii of the bottom left outer border edge.
ast.target: 定义左下外边框边缘的半径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the radii of the bottom right outer border edge.
ast.target: 定义右下外边框边缘的半径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the style of the bottom border.
ast.target: 设置下边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the thickness of the bottom border.
ast.target: 设置下边框的粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects the collapsing borders model.
ast.target: 选择合并边框模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects the separated borders border model.
ast.target: 选择分离边框模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a table's border model.
ast.target: 选择表格的边框模型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The color of the border around all four edges of an element.
ast.target: 元素四条边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If 'auto' is specified then the border image width is the intrinsic width or height (whichever is applicable) of the corresponding image slice. If the image does not have the required intrinsic dimension then the corresponding border-width is used instead.
ast.target: 如果指定 'auto'，则边框图像宽度为相应图像切片的固有宽度或高度（取适用者）。如果图像不具备所需的固有尺寸，则使用相应的 border-width。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Causes the middle part of the border-image to be preserved.
ast.target: 使边框图像的中间部分得以保留。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the border styles.
ast.target: 使用边框样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image is tiled (repeated) to fill the area.
ast.target: 图像被平铺（重复）以填充区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image is tiled (repeated) to fill the area. If it does not fill the area with a whole number of tiles, the image is rescaled so that it does.
ast.target: 图像被平铺（重复）以填充区域。如果无法用整数个图块填充区域，则会重新缩放图像以使其能够填充。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image is tiled (repeated) to fill the area. If it does not fill the area with a whole number of tiles, the extra space is distributed around the tiles.
ast.target: 图像被平铺（重复）以填充区域。如果无法用整数个图块填充区域，则多余的空间将分布在图块周围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image is stretched to fill the area.
ast.target: 图像被拉伸以填充区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting 'border-image-source', 'border-image-slice', 'border-image-width', 'border-image-outset' and 'border-image-repeat'. Omitted values are set to their initial values.
ast.target: 用于设置 'border-image-source'、'border-image-slice'、'border-image-width'、'border-image-outset' 和 'border-image-repeat' 的简写属性。省略的值将设置为其初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how the images for the sides and the middle part of the border image are scaled and tiled. If the second keyword is absent, it is assumed to be the same as the first.
ast.target: 指定边框图像的侧面和中间部分的图像如何缩放和平铺。如果缺少第二个关键字，则假定其与第一个相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies inward offsets from the top, right, bottom, and left edges of the image, dividing it into nine regions: four corners, four edges and a middle.
ast.target: 指定从图像上、右、下、左边缘的向内偏移量，将其划分为九个区域：四个角、四条边和一个中间部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies an image to use instead of the border styles given by the 'border-style' properties and as an additional background layer for the element. If the value is 'none' or if the image cannot be displayed, the border styles will be used.
ast.target: 指定一个图像，用于替代由 'border-style' 属性给出的边框样式，并作为元素的额外背景层。如果值为 'none' 或图像无法显示，则将使用边框样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The border image width is the intrinsic width or height (whichever is applicable) of the corresponding image slice. If the image does not have the required intrinsic dimension then the corresponding border-width is used instead.
ast.target: 边框图像宽度为相应图像切片的固有宽度或高度（取适用者）。如果图像不具备所需的固有尺寸，则使用相应的 border-width。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The four values of 'border-image-width' specify offsets that are used to divide the border image area into nine parts. They represent inward distances from the top, right, bottom, and left sides of the area, respectively.
ast.target: 'border-image-width' 的四个值指定了用于将边框图像区域划分为九个部分的偏移量。它们分别代表从区域上、右、下、左边缘的向内距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-right'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑属性 'border-right'。其映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-left'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑属性 'border-left'。其映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-right-color'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑属性 'border-right-color'。其映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-left-color'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑属性 'border-left-color'。其映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-right-style'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑属性 'border-right-style'。其映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-left-style'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑属性 'border-left-style'。其映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-right-width'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑属性 'border-right-width'。其映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'border-left-width'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑属性 'border-left-width'。其映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting border width, style and color
ast.target: 用于设置边框宽度、样式和颜色的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the left border.
ast.target: 设置左边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the style of the left border.
ast.target: 设置左边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the thickness of the left border.
ast.target: 设置左边框的粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the radii of the outer border edge.
ast.target: 定义外边框边缘的半径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the right border.
ast.target: 设置右边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the style of the right border.
ast.target: 设置右边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the thickness of the right border.
ast.target: 设置右边框的粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The lengths specify the distance that separates adjoining cell borders. If one length is specified, it gives both the horizontal and vertical spacing. If two are specified, the first gives the horizontal spacing and the second the vertical spacing. Lengths may not be negative.
ast.target: 长度值指定相邻单元格边框之间的间距。如果指定一个长度，则同时给出水平和垂直间距。如果指定两个，则第一个给出水平间距，第二个给出垂直间距。长度值不能为负。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The style of the border around edges of an element.
ast.target: 元素边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the top border.
ast.target: 设置上边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the radii of the top left outer border edge.
ast.target: 定义左上外边框边缘的半径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the radii of the top right outer border edge.
ast.target: 定义右上外边框边缘的半径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the style of the top border.
ast.target: 设置上边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the thickness of the top border.
ast.target: 设置上边框的粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand that sets the four 'border-*-width' properties. If it has four values, they set top, right, bottom and left in that order. If left is missing, it is the same as right; if bottom is missing, it is the same as top; if right is missing, it is the same as top.
ast.target: 设置四个 'border-*-width' 属性的简写属性。如果有四个值，则按上、右、下、左的顺序设置。如果缺少左值，则与右值相同；如果缺少下值，则与上值相同；如果缺少右值，则与上值相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For non-replaced elements, the effect of this value depends on which of related properties have the value 'auto' as well
ast.target: 对于非替换元素，此值的效果取决于哪些相关属性的值也为 'auto'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how far an absolutely positioned box's bottom margin edge is offset above the bottom edge of the box's 'containing block'.
ast.target: 指定绝对定位盒子的下外边距边缘相对于其 'containing block' 下边缘的偏移量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each box is independently wrapped with the border and padding.
ast.target: 每个盒子都独立地用边框和内边距包裹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The effect is as though the element were rendered with no breaks present, and then sliced by the breaks afterward.
ast.target: 效果如同元素在没有分页符的情况下渲染，然后在渲染后被分页符切割。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether individual boxes are treated as broken pieces of one continuous box, or whether each box is individually wrapped with the border and padding.
ast.target: 指定各个盒子是被视为一个连续盒子的断裂部分，还是每个盒子都独立地用边框和内边距包裹。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Changes the drop shadow from an outer shadow (one that shadows the box onto the canvas, as if it were lifted above the canvas) to an inner shadow (one that shadows the canvas onto the box, as if the box were cut out of the canvas and shifted behind it).
ast.target: 将阴影从外阴影（将盒子阴影投射到画布上，仿佛它被提升到画布之上）更改为内阴影（将画布阴影投射到盒子上，仿佛盒子是从画布上剪下并移到其后面）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No shadow.
ast.target: 无阴影。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attaches one or more drop-shadows to the box. The property is a comma-separated list of shadows, each specified by 2-4 length values, an optional color, and an optional 'inset' keyword. Omitted lengths are 0; omitted colors are a user agent chosen color.
ast.target: 为盒子附加一个或多个投影。该属性是一个以逗号分隔的阴影列表，每个阴影由 2-4 个长度值、一个可选颜色和一个可选的 'inset' 关键字指定。省略的长度为 0；省略的颜色由用户代理选择。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The specified width and height (and respective min/max properties) on this element determine the border box of the element.
ast.target: 此元素上指定的宽度和高度（以及相应的 min/max 属性）决定了元素的边框盒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Behavior of width and height as specified by CSS2.1. The specified width and height (and respective min/max properties) apply to the width and height respectively of the content box of the element.
ast.target: 宽度和高度的行为由 CSS2.1 指定。指定的宽度和高度（以及相应的 min/max 属性）分别应用于元素内容盒的宽度和高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the behavior of the 'width' and 'height' properties.
ast.target: 指定 'width' 和 'height' 属性的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a page break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 始终在生成的盒子之前/之后强制分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page/column break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在主盒子之前/之后分页/分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 避免在主盒子之前/之后分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a column break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 避免在主盒子之前/之后分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 避免在主盒子之前/之后分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a column break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 始终在主盒子之前/之后强制分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks before/after the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a left page.
ast.target: 在生成的盒子之前/之后强制一个或两个分页，以便下一页格式化为左页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a page break before/after the principal box.
ast.target: 始终在主盒子之前/之后强制分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks before/after the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a right page.
ast.target: 在生成的盒子之前/之后强制一个或两个分页，以便下一页格式化为右页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column/region break behavior after the generated box.
ast.target: 描述生成的盒子之后的分页/分栏/分区域行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column/region break behavior before the generated box.
ast.target: 描述生成的盒子之前的分页/分栏/分区域行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Impose no additional breaking constraints within the box.
ast.target: 不对盒子施加额外的分页约束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid breaks within the box.
ast.target: 避免在盒子内部分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a column break within the box.
ast.target: 避免在盒子内部分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break within the box.
ast.target: 避免在盒子内部分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column/region break behavior inside the principal box.
ast.target: 描述主盒子内部的分页/分栏/分区域行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Positions the caption box below the table box.
ast.target: 将标题盒子定位在表格盒子下方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Positions the caption box above the table box.
ast.target: 将标题盒子定位在表格盒子上方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the position of the caption box with respect to the table box.
ast.target: 指定标题盒子相对于表格盒子的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent selects an appropriate color for the caret. This is generally currentcolor, but the user agent may choose a different color to ensure good visibility and contrast with the surrounding content, taking into account the value of currentcolor, the background, shadows, and other factors.
ast.target: 用户代理为插入符选择合适的颜色。这通常是 currentcolor，但用户代理可能会选择不同的颜色以确保良好的可见性和与周围内容的对比度，同时考虑 currentcolor 的值、背景、阴影和其他因素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the color of the text insertion indicator.
ast.target: 控制文本插入指示器的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The clearance of the generated box is set to the amount necessary to place the top border edge below the bottom outer edge of any right-floating and left-floating boxes that resulted from elements earlier in the source document.
ast.target: 生成的盒子的 clearance 被设置为将上边框边缘放置在源文档中较早元素产生的任何右浮动和左浮动盒子的下外边缘下方所需的量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The clearance of the generated box is set to the amount necessary to place the top border edge below the bottom outer edge of any left-floating boxes that resulted from elements earlier in the source document.
ast.target: 生成的盒子的 clearance 被设置为将上边框边缘放置在源文档中较早元素产生的任何左浮动盒子的下外边缘下方所需的量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No constraint on the box's position with respect to floats.
ast.target: 盒子相对于浮动元素的位置没有约束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The clearance of the generated box is set to the amount necessary to place the top border edge below the bottom outer edge of any right-floating boxes that resulted from elements earlier in the source document.
ast.target: 生成的盒子的 clearance 被设置为将上边框边缘放置在源文档中较早元素产生的任何右浮动盒子的下外边缘下方所需的量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates which sides of an element's box(es) may not be adjacent to an earlier floating box. The 'clear' property does not consider floats inside the element itself or in other block formatting contexts.
ast.target: 指示元素盒子的哪些边不得与较早的浮动盒子相邻。'clear' 属性不考虑元素本身内部或其他块格式化上下文中的浮动元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element does not clip.
ast.target: 元素不进行裁剪。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies offsets from the edges of the border box.
ast.target: 指定相对于边框盒边缘的偏移量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deprecated. Use the 'clip-path' property when support allows. Defines the visible portion of an element's box.
ast.target: 已弃用。在支持允许时使用 'clip-path' 属性。定义元素盒子的可见部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No clipping path gets created.
ast.target: 不创建裁剪路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: References a <clipPath> element to create a clipping path.
ast.target: 引用一个 <clipPath> 元素来创建裁剪路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a clipping path where everything inside the path is visible and everything outside is clipped out.
ast.target: 指定一个裁剪路径，路径内的所有内容可见，路径外的所有内容被裁剪掉。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the 'insideness' of a point on the canvas by drawing a ray from that point to infinity in any direction and counting the number of path segments from the given shape that the ray crosses.
ast.target: 通过从画布上的一个点向任意方向绘制一条射线到无穷远，并计算给定形状的路径段与该射线相交的次数，来确定该点的 'insideness'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the 'insideness' of a point on the canvas by drawing a ray from that point to infinity in any direction and then examining the places where a segment of the shape crosses the ray.
ast.target: 通过从画布上的一个点向任意方向绘制一条射线到无穷远，然后检查形状的线段与该射线相交的位置，来确定该点的 'insideness'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates the algorithm which is to be used to determine what parts of the canvas are included inside the shape.
ast.target: 指示用于确定画布的哪些部分包含在形状内的算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of an element's text
ast.target: 设置元素文本的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Color operations are not required to occur in a particular color space.
ast.target: 颜色操作不需要在特定的颜色空间中进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Color operations should occur in the linearized RGB color space.
ast.target: 颜色操作应在线性化的 RGB 颜色空间中进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Color operations should occur in the sRGB color space.
ast.target: 颜色操作应在 sRGB 颜色空间中进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the color space for imaging operations performed via filter effects.
ast.target: 指定通过滤镜效果执行的成像操作的颜色空间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the number of columns by the 'column-width' property and the element width.
ast.target: 根据 'column-width' 属性和元素宽度确定列数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the optimal number of columns into which the content of the element will be flowed.
ast.target: 描述元素内容将流入的最佳列数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Fills columns sequentially.
ast.target: 按顺序填充列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Balance content equally between columns, if possible.
ast.target: 如果可能，将内容平均分配到各列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In continuous media, this property will only be consulted if the length of columns has been constrained. Otherwise, columns will automatically be balanced.
ast.target: 在连续媒体中，仅当列的长度受到限制时才会考虑此属性。否则，列将自动平衡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: User agent specific and typically equivalent to 1em.
ast.target: 用户代理特定，通常等同于 1em。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the gap between columns. If there is a column rule between columns, it will appear in the middle of the gap.
ast.target: 设置列之间的间隙。如果列之间有列规则，它将出现在间隙的中间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for setting 'column-rule-width', 'column-rule-style', and 'column-rule-color' at the same place in the style sheet. Omitted values are set to their initial values.
ast.target: 用于同时设置 'column-rule-width'、'column-rule-style' 和 'column-rule-color' 的简写属性。省略的值将设置为其初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the column rule
ast.target: 设置列规则的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the style of the rule between columns of an element.
ast.target: 设置元素列之间规则的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the width of the rule between columns. Negative values are not allowed.
ast.target: 设置列之间规则的宽度。不允许使用负值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The width depends on the values of other properties.
ast.target: 宽度取决于其他属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A shorthand property which sets both 'column-width' and 'column-count'.
ast.target: 同时设置 'column-width' 和 'column-count' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element spans across all columns. Content in the normal flow that appears before the element is automatically balanced across all columns before the element appear.
ast.target: 元素跨越所有列。在元素出现之前，正常流中的内容会自动在所有列之间平衡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element does not span multiple columns.
ast.target: 元素不跨越多列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column break behavior after the generated box.
ast.target: 描述生成的盒子之后的页面/列分页行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the width of columns in multicol elements.
ast.target: 描述多列元素中列的宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the property has no effect.
ast.target: 表示该属性无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turns on all forms of containment for the element.
ast.target: 为元素开启所有形式的包含。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All containment rules except size are applied to the element.
ast.target: 除尺寸外的所有包含规则都应用于元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For properties that can have effects on more than just an element and its descendants, those effects don't escape the containing element.
ast.target: 对于可能影响元素及其后代之外的属性，这些影响不会逃逸出包含元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turns on layout containment for the element.
ast.target: 为元素开启布局包含。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turns on style containment for the element.
ast.target: 为元素开启样式包含。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Turns on paint containment for the element.
ast.target: 为元素开启绘制包含。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that an element and its contents are, as much as possible, independent of the rest of the document tree.
ast.target: 表示元素及其内容尽可能独立于文档树的其余部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The attr(n) function returns as a string the value of attribute n for the subject of the selector.
ast.target: attr(n) 函数以字符串形式返回选择器主体的属性 n 的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Counters are denoted by identifiers (see the 'counter-increment' and 'counter-reset' properties).
ast.target: 计数器由标识符表示（参见 'counter-increment' 和 'counter-reset' 属性）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The (pseudo-)element is replaced in its entirety by the resource referenced by its 'icon' property, and treated as a replaced element.
ast.target: （伪）元素被其 'icon' 属性引用的资源完全替换，并被视为替换元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: On elements, this inhibits the children of the element from being rendered as children of this element, as if the element was empty. On pseudo-elements it causes the pseudo-element to have no content.
ast.target: 在元素上，这会阻止元素的子元素作为此元素的子元素进行渲染，就好像该元素是空的。在伪元素上，这会导致伪元素没有内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: See http://www.w3.org/TR/css3-content/#content for computation rules.
ast.target: 计算规则请参见 http://www.w3.org/TR/css3-content/#content。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines which page-based occurrence of a given element is applied to a counter or string value.
ast.target: 确定给定元素的基于页面的出现次数如何应用于计数器或字符串值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This element does not alter the value of any counters.
ast.target: 此元素不改变任何计数器的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Manipulate the value of existing counters.
ast.target: 操作现有计数器的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The counter is not modified.
ast.target: 计数器未被修改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Property accepts one or more names of counters (identifiers), each one optionally followed by an integer. The integer gives the value that the counter is set to on each occurrence of the element.
ast.target: 属性接受一个或多个计数器名称（标识符），每个名称后面可选地跟一个整数。该整数给出了在元素每次出现时计数器设置的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates an alias of/shortcut to something is to be created. Often rendered as an arrow with a small curved arrow next to it.
ast.target: 表示要创建某个东西的别名/快捷方式。通常渲染为带有一个小弯曲箭头的箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the something can be scrolled in any direction. Often rendered as arrows pointing up, down, left, and right with a dot in the middle.
ast.target: 表示某物可以在任何方向上滚动。通常渲染为向上、向下、向左和向右的箭头，中间有一个点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA determines the cursor to display based on the current context.
ast.target: 用户代理根据当前上下文确定要显示的光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that a cell or set of cells may be selected. Often rendered as a thick plus-sign with a dot in the middle.
ast.target: 表示一个单元格或一组单元格可以被选中。通常渲染为带有一个点的粗加号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the item/column can be resized horizontally. Often rendered as arrows pointing left and right with a vertical bar separating them.
ast.target: 表示项目/列可以水平调整大小。通常渲染为向左和向右的箭头，中间有一个垂直条分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A context menu is available for the object under the cursor. Often rendered as an arrow with a small menu-like graphic next to it.
ast.target: 光标下的对象有上下文菜单可用。通常渲染为带有一个小菜单状图形的箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates something is to be copied. Often rendered as an arrow with a small plus sign next to it.
ast.target: 表示某物要被复制。通常渲染为带有一个小加号的箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A simple crosshair (e.g., short line segments resembling a '+' sign). Often used to indicate a two dimensional bitmap selection mode.
ast.target: 一个简单的十字准线（例如，类似 '+' 号的短线段）。通常用于指示二维位图选择模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The platform-dependent default cursor. Often rendered as an arrow.
ast.target: 平台相关的默认光标。通常渲染为箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that east edge is to be moved.
ast.target: 表示要移动东边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates a bidirectional east-west resize cursor.
ast.target: 表示双向东西方向调整大小光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that something can be grabbed.
ast.target: 表示某物可以被抓取。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that something is being grabbed.
ast.target: 表示某物正在被抓取。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Help is available for the object under the cursor. Often rendered as a question mark or a balloon.
ast.target: 光标下的对象有帮助可用。通常渲染为问号或气球。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates something is to be moved.
ast.target: 表示某物要被移动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that something can be zoomed (magnified) in.
ast.target: 表示某物可以放大（放大）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that something can be zoomed (magnified) out.
ast.target: 表示某物可以缩小（缩小）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that movement starts from north-east corner.
ast.target: 表示移动从东北角开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates a bidirectional north-east/south-west cursor.
ast.target: 表示双向东北/西南方向光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the dragged item cannot be dropped at the current cursor location. Often rendered as a hand or pointer with a small circle with a line through it.
ast.target: 表示拖动的项目不能在当前光标位置放置。通常渲染为带有一个小圆圈和一条线的手或指针。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No cursor is rendered for the element.
ast.target: 不为元素渲染光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the requested action will not be carried out. Often rendered as a circle with a line through it.
ast.target: 表示请求的操作不会被执行。通常渲染为带有一条线的圆圈。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that north edge is to be moved.
ast.target: 表示要移动北边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates a bidirectional north-south cursor.
ast.target: 表示双向南北方向光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that movement starts from north-west corner.
ast.target: 表示移动从西北角开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates a bidirectional north-west/south-east cursor.
ast.target: 表示双向西北/东南方向光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cursor is a pointer that indicates a link.
ast.target: 光标是一个指示链接的指针。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A progress indicator. The program is performing some processing, but is different from 'wait' in that the user may still interact with the program. Often rendered as a spinning beach ball, or an arrow with a watch or hourglass.
ast.target: 一个进度指示器。程序正在执行某些处理，但与 'wait' 不同，用户仍然可以与程序交互。通常渲染为旋转的沙滩球，或带有手表或沙漏的箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the item/row can be resized vertically. Often rendered as arrows pointing up and down with a horizontal bar separating them.
ast.target: 表示项目/行可以垂直调整大小。通常渲染为向上和向下的箭头，中间有一个水平条分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that movement starts from south-east corner.
ast.target: 表示移动从东南角开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that south edge is to be moved.
ast.target: 表示要移动南边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that movement starts from south-west corner.
ast.target: 表示移动从西南角开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates text that may be selected. Often rendered as a vertical I-beam.
ast.target: 表示可能被选中的文本。通常渲染为垂直的 I 形光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates vertical-text that may be selected. Often rendered as a horizontal I-beam.
ast.target: 表示可能被选中的垂直文本。通常渲染为水平的 I 形光标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the program is busy and the user should wait. Often rendered as a watch or hourglass.
ast.target: 表示程序正在忙碌，用户应该等待。通常渲染为手表或沙漏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that west edge is to be moved.
ast.target: 表示要移动西边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows control over cursor appearance in an element
ast.target: 允许控制元素中的光标外观。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Left-to-right direction.
ast.target: 从左到右的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right-to-left direction.
ast.target: 从右到左的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the inline base direction or directionality of any bidi paragraph, embedding, isolate, or override established by the box. Note: for HTML content use the 'dir' attribute and 'bdo' element rather than this property.
ast.target: 指定由盒子建立的任何双向段落、嵌入、隔离或覆盖的内联基础方向或方向性。注意：对于 HTML 内容，请使用 'dir' 属性和 'bdo' 元素，而不是此属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element generates a block-level box
ast.target: 元素生成一个块级盒子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element itself does not generate any boxes, but its children and pseudo-elements still generate boxes as normal.
ast.target: 元素本身不生成任何盒子，但其子元素和伪元素仍然正常生成盒子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element generates a principal flex container box and establishes a flex formatting context.
ast.target: 元素生成一个主弹性容器盒子，并建立一个弹性格式化上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element lays out its contents using flow layout (block-and-inline layout). Standardized as 'flex'.
ast.target: 元素使用流布局（块和内联布局）来布局其内容。标准化为 'flex'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element generates a block container box, and lays out its contents using flow layout.
ast.target: 元素生成一个块容器盒子，并使用流布局来布局其内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element generates a principal grid container box, and establishes a grid formatting context.
ast.target: 元素生成一个主网格容器盒子，并建立一个网格格式化上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element generates an inline-level box.
ast.target: 元素生成一个内联级盒子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A block box, which itself is flowed as a single inline box, similar to a replaced element. The inside of an inline-block is formatted as a block box, and the box itself is formatted as an inline box.
ast.target: 一个块盒子，它本身作为一个单独的内联盒子流动，类似于替换元素。内联块的内部被格式化为一个块盒子，盒子本身被格式化为一个内联盒子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline-level flex container.
ast.target: 内联级弹性容器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline-level flex container. Standardized as 'inline-flex'
ast.target: 内联级弹性容器。标准化为 'inline-flex'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline-level table wrapper box containing table box.
ast.target: 包含表格盒子的内联级表格包装盒子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: One or more block boxes and one marker box.
ast.target: 一个或多个块盒子和一个标记盒子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline-level grid container.
ast.target: 内联级网格容器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element and its descendants generates no boxes.
ast.target: 元素及其后代不生成任何盒子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element generates a principal ruby container box, and establishes a ruby formatting context.
ast.target: 元素生成一个主 ruby 容器盒子，并建立一个 ruby 格式化上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element generates a run-in box. Run-in elements act like inlines or blocks, depending on the surrounding elements.
ast.target: 元素生成一个行内盒子。行内元素根据周围的元素表现得像内联或块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element generates a principal table wrapper box containing an additionally-generated table box, and establishes a table formatting context.
ast.target: 元素生成一个主表格包装盒子，其中包含一个额外生成的表格盒子，并建立一个表格格式化上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element lays out its contents using flow layout (block-and-inline layout).
ast.target: 元素使用流布局（块和内联布局）来布局其内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In combination with 'float' and 'position', determines the type of box or boxes that are generated for an element.
ast.target: 与 'float' 和 'position' 结合，确定为元素生成的盒子类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No borders or backgrounds are drawn around/behind empty cells.
ast.target: 不在空单元格周围/后面绘制边框或背景。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Borders and backgrounds are drawn around/behind empty cells (like normal cells).
ast.target: 在空单元格周围/后面绘制边框和背景（像普通单元格一样）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In the separated borders model, this property controls the rendering of borders and backgrounds around cells that have no visible content.
ast.target: 在分离边框模型中，此属性控制没有可见内容的单元格周围边框和背景的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the ancestor container element has a property of new, then all graphics elements within the current container are rendered both on the parent's background image and onto the target.
ast.target: 如果祖先容器元素具有属性 new，则当前容器内的所有图形元素都会在父元素的背景图像和目标上渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Create a new background image canvas. All children of the current container element can access the background, and they will be rendered onto both the parent's background image canvas in addition to the target device.
ast.target: 创建一个新的背景图像画布。当前容器元素的所有子元素都可以访问背景，并且它们将被渲染到父元素的背景图像画布以及目标设备上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deprecated. Use 'isolation' property instead when support allows. Specifies how the accumulation of the background image is managed.
ast.target: 已弃用。在支持时请改用 'isolation' 属性。指定如何管理背景图像的累积。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies a fallback counter style to be used when the current counter style can't create a representation for a given counter value.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。指定当当前计数器样式无法为给定计数器值创建表示时使用的后备计数器样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A URL reference to a paint server element, which is an element that defines a paint server: 'hatch', 'linearGradient', 'mesh', 'pattern', 'radialGradient' and 'solidcolor'.
ast.target: 指向一个绘制服务器元素的URL引用，该元素定义了一个绘制服务器：'hatch'、'linearGradient'、'mesh'、'pattern'、'radialGradient' 和 'solidcolor'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No paint is applied in this layer.
ast.target: 此图层不应用任何绘制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Paints the interior of the given graphical element.
ast.target: 绘制给定图形元素的内部。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the opacity of the painting operation used to paint the interior the current object.
ast.target: 指定用于绘制当前对象内部的绘制操作的不透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates the algorithm (or winding rule) which is to be used to determine what parts of the canvas are included inside the shape.
ast.target: 指定用于确定画布哪些部分包含在形状内部的算法（或缠绕规则）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No filter effects are applied.
ast.target: 不应用任何滤镜效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies a Gaussian blur to the input image.
ast.target: 对输入图像应用高斯模糊。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies a linear multiplier to input image, making it appear more or less bright.
ast.target: 对输入图像应用线性乘数，使其看起来更亮或更暗。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adjusts the contrast of the input.
ast.target: 调整输入的对比度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies a drop shadow effect to the input image.
ast.target: 对输入图像应用投影效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Converts the input image to grayscale.
ast.target: 将输入图像转换为灰度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies a hue rotation on the input image.
ast.target: 对输入图像应用色相旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inverts the samples in the input image.
ast.target: 反转输入图像中的采样值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies transparency to the samples in the input image.
ast.target: 对输入图像中的采样值应用透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Saturates the input image.
ast.target: 使输入图像饱和。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Converts the input image to sepia.
ast.target: 将输入图像转换为深褐色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A filter reference to a <filter> element.
ast.target: 指向一个 <filter> 元素的滤镜引用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Processes an element's rendering before it is displayed in the document, by applying one or more filter effects.
ast.target: 在元素显示在文档中之前，通过应用一个或多个滤镜效果来处理其渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Retrieves the value of the main size property as the used 'flex-basis'.
ast.target: 将主尺寸属性的值作为已使用的 'flex-basis' 检索。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates automatic sizing, based on the flex item's content.
ast.target: 表示基于弹性项目内容的自动尺寸调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expands to '0 0 auto'.
ast.target: 展开为 '0 0 auto'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the components of a flexible length: the flex grow factor and flex shrink factor, and the flex basis.
ast.target: 指定弹性长度的组成部分：弹性增长因子、弹性收缩因子和弹性基准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the flex basis.
ast.target: 设置弹性基准。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flex container's main axis has the same orientation as the block axis of the current writing mode.
ast.target: 弹性容器的主轴与当前书写模式的块轴具有相同的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as 'column', except the main-start and main-end directions are swapped.
ast.target: 与 'column' 相同，但主起点和主终点的方向互换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flex container's main axis has the same orientation as the inline axis of the current writing mode.
ast.target: 弹性容器的主轴与当前书写模式的行内轴具有相同的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as 'row', except the main-start and main-end directions are swapped.
ast.target: 与 'row' 相同，但主起点和主终点的方向互换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how flex items are placed in the flex container, by setting the direction of the flex container's main axis.
ast.target: 通过设置弹性容器主轴的方向，指定弹性项目在弹性容器中的放置方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flex container is single-line.
ast.target: 弹性容器是单行的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The flexbox is multi-line.
ast.target: 弹性盒是多行的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as 'wrap', except the cross-start and cross-end directions are swapped.
ast.target: 与 'wrap' 相同，但交叉起点和交叉终点的方向互换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how flexbox items are placed in the flexbox.
ast.target: 指定弹性盒项目在弹性盒中的放置方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the flex grow factor. Negative numbers are invalid.
ast.target: 设置弹性增长因子。负数无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the flex shrink factor. Negative numbers are invalid.
ast.target: 设置弹性收缩因子。负数无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls whether the flex container is single-line or multi-line, and the direction of the cross-axis, which determines the direction new lines are stacked in.
ast.target: 控制弹性容器是单行还是多行，以及交叉轴的方向，这决定了新行堆叠的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A keyword indicating that the element must float on the end side of its containing block. That is the right side with ltr scripts, and the left side with rtl scripts.
ast.target: 一个关键字，表示元素必须在其包含块的结束侧浮动。对于从左到右的脚本是右侧，对于从右到左的脚本是左侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A keyword indicating that the element must float on the start side of its containing block. That is the left side with ltr scripts, and the right side with rtl scripts.
ast.target: 一个关键字，表示元素必须在其包含块的起始侧浮动。对于从左到右的脚本是左侧，对于从右到左的脚本是右侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element generates a block box that is floated to the left. Content flows on the right side of the box, starting at the top (subject to the 'clear' property).
ast.target: 元素生成一个向左浮动的块盒。内容在盒子的右侧流动，从顶部开始（受 'clear' 属性影响）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box is not floated.
ast.target: 盒子不浮动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Similar to 'left', except the box is floated to the right, and content flows on the left side of the box, starting at the top.
ast.target: 类似于 'left'，但盒子向右浮动，内容在盒子的左侧流动，从顶部开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how a box should be floated. It may be set for any element, but only applies to elements that generate boxes that are not absolutely positioned.
ast.target: 指定盒子应如何浮动。可以为任何元素设置，但仅适用于生成非绝对定位盒子的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates what color to use to flood the current filter primitive subregion.
ast.target: 指定用于填充当前滤镜图元子区域的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates what opacity to use to flood the current filter primitive subregion.
ast.target: 指定用于填充当前滤镜图元子区域的不透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Thin
ast.target: 细体

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extra Light (Ultra Light)
ast.target: 特细体（超细体）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Light
ast.target: 细体

ast.name: description
ast.source: Normal
ast.target: 常规

ast.name: description
ast.source: Medium
ast.target: 中等

ast.name: description
ast.source: Semi Bold (Demi Bold)
ast.target: 半粗体（中粗体）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bold
ast.target: 粗体

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extra Bold (Ultra Bold)
ast.target: 特粗体（超粗体）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Black (Heavy)
ast.target: 黑体（特粗体）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as 700
ast.target: 等同于 700

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the weight of the face bolder than the inherited value.
ast.target: 指定比继承值更粗的字面粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used for captioned controls (e.g., buttons, drop-downs, etc.).
ast.target: 用于带标题控件（如按钮、下拉菜单等）的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used to label icons.
ast.target: 用于标签图标的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a font that is labeled 'italic', or, if that is not available, one labeled 'oblique'.
ast.target: 选择标记为 'italic' 的字体，如果不可用，则选择标记为 'oblique' 的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the weight of the face lighter than the inherited value.
ast.target: 指定比继承值更细的字面粗细。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used in menus (e.g., dropdown menus and menu lists).
ast.target: 用于菜单（如下拉菜单和菜单列表）的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used in dialog boxes.
ast.target: 用于对话框的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a face that is not labeled as a small-caps font.
ast.target: 指定一个未标记为小型大写字体的字面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a font that is labeled 'oblique'.
ast.target: 选择标记为 'oblique' 的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a font that is labeled as a small-caps font. If a genuine small-caps font is not available, user agents should simulate a small-caps font.
ast.target: 指定一个标记为小型大写字体的字体。如果没有真正的小型大写字体，用户代理应模拟一个小型大写字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used for labeling small controls.
ast.target: 用于标签小型控件的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font used in window status bars.
ast.target: 用于窗口状态栏的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting 'font-style', 'font-variant', 'font-weight', 'font-size', 'line-height', and 'font-family', at the same place in the style sheet. The syntax of this property is based on a traditional typographical shorthand notation to set multiple properties related to fonts.
ast.target: 用于同时设置 'font-style'、'font-variant'、'font-weight'、'font-size'、'line-height' 和 'font-family' 的简写属性。此属性的语法基于传统的排版简写符号，用于设置与字体相关的多个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a prioritized list of font family names or generic family names. A user agent iterates through the list of family names until it matches an available font that contains a glyph for the character to be rendered.
ast.target: 指定字体族名称或通用族名称的优先级列表。用户代理遍历族名称列表，直到匹配到包含要渲染字符字形的可用字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Access All Alternates.
ast.target: 访问所有替代项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Above-base Forms. Required in Khmer script.
ast.target: 上基线形式。高棉语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Above-base Mark Positioning. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 上基线标记定位。印度语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Above-base Substitutions. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 上基线替换。印度语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alternative Fractions.
ast.target: 替代分数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Akhand. Required in most Indic scripts.
ast.target: 不可分割。大多数印度语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Below-base Form. Required in a number of Indic scripts.
ast.target: 下基线形式。一些印度语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Below-base Mark Positioning. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 下基线标记定位。印度语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Below-base Substitutions. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 下基线替换。印度语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Contextual Alternates.
ast.target: 上下文替代项。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Case-Sensitive Forms. Applies only to European scripts; particularly prominent in Spanish-language setting.
ast.target: 大小写敏感形式。仅适用于欧洲文字；在西班牙语环境中尤为突出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Glyph Composition/Decomposition.
ast.target: 字形组合/分解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Conjunct Form After Ro. Required in Khmer scripts.
ast.target: Ro 后连接形式。高棉语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Conjunct Forms. Required in Indic scripts that show similarity to Devanagari.
ast.target: 连接形式。与天城文相似的印度语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Contextual Ligatures.
ast.target: 上下文连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Centered CJK Punctuation. Used primarily in Chinese fonts.
ast.target: 居中标点。主要用于中文字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Capital Spacing. Should not be used in connecting scripts (e.g. most Arabic).
ast.target: 大写间距。不应用于连接文字（如大多数阿拉伯文）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Contextual Swash.
ast.target: 上下文花饰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cursive Positioning. Can be used in any cursive script.
ast.target: 草书定位。可用于任何草书文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Petite Capitals From Capitals. Applies only to bicameral scripts.
ast.target: 从大写字母生成小型大写字母。仅适用于双字母文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Small Capitals From Capitals. Applies only to bicameral scripts.
ast.target: 从大写字母生成小型大写字母。仅适用于双字母文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Distances. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 距离。印度语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Discretionary ligatures.
ast.target: 任意连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Dotless Forms. Applied to math formula layout.
ast.target: 无点形式。应用于数学公式布局。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expert Forms. Applies only to Japanese.
ast.target: 专家形式。仅适用于日语。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Final Glyph on Line Alternates. Can be used in any cursive script.
ast.target: 行尾字形替代项。可用于任何草书文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Terminal Form #2. Used only with the Syriac script.
ast.target: 终端形式 #2。仅用于叙利亚文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Terminal Form #3. Used only with the Syriac script.
ast.target: 终端形式 #3。仅用于叙利亚文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Terminal Forms. Can be used in any alphabetic script.
ast.target: 终端形式。可用于任何字母文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flattened ascent forms. Applied to math formula layout.
ast.target: 扁平上升形式。应用于数学公式布局。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Full Widths. Applies to any script which can use monospaced forms.
ast.target: 全角形式。适用于任何可以使用等宽形式的文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Half Forms. Required in Indic scripts that show similarity to Devanagari.
ast.target: 半形式。与天城文相似的印度语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Halant Forms. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 哈兰特形式。印度语脚本必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alternate Half Widths. Used only in CJKV fonts.
ast.target: 备用半角宽度。仅用于CJKV字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Historical Forms.
ast.target: 历史字形。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Horizontal Kana Alternates. Applies only to fonts that support kana (hiragana and katakana).
ast.target: 水平假名变体。仅适用于支持假名（平假名和片假名）的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Historical Ligatures.
ast.target: 历史连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hangul. Korean only.
ast.target: 韩文。仅限韩语。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hojo Kanji Forms (JIS X 0212-1990 Kanji Forms). Used only with Kanji script.
ast.target: 补字汉字字形（JIS X 0212-1990汉字字形）。仅用于汉字书写系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Half Widths. Generally used only in CJKV fonts.
ast.target: 半角宽度。通常仅用于CJKV字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Initial Forms. Can be used in any alphabetic script.
ast.target: 词首字形。可用于任何字母书写系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Isolated Forms. Can be used in any cursive script.
ast.target: 独立字形。可用于任何草书书写系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Italics. Applies mostly to Latin; note that many non-Latin fonts contain Latin as well.
ast.target: 斜体。主要适用于拉丁文；请注意，许多非拉丁文字体也包含拉丁文。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 基前字形。高棉文、缅甸文以及可能显示Ra基前字形的南部印度书写系统必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Pre-base Substitutions. Required in Indic scripts.
ast.target: 基前替换。印度书写系统必需。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Post-base Forms. Required in scripts of south and southeast Asia that have post-base forms for consonants eg: Gurmukhi, Malayalam, Khmer.
ast.target: 基后字形。南亚和东南亚具有辅音基后字形的书写系统必需，例如：古木基文、马拉雅拉姆文、高棉文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Post-base Substitutions.
ast.target: 基后替换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Proportional Widths.
ast.target: 比例宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Quarter Widths. Generally used only in CJKV fonts.
ast.target: 四分之一宽度。通常仅用于CJKV字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Required Contextual Alternates. May apply to any script, but is especially important for many styles of Arabic.
ast.target: 必需的上下文替换字形。可能适用于任何书写系统，但对许多阿拉伯文风格尤为重要。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Required Ligatures. Applies to Arabic and Syriac. May apply to some other scripts.
ast.target: 必需的连字。适用于阿拉伯文和叙利亚文。可能适用于其他一些书写系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Rakar Forms. Required in Devanagari and Gujarati scripts.
ast.target: Rakar字形。天城文和古吉拉特文书写系统必需。

ast.name: description

ast.target: Reph字形。印度书写系统必需。例如：天城文、卡纳达文。

ast.target: 小型大写字母。仅适用于大小写双写字母的书写系统。

ast.target: 简化字形。仅适用于中文和日文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Math script style alternates.
ast.target: 数学脚本样式替换字形。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Stretching Glyph Decomposition.
ast.target: 拉伸字形分解。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Swash. Does not apply to ideographic scripts.
ast.target: 花饰字。不适用于表意文字书写系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Trailing Jamo Forms. Required for Hangul script when Ancient Hangul writing system is supported.
ast.target: 终声字形。当支持古韩文书写系统时，韩文书写系统必需。

ast.source: Traditional Name Forms. Applies only to Japanese.
ast.target: 传统名称字形。仅适用于日语。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tabular Figures.
ast.target: 等宽数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Traditional Forms. Applies only to Chinese and Japanese.
ast.target: 传统字形。仅适用于中文和日文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Third Widths. Generally used only in CJKV fonts.
ast.target: 三分之一宽度。通常仅用于CJKV字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alternate Vertical Metrics. Applies only to scripts with vertical writing modes.
ast.target: 备用垂直度量。仅适用于具有垂直书写模式的书写系统。

ast.source: Vattu Variants. Used for Indic scripts. E.g. Devanagari.
ast.target: Vattu变体。用于印度书写系统。例如：天城文。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 垂直替换字形。仅适用于具有垂直书写模式的书写系统。

ast.name: description

ast.target: 元音字形。当支持古韩文书写系统时，韩文书写系统必需。

ast.source: Vertical Kana Alternates. Applies only to fonts that support kana (hiragana and katakana).
ast.target: 垂直假名变体。仅适用于支持假名（平假名和片假名）的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vertical Kerning.
ast.target: 垂直字距调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Proportional Alternate Vertical Metrics. Used mostly in CJKV fonts.
ast.target: 比例备用垂直度量。主要用于CJKV字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Vertical Alternates and Rotation. Applies only to scripts with vertical writing modes.
ast.target: 垂直替换字形与旋转。仅适用于具有垂直书写模式的书写系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Slashed Zero.
ast.target: 斜线零。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No change in glyph substitution or positioning occurs.
ast.target: 字形替换或定位不发生变化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disable feature.
ast.target: 禁用功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enable feature.
ast.target: 启用功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides low-level control over OpenType font features. It is intended as a way of providing access to font features that are not widely used but are needed for a particular use case.
ast.target: 提供对OpenType字体功能的底层控制。旨在作为一种访问未被广泛使用但特定用例所需的字体功能的方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies that kerning is applied at the discretion of the user agent.
ast.target: 指定字距调整由用户代理自行决定应用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies that kerning is not applied.
ast.target: 指定不应用字距调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies that kerning is applied.
ast.target: 指定应用字距调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kerning is the contextual adjustment of inter-glyph spacing. This property controls metric kerning, kerning that utilizes adjustment data contained in the font.
ast.target: 字距调整是字形间距的上下文调整。此属性控制度量字距调整，即利用字体中包含的调整数据的字距调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Implies that when rendering with OpenType fonts the language of the document is used to infer the OpenType language system, used to select language specific features when rendering.
ast.target: 意味着在使用OpenType字体渲染时，文档的语言用于推断OpenType语言系统，该系统用于在渲染时选择特定于语言的功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The value of 'normal' implies that when rendering with OpenType fonts the language of the document is used to infer the OpenType language system, used to select language specific features when rendering.
ast.target: 'normal'值意味着在使用OpenType字体渲染时，文档的语言用于推断OpenType语言系统，该系统用于在渲染时选择特定于语言的功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Do not preserve the font's x-height.
ast.target: 不保留字体的x高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Preserves the readability of text when font fallback occurs by adjusting the font-size so that the x-height is the same regardless of the font used.
ast.target: 通过调整字体大小以使x高度在不同字体下保持一致，从而在字体回退时保持文本的可读性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates a narrower value relative to the width of the parent element.
ast.target: 表示相对于父元素宽度的较窄值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates a wider value relative to the width of the parent element.
ast.target: 表示相对于父元素宽度的较宽值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a normal, condensed, or expanded face from a font family.
ast.target: 从字体系列中选择常规、紧凑或扩展的字面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a font that is labeled as an 'italic' face, or an 'oblique' face if one is not
ast.target: 选择标记为'italic'字面的字体，如果没有则选择'oblique'字面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a face that is classified as 'normal'.
ast.target: 选择分类为'normal'的字面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects a font that is labeled as an 'oblique' face, or an 'italic' face if one is not.
ast.target: 选择标记为'oblique'字面的字体，如果没有则选择'italic'字面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows italic or oblique faces to be selected. Italic forms are generally cursive in nature while oblique faces are typically sloped versions of the regular face.
ast.target: 允许选择斜体或倾斜字面。斜体形式通常具有草书性质，而倾斜字面通常是常规字面的倾斜版本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disallow all synthetic faces.
ast.target: 禁止所有合成字面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow synthetic italic faces.
ast.target: 允许合成斜体字面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allow synthetic bold faces.
ast.target: 允许合成粗体字面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls whether user agents are allowed to synthesize bold or oblique font faces when a font family lacks bold or italic faces.
ast.target: 控制当字体系列缺少粗体或斜体字面时，是否允许用户代理合成粗体或倾斜字体字面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies variant representations of the font
ast.target: 指定字体的变体表示形式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of alternate annotation forms.
ast.target: 启用备用注释字形的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of specific character variants.
ast.target: 启用特定字符变体的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of historical forms.
ast.target: 启用历史字形的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: None of the features are enabled.
ast.target: 所有功能均未启用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables replacement of default glyphs with ornaments, if provided in the font.
ast.target: 如果字体中提供了装饰字形，则启用用装饰字形替换默认字形的功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display with stylistic sets.
ast.target: 启用样式集显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of stylistic alternates.
ast.target: 启用样式替代字形的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of swash glyphs.
ast.target: 启用花饰字形的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For any given character, fonts can provide a variety of alternate glyphs in addition to the default glyph for that character. This property provides control over the selection of these alternate glyphs.
ast.target: 对于任何给定字符，字体除了该字符的默认字形外，还可以提供多种替代字形。此属性用于控制这些替代字形的选择。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of petite capitals for both upper and lowercase letters.
ast.target: 启用大小写字母的小型大写字母显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of small capitals for both upper and lowercase letters.
ast.target: 启用大小写字母的大写字母显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of petite capitals.
ast.target: 启用小型大写字母的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of small capitals. Small-caps glyphs typically use the form of uppercase letters but are reduced to the size of lowercase letters.
ast.target: 启用小型大写字母的显示。小型大写字母字形通常采用大写字母的形式，但尺寸缩小到小写字母的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of titling capitals.
ast.target: 启用标题大写字母的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of mixture of small capitals for uppercase letters with normal lowercase letters.
ast.target: 启用大写字母使用小型大写字母、小写字母使用正常小写字母的混合显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies control over capitalized forms.
ast.target: 指定对大写形式的控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of full-width variants.
ast.target: 启用全角变体的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of JIS04 forms.
ast.target: 启用 JIS04 形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of JIS78 forms.
ast.target: 启用 JIS78 形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of JIS83 forms.
ast.target: 启用 JIS83 形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of JIS90 forms.
ast.target: 启用 JIS90 形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of proportionally-spaced variants.
ast.target: 启用比例间距变体的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of ruby variant glyphs.
ast.target: 启用注音符号变体字形的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of simplified forms.
ast.target: 启用简体形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables rendering of traditional forms.
ast.target: 启用繁体形式的渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows control of glyph substitute and positioning in East Asian text.
ast.target: 允许控制东亚文本中的字形替换和定位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of additional ligatures.
ast.target: 启用额外连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of common ligatures.
ast.target: 启用常见连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of contextual alternates.
ast.target: 启用上下文替代字形的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of discretionary ligatures.
ast.target: 启用任意连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of historical ligatures.
ast.target: 启用历史连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables display of additional ligatures.
ast.target: 禁用额外连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables display of common ligatures.
ast.target: 禁用常见连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables display of contextual alternates.
ast.target: 禁用上下文替代字形的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables display of discretionary ligatures.
ast.target: 禁用任意连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables display of historical ligatures.
ast.target: 禁用历史连字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Disables all ligatures.
ast.target: 禁用所有连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Implies that the defaults set by the font are used.
ast.target: 表示使用字体设置的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies control over which ligatures are enabled or disabled. A value of 'normal' implies that the defaults set by the font are used.
ast.target: 指定对哪些连字启用或禁用的控制。值为 'normal' 表示使用字体设置的默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of lining diagonal fractions.
ast.target: 启用衬线对角分数的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of lining numerals.
ast.target: 启用衬线数字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of old-style numerals.
ast.target: 启用旧式数字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of letter forms used with ordinal numbers.
ast.target: 启用与序数词一起使用的字母形式的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of proportional numerals.
ast.target: 启用比例数字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of slashed zeros.
ast.target: 启用斜线零的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of lining stacked fractions.
ast.target: 启用衬线堆叠分数的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of tabular numerals.
ast.target: 启用等宽数字的显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies control over numerical forms.
ast.target: 指定对数字形式的控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of subscript variants (OpenType feature: subs).
ast.target: 启用下标变体的显示（OpenType 功能：subs）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables display of superscript variants (OpenType feature: sups).
ast.target: 启用上标变体的显示（OpenType 功能：sups）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the vertical position
ast.target: 指定垂直位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as 400
ast.target: 与 400 相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies weight of glyphs in the font, their degree of blackness or stroke thickness.
ast.target: 指定字体中字形的粗细，即其黑度或笔画粗细程度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls glyph orientation when the inline-progression-direction is horizontal.
ast.target: 控制当行内进度方向为水平时的字形方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the orientation based on the fullwidth or non-fullwidth characters and the most common orientation.
ast.target: 基于全角或非全角字符以及最常见的方向来设置方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls glyph orientation when the inline-progression-direction is vertical.
ast.target: 控制当行内进度方向为垂直时的字形方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The property contributes nothing to the grid item's placement, indicating auto-placement, an automatic span, or a default span of one.
ast.target: 该属性对网格项的放置没有贡献，表示自动放置、自动跨度或默认跨度为一。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Contributes a grid span to the grid item's placement such that the corresponding edge of the grid item's grid area is N lines from its opposite edge.
