ast.target: 为网格项的放置贡献一个网格跨度，使得网格项网格区域的相应边缘与其相对边缘相隔 N 条线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determine a grid item's size and location within the grid by contributing a line, a span, or nothing (automatic) to its grid placement. Shorthand for 'grid-row-start', 'grid-column-start', 'grid-row-end', and 'grid-column-end'.
ast.target: 通过为网格项的网格放置贡献一条线、一个跨度或不贡献（自动）来确定网格项在网格中的大小和位置。是 'grid-row-start'、'grid-column-start'、'grid-row-end' 和 'grid-column-end' 的简写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The grid CSS property is a shorthand property that sets all of the explicit grid properties ('grid-template-rows', 'grid-template-columns', and 'grid-template-areas'), and all the implicit grid properties ('grid-auto-rows', 'grid-auto-columns', and 'grid-auto-flow'), in a single declaration.
ast.target: grid CSS 属性是一个简写属性，用于在单个声明中设置所有显式网格属性（'grid-template-rows'、'grid-template-columns' 和 'grid-template-areas'）以及所有隐式网格属性（'grid-auto-rows'、'grid-auto-columns' 和 'grid-auto-flow'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the largest min-content contribution of the grid items occupying the grid track.
ast.target: 表示占据网格轨道的网格项的最大最小内容贡献。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the largest max-content contribution of the grid items occupying the grid track.
ast.target: 表示占据网格轨道的网格项的最大最大内容贡献。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As a maximum, identical to 'max-content'. As a minimum, represents the largest minimum size (as specified by min-width/min-height) of the grid items occupying the grid track.
ast.target: 作为最大值时，与 'max-content' 相同。作为最小值时，表示占据网格轨道的网格项的最大最小尺寸（由 min-width/min-height 指定）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines a size range greater than or equal to min and less than or equal to max.
ast.target: 定义一个大于或等于 min 且小于或等于 max 的尺寸范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the size of implicitly created columns.
ast.target: 指定隐式创建的列的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The auto-placement algorithm places items by filling each row in turn, adding new rows as necessary.
ast.target: 自动放置算法通过依次填充每一行来放置项目，必要时添加新行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The auto-placement algorithm places items by filling each column in turn, adding new columns as necessary.
ast.target: 自动放置算法通过依次填充每一列来放置项目，必要时添加新列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If specified, the auto-placement algorithm uses a "dense" packing algorithm, which attempts to fill in holes earlier in the grid if smaller items come up later.
ast.target: 如果指定，自动放置算法使用“密集”打包算法，该算法尝试在较小的项目出现时更早地填充网格中的空隙。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls how the auto-placement algorithm works, specifying exactly how auto-placed items get flowed into the grid.
ast.target: 控制自动放置算法的工作方式，确切指定自动放置的项目如何流入网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the size of implicitly created rows.
ast.target: 指定隐式创建的行的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for 'grid-column-start' and 'grid-column-end'.
ast.target: 'grid-column-start' 和 'grid-column-end' 的简写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determine a grid item's size and location within the grid by contributing a line, a span, or nothing (automatic) to its grid placement.
ast.target: 通过为网格项的网格放置贡献一条线、一个跨度或不贡献（自动）来确定网格项在网格中的大小和位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the gutters between grid columns. Replaced by 'column-gap' property.
ast.target: 指定网格列之间的间距。已被 'column-gap' 属性取代。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand that specifies the gutters between grid columns and grid rows in one declaration. Replaced by 'gap' property.
ast.target: 在单个声明中指定网格列和网格行之间间距的简写。已被 'gap' 属性取代。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for 'grid-row-start' and 'grid-row-end'.
ast.target: 'grid-row-start' 和 'grid-row-end' 的简写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the gutters between grid rows. Replaced by 'row-gap' property.
ast.target: 指定网格行之间的间距。已被 'row-gap' 属性取代。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets all three properties to their initial values.
ast.target: 将所有三个属性设置为其初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets 'grid-template-rows' and 'grid-template-columns' to 'subgrid', and 'grid-template-areas' to its initial value.
ast.target: 将 'grid-template-rows' 和 'grid-template-columns' 设置为 'subgrid'，并将 'grid-template-areas' 设置为其初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents a repeated fragment of the track list, allowing a large number of columns or rows that exhibit a recurring pattern to be written in a more compact form.
ast.target: 表示轨道列表的重复片段，允许以更紧凑的形式编写大量表现出重复模式的列或行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for setting grid-template-columns, grid-template-rows, and grid-template-areas in a single declaration.
ast.target: 在单个声明中设置 grid-template-columns、grid-template-rows 和 grid-template-areas 的简写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The grid container doesn't define any named grid areas.
ast.target: 网格容器不定义任何命名网格区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies named grid areas, which are not associated with any particular grid item, but can be referenced from the grid-placement properties.
ast.target: 指定命名网格区域，这些区域不与任何特定网格项关联，但可以从网格放置属性中引用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: There is no explicit grid; any rows/columns will be implicitly generated.
ast.target: 没有显式网格；任何行/列都将隐式生成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the grid will align to its parent grid in that axis.
ast.target: 表示网格将在该轴上与其父网格对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: specifies, as a space-separated track list, the line names and track sizing functions of the grid.
ast.target: 以空格分隔的轨道列表形式指定网格的线名和轨道大小函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The height depends on the values of other properties.
ast.target: 高度取决于其他属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the fit-content inline size or fit-content block size, as appropriate to the writing mode.
ast.target: 根据书写模式，使用 fit-content 行内尺寸或 fit-content 块尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the max-content inline size or max-content block size, as appropriate to the writing mode.
ast.target: 根据书写模式，使用 max-content 行内尺寸或 max-content 块尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the min-content inline size or min-content block size, as appropriate to the writing mode.
ast.target: 根据书写模式，使用 min-content 行内尺寸或 min-content 块尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the height of the content area, padding area or border area (depending on 'box-sizing') of certain boxes.
ast.target: 指定某些框的内容区域、内边距区域或边框区域的高度（取决于 'box-sizing'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Conditional hyphenation characters inside a word, if present, take priority over automatic resources when determining hyphenation points within the word.
ast.target: 单词内的条件连字符字符（如果存在）在确定单词内的断字点时优先于自动资源。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Words are only broken at line breaks where there are characters inside the word that suggest line break opportunities
ast.target: 单词仅在行中断处断开，且单词内存在建议断行机会的字符时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Words are not broken at line breaks, even if characters inside the word suggest line break points.
ast.target: 单词不在行中断处断开，即使单词内存在建议断行点的字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls whether hyphenation is allowed to create more break opportunities within a line of text.
ast.target: 控制是否允许连字符在文本行内创建更多的断行机会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: After rotating by the precededing angle, the image is flipped horizontally. Defaults to 0deg if the angle is ommitted.
ast.target: 在按前述角度旋转后，图像水平翻转。如果省略角度，则默认为 0deg。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the image has an orientation specified in its metadata, such as EXIF, this value computes to the angle that the metadata specifies is necessary to correctly orient the image.
ast.target: 如果图像在其元数据（如 EXIF）中指定了方向，则此值计算为元数据指定正确显示图像所需的角度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies an orthogonal rotation to be applied to an image before it is laid out.
ast.target: 指定在图像布局之前要应用的正交旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image should be scaled with an algorithm that maximizes the appearance of the image.
ast.target: 应使用最大化图像外观的算法来缩放图像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The image must be scaled with an algorithm that preserves contrast and edges in the image, and which does not smooth colors or introduce blur to the image in the process.
ast.target: 必须使用保留图像中对比度和边缘的算法来缩放图像，并且在此过程中不会平滑颜色或引入模糊。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When scaling the image up, the 'nearest neighbor' or similar algorithm must be used, so that the image appears to be simply composed of very large pixels.
ast.target: 放大图像时，必须使用“最近邻”或类似算法，使图像看起来仅由非常大的像素组成。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides a hint to the user-agent about what aspects of an image are most important to preserve when the image is scaled, to aid the user-agent in the choice of an appropriate scaling algorithm.
ast.target: 为用户代理提供关于在缩放图像时保留图像哪些方面最重要的提示，以帮助用户代理选择合适的缩放算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The input method editor is initially active; text entry is performed using it unless the user specifically dismisses it.
ast.target: 输入法编辑器最初处于活动状态；除非用户特别关闭它，否则将使用它进行文本输入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No change is made to the current input method editor state. This is the default.
ast.target: 不对当前输入法编辑器状态进行任何更改。这是默认值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The input method editor is disabled and may not be activated by the user.
ast.target: 输入法编辑器被禁用，用户可能无法激活它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The input method editor is initially inactive, but the user may activate it if they wish.
ast.target: 输入法编辑器初始处于非活动状态，但用户可以根据需要激活它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The IME state should be normal; this value can be used in a user style sheet to override the page setting.
ast.target: 输入法状态应为正常；此值可用于用户样式表中以覆盖页面设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the state of the input method editor for text fields.
ast.target: 控制文本字段的输入法编辑器状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Size of an element in the direction specified by 'writing-mode'.
ast.target: 元素在 'writing-mode' 指定方向上的尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Elements are not isolated unless an operation is applied that causes the creation of a stacking context.
ast.target: 除非应用了导致创建层叠上下文的操作，否则元素不会被隔离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In CSS will turn the element into a stacking context.
ast.target: 在 CSS 中，这会将元素转变为一个层叠上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In CSS setting to 'isolate' will turn the element into a stacking context. In SVG, it defines whether an element is isolated or not.
ast.target: 在 CSS 中，设置为 'isolate' 会将元素转变为一个层叠上下文。在 SVG 中，它定义元素是否被隔离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flex items are packed toward the center of the line.
ast.target: 弹性项目向行的中心对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The items are packed flush to each other toward the start edge of the alignment container in the main axis.
ast.target: 项目在主轴方向上紧密排列，朝向对齐容器的起始边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The items are packed flush to each other toward the end edge of the alignment container in the main axis.
ast.target: 项目在主轴方向上紧密排列，朝向对齐容器的结束边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The items are packed flush to each other toward the left edge of the alignment container in the main axis.
ast.target: 项目在主轴方向上紧密排列，朝向对齐容器的左边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The items are packed flush to each other toward the right edge of the alignment container in the main axis.
ast.target: 项目在主轴方向上紧密排列，朝向对齐容器的右边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the size of the item overflows the alignment container, the item is instead aligned as if the alignment mode were start.
ast.target: 如果项目的尺寸溢出对齐容器，则该项目将按照对齐模式为 start 的方式进行对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Regardless of the relative sizes of the item and alignment container, the given alignment value is honored.
ast.target: 无论项目和对齐容器的相对尺寸如何，都会遵循给定的对齐值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The items are evenly distributed within the alignment container along the main axis.
ast.target: 项目在对齐容器内沿主轴均匀分布。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flex items are packed toward the end of the line.
ast.target: 弹性项目向行的末尾对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flex items are packed toward the start of the line.
ast.target: 弹性项目向行的开头对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flex items are evenly distributed in the line, with half-size spaces on either end.
ast.target: 弹性项目在行内均匀分布，两端各有半尺寸的间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flex items are evenly distributed in the line.
ast.target: 弹性项目在行内均匀分布。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies participation in first-baseline alignment.
ast.target: 指定参与首基线对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies participation in last-baseline alignment.
ast.target: 指定参与末基线对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns flex items along the main axis of the current line of the flex container.
ast.target: 沿弹性容器当前行的主轴对齐弹性项目。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the user agent should adjust inter-glyph spacing based on kerning tables that are included in the font that will be used.
ast.target: 指示用户代理应根据所用字体中包含的字距调整表来调整字形间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates whether the user agent should adjust inter-glyph spacing based on kerning tables that are included in the relevant font or instead disable auto-kerning and set inter-character spacing to a specific length.
ast.target: 指示用户代理是应根据相关字体中包含的字距调整表来调整字形间距，还是应禁用自动字距调整并将字符间距设置为特定长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how far an absolutely positioned box's left margin edge is offset to the right of the left edge of the box's 'containing block'.
ast.target: 指定绝对定位框的左外边距边缘相对于其包含块左边缘向右偏移的距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The spacing is the normal spacing for the current font. It is typically zero-length.
ast.target: 间距是当前字体的正常间距。通常为零长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the minimum, maximum, and optimal spacing between grapheme clusters.
ast.target: 指定字素簇之间的最小、最大和最佳间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the color of the light source for filter primitives 'feDiffuseLighting' and 'feSpecularLighting'.
ast.target: 定义滤镜基元 'feDiffuseLighting' 和 'feSpecularLighting' 的光源颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA determines the set of line-breaking restrictions to use for CJK scripts, and it may vary the restrictions based on the length of the line; e.g., use a less restrictive set of line-break rules for short lines.
ast.target: 用户代理确定用于 CJK 脚本的换行限制集，并且它可能会根据行的长度改变限制；例如，对短行使用限制较少的换行规则集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks text using the least restrictive set of line-breaking rules. Typically used for short lines, such as in newspapers.
ast.target: 使用限制最少的换行规则集来断行文本。通常用于短行，例如在报纸中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks text using the most common set of line-breaking rules.
ast.target: 使用最常见的换行规则集来断行文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks CJK scripts using a more restrictive set of line-breaking rules than 'normal'.
ast.target: 使用比 'normal' 更严格的换行规则集来断行 CJK 脚本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies what set of line breaking restrictions are in effect within the element.
ast.target: 指定元素内生效的换行限制集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tells user agents to set the computed value to a 'reasonable' value based on the font size of the element.
ast.target: 指示用户代理根据元素的字体大小将计算值设置为“合理”的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the block-progression dimension of the text content area of an inline box.
ast.target: 确定内联框文本内容区域的块级进展维度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hollow circle.
ast.target: 一个空心圆。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A filled circle.
ast.target: 一个实心圆。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The marker box is outside the principal block box, as described in the section on the ::marker pseudo-element below.
ast.target: 标记框位于主块框外部，如下文关于 ::marker 伪元素的部分所述。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::marker pseudo-element is an inline element placed immediately before all ::before pseudo-elements in the principal block box, after which the element's content flows.
ast.target: ::marker 伪元素是一个内联元素，位于主块框中所有 ::before 伪元素之前，之后是元素的内容流。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A filled square.
ast.target: 一个实心方块。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows a counter style to be defined inline.
ast.target: 允许内联定义计数器样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for setting 'list-style-type', 'list-style-position' and 'list-style-image'
ast.target: 设置 'list-style-type'、'list-style-position' 和 'list-style-image' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The default contents of the of the list item's marker are given by 'list-style-type' instead.
ast.target: 列表项标记的默认内容由 'list-style-type' 给出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the image that will be used as the list item marker. When the image is available, it will replace the marker set with the 'list-style-type' marker.
ast.target: 设置将用作列表项标记的图像。当图像可用时，它将替换通过 'list-style-type' 设置的标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the position of the '::marker' pseudo-element's box in the list item.
ast.target: 指定列表项中 '::marker' 伪元素框的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Traditional uppercase Armenian numbering.
ast.target: 传统的大写亚美尼亚数字编号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Western decimal numbers.
ast.target: 西方十进制数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Decimal numbers padded by initial zeros.
ast.target: 用前导零填充的十进制数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Traditional Georgian numbering.
ast.target: 传统的格鲁吉亚数字编号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lowercase ASCII letters.
ast.target: 小写 ASCII 字母。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lowercase classical Greek.
ast.target: 小写古典希腊语。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lowercase ASCII Roman numerals.
ast.target: 小写 ASCII 罗马数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No marker
ast.target: 无标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Uppercase ASCII letters.
ast.target: 大写 ASCII 字母。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Uppercase ASCII Roman numerals.
ast.target: 大写 ASCII 罗马数字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used to construct the default contents of a list item's marker
ast.target: 用于构造列表项标记的默认内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'margin-bottom'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'margin-bottom'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'margin-top'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'margin-top'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'margin-right'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'margin-right'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'margin-left'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'margin-left'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that no marker symbol will be drawn at the given vertex or vertices.
ast.target: 指示在给定顶点处不会绘制标记符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the <marker> element referenced will be used.
ast.target: 指示将使用引用的 <marker> 元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the marker symbol that shall be used for all points on the sets the value for all vertices on the given 'path' element or basic shape.
ast.target: 指定将用于给定 'path' 元素或基本形状上所有顶点的标记符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the marker that will be drawn at the last vertices of the given markable element.
ast.target: 指定将绘制在给定可标记元素最后一个顶点处的标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the marker that will be drawn at all vertices except the first and last.
ast.target: 指定将绘制在除第一个和最后一个顶点之外的所有顶点处的标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the marker that will be drawn at the first vertices of the given markable element.
ast.target: 指定将绘制在给定可标记元素第一个顶点处的标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Counts as a transparent black image layer.
ast.target: 计为一个透明的黑色图像层。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference to a <mask element or to a CSS image.
ast.target: 对 <mask> 元素或 CSS 图像的引用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the mask layer image of an element.
ast.target: 设置元素的遮罩层图像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alpha values of the mask layer image should be used as the mask values.
ast.target: 遮罩层图像的 Alpha 值应用作遮罩值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use alpha values if 'mask-image' is an image, luminance if a <mask> element or a CSS image.
ast.target: 如果 'mask-image' 是图像则使用 Alpha 值，如果是 <mask> 元素或 CSS 图像则使用亮度值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Luminance values of the mask layer image should be used as the mask values.
ast.target: 遮罩层图像的亮度值应用作遮罩值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates whether the mask layer image is treated as luminance mask or alpha mask.
ast.target: 指示遮罩层图像是被视为亮度遮罩还是 Alpha 遮罩。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the mask positioning area.
ast.target: 指定遮罩定位区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how mask layer images are positioned.
ast.target: 指定遮罩层图像的定位方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how mask layer images are tiled after they have been sized and positioned.
ast.target: 指定遮罩层图像在调整大小和定位后如何平铺。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the size of the mask layer images.
ast.target: 指定遮罩层图像的尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the alpha values of the mask should be used.
ast.target: 指示应使用遮罩的 Alpha 值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the luminance values of the mask should be used.
ast.target: 指示应使用遮罩的亮度值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines whether the content of the <mask> element is treated as as luminance mask or alpha mask.
ast.target: 定义 <mask> 元素的内容是被视为亮度遮罩还是 Alpha 遮罩。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No limit on the width of the box.
ast.target: 对框的宽度没有限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum size of an element in the direction opposite that of the direction specified by 'writing-mode'.
ast.target: 元素在 'writing-mode' 指定方向的相反方向上的最大尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No limit on the height of the box.
ast.target: 对框的高度没有限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows authors to constrain content height to a certain range.
ast.target: 允许作者将内容高度约束在一定范围内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Maximum size of an element in the direction specified by 'writing-mode'.
ast.target: 元素在 'writing-mode' 指定方向上的最大尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows authors to constrain content width to a certain range.
ast.target: 允许作者将内容宽度约束在一定范围内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Minimal size of an element in the direction opposite that of the direction specified by 'writing-mode'.
ast.target: 元素在 'writing-mode' 指定方向的相反方向上的最小尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Minimal size of an element in the direction specified by 'writing-mode'.
ast.target: 元素在 'writing-mode' 指定方向上的最小尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the formula that must be used to mix the colors with the backdrop.
ast.target: 定义必须用于将颜色与背景混合的公式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No motion path gets created.
ast.target: 不创建运动路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines an SVG path as a string, with optional 'fill-rule' as the first argument.
ast.target: 将 SVG 路径定义为字符串，第一个参数可选为 'fill-rule'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the object is rotated by the angle of the direction of the motion path.
ast.target: 指示对象按运动路径方向的角度旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the object is rotated by the angle of the direction of the motion path plus 180 degrees.
ast.target: 指示对象按运动路径方向的角度加上 180 度旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for setting 'motion-path', 'motion-offset' and 'motion-rotation'.
ast.target: 设置 'motion-path'、'motion-offset' 和 'motion-rotation' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A distance that describes the position along the specified motion path.
ast.target: 描述沿指定运动路径位置的距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the motion path the element gets positioned at.
ast.target: 指定元素定位的运动路径。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the direction of the element while positioning along the motion path.
ast.target: 定义元素沿运动路径定位时的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes how the animation will progress over one cycle of its duration. See the 'transition-timing-function'.
ast.target: 描述动画在其持续时间的一个周期内将如何进展。参见 'transition-timing-function'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used in Gecko (Firefox) to display an element using a platform-native styling based on the operating system's theme.
ast.target: 在 Gecko（Firefox）中使用，用于基于操作系统主题以平台原生样式显示元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In Gecko-based applications like Firefox, the -moz-background-inline-policy CSS property specifies how the background image of an inline element is determined when the content of the inline element wraps onto multiple lines. The choice of position has significant effects on repetition.
ast.target: 在基于 Gecko 的应用程序（如 Firefox）中，-moz-background-inline-policy CSS 属性指定了当内联元素的内容换行到多行时，其背景图像的确定方式。位置的选择对重复效果有显著影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets a list of colors for the bottom border.
ast.target: 设置底部边框的颜色列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ske Firefox, -moz-border-bottom-colors sets a list of colors for the bottom border.
ast.target: 在 Firefox 中，-moz-border-bottom-colors 设置底部边框的颜色列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any extra space is divided evenly, with half placed above the child and the other half placed after the child.
ast.target: 任何额外空间将被平均分配，一半放在子元素之前，另一半放在子元素之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For normal direction boxes, the bottom edge of each child is placed along the bottom of the box. Extra space is placed above the element. For reverse direction boxes, the top edge of each child is placed along the top of the box. Extra space is placed below the element.
ast.target: 对于正常方向的盒子，每个子元素的底边沿盒子底部放置。额外空间放在元素上方。对于反向方向的盒子，每个子元素的顶边沿盒子顶部放置。额外空间放在元素下方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For normal direction boxes, the top edge of each child is placed along the top of the box. Extra space is placed below the element. For reverse direction boxes, the bottom edge of each child is placed along the bottom of the box. Extra space is placed above the element.
ast.target: 对于正常方向的盒子，每个子元素的顶边沿盒子顶部放置。额外空间放在元素下方。对于反向方向的盒子，每个子元素的底边沿盒子底部放置。额外空间放在元素上方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The height of each child is adjusted to that of the containing block.
ast.target: 每个子元素的高度被调整为包含块的高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how a XUL box aligns its contents across (perpendicular to) the direction of its layout. The effect of this is only visible if there is extra space in the box.
ast.target: 指定 XUL 盒子如何在其布局方向上（垂直于）对齐其内容。此效果仅在盒子中存在额外空间时可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A box with a computed value of horizontal for box-orient displays its children from left to right. A box with a computed value of vertical displays its children from top to bottom.
ast.target: 一个 box-orient 计算值为 horizontal 的盒子，其子元素从左到右显示。一个 box-orient 计算值为 vertical 的盒子，其子元素从上到下显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A box with a computed value of horizontal for box-orient displays its children from right to left. A box with a computed value of vertical displays its children from bottom to top.
ast.target: 一个 box-orient 计算值为 horizontal 的盒子，其子元素从右到左显示。一个 box-orient 计算值为 vertical 的盒子，其子元素从下到上显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether a box lays out its contents normally (from the top or left edge), or in reverse (from the bottom or right edge).
ast.target: 指定盒子是正常布局其内容（从顶部或左边缘开始），还是反向布局（从底部或右边缘开始）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how a box grows to fill the box that contains it, in the direction of the containing box's layout.
ast.target: 指定盒子如何在其包含盒子的布局方向上增长以填充其所在盒子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flexible elements can be assigned to flex groups using the 'box-flex-group' property.
ast.target: 可以使用 'box-flex-group' 属性将弹性元素分配给弹性组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates the ordinal group the element belongs to. Elements with a lower ordinal group are displayed before those with a higher ordinal group.
ast.target: 指示元素所属的序数组。序数较低的元素显示在序数较高的元素之前。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Elements are oriented along the box's axis.
ast.target: 元素沿盒子的轴线定向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box displays its children from left to right in a horizontal line.
ast.target: 盒子将其子元素从左到右水平排列显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Elements are oriented vertically.
ast.target: 元素垂直定向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box displays its children from stacked from top to bottom vertically.
ast.target: 盒子将其子元素从上到下垂直堆叠显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In Mozilla applications, -moz-box-orient specifies whether a box lays out its contents horizontally or vertically.
ast.target: 在 Mozilla 应用程序中，-moz-box-orient 指定盒子是水平还是垂直布局其内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The extra space is divided evenly, with half placed before the first child and the other half placed after the last child.
ast.target: 额外空间被平均分配，一半放在第一个子元素之前，另一半放在最后一个子元素之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For normal direction boxes, the right edge of the last child is placed at the right side, with all extra space placed before the first child. For reverse direction boxes, the left edge of the first child is placed at the left side, with all extra space placed after the last child.
ast.target: 对于正常方向的盒子，最后一个子元素的右边缘放置在右侧，所有额外空间放在第一个子元素之前。对于反向方向的盒子，第一个子元素的左边缘放置在左侧，所有额外空间放在最后一个子元素之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The space is divided evenly in-between each child, with none of the extra space placed before the first child or after the last child. If there is only one child, treat the pack value as if it were start.
ast.target: 空间在每个子元素之间平均分配，第一个子元素之前或最后一个子元素之后没有额外空间。如果只有一个子元素，则将 pack 值视为 start。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For normal direction boxes, the left edge of the first child is placed at the left side, with all extra space placed after the last child. For reverse direction boxes, the right edge of the last child is placed at the right side, with all extra space placed before the first child.
ast.target: 对于正常方向的盒子，第一个子元素的左边缘放置在左侧，所有额外空间放在最后一个子元素之后。对于反向方向的盒子，最后一个子元素的右边缘放置在右侧，所有额外空间放在第一个子元素之前。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how a box packs its contents in the direction of its layout. The effect of this is only visible if there is extra space in the box.
ast.target: 指定盒子如何在其布局方向上打包其内容。此效果仅在盒子中存在额外空间时可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The specified width and height (and respective min/max properties) on this element determine the padding box of the element.
ast.target: 此元素上指定的宽度和高度（以及相应的 min/max 属性）决定了元素的内边距框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Box Model addition in CSS3.
ast.target: CSS3 中的盒模型扩展。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property describes the width of columns in multicol elements.
ast.target: 此属性描述了多列元素中列的宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No perspective transform is applied.
ast.target: 不应用透视变换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies the same transform as the perspective(<number>) transform function, except that it applies only to the positioned or transformed children of the element, not to the transform on the element itself.
ast.target: 应用与 perspective(<number>) 变换函数相同的变换，不同之处在于它仅应用于元素的定位或变换的子元素，而不应用于元素本身的变换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Establishes the origin for the perspective property. It effectively sets the X and Y position at which the viewer appears to be looking at the children of the element.
ast.target: 为 perspective 属性建立原点。它有效地设置了观看者似乎正在查看元素子元素的 X 和 Y 位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inline contents are centered within the line box.
ast.target: 内联内容在行框内居中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text is justified according to the method specified by the 'text-justify' property.
ast.target: 文本根据 'text-justify' 属性指定的方法进行对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inline contents are aligned to the left edge of the line box. In vertical text, 'left' aligns to the edge of the line box that would be the start edge for left-to-right text.
ast.target: 内联内容与行框的左边缘对齐。在垂直文本中，'left' 对齐到左到右文本的起始边缘所在的行框边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inline contents are aligned to the right edge of the line box. In vertical text, 'right' aligns to the edge of the line box that would be the end edge for left-to-right text.
ast.target: 内联内容与行框的右边缘对齐。在垂直文本中，'right' 对齐到左到右文本的结束边缘所在的行框边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes how the last line of a block or a line right before a forced line break is aligned when 'text-align' is set to 'justify'.
ast.target: 描述当 'text-align' 设置为 'justify' 时，块或强制换行符之前的最后一行文本如何对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the color of text decoration (underlines overlines, and line-throughs) set on the element with text-decoration-line.
ast.target: 指定通过 text-decoration-line 设置在元素上的文本装饰（下划线、上划线和删除线）的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each line of text has a line through the middle.
ast.target: 每行文本中间都有一条线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither produces nor inhibits text decoration.
ast.target: 既不产生也不抑制文本装饰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each line of text has a line above it.
ast.target: 每行文本上方都有一条线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Each line of text is underlined.
ast.target: 每行文本都有下划线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies what line decorations, if any, are added to the element.
ast.target: 指定添加到元素的行装饰（如果有）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces a dashed line style.
ast.target: 产生虚线样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces a dotted line.
ast.target: 产生点线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces a double line.
ast.target: 产生双线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces no line.
ast.target: 不产生线条。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces a solid line.
ast.target: 产生实线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Produces a wavy line.
ast.target: 产生波浪线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the line style for underline, line-through and overline text decoration.
ast.target: 指定下划线、删除线和上划线文本装饰的线条样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Renderers must use the default size adjustment when displaying on a small device.
ast.target: 在小型设备上显示时，渲染器必须使用默认的大小调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Renderers must not do size adjustment when displaying on a small device.
ast.target: 在小型设备上显示时，渲染器不得进行大小调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a size adjustment for displaying text content in mobile browsers.
ast.target: 指定在移动浏览器中显示文本内容时的大小调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 2D transformation in the form of a transformation matrix of six values. matrix(a,b,c,d,e,f) is equivalent to applying the transformation matrix [a b c d e f]
ast.target: 以六个值的变换矩阵形式指定 2D 变换。matrix(a,b,c,d,e,f) 等同于应用变换矩阵 [a b c d e f]。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 3D transformation as a 4x4 homogeneous matrix of 16 values in column-major order.
ast.target: 以列优先顺序的 16 个值的 4x4 齐次矩阵形式指定 3D 变换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a perspective projection matrix.
ast.target: 指定透视投影矩阵。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 2D rotation by the angle specified in the parameter about the origin of the element, as defined by the transform-origin property.
ast.target: 指定围绕由 transform-origin 属性定义的元素原点，按参数中指定的角度进行 2D 旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a clockwise 3D rotation by the angle specified in last parameter about the [x,y,z] direction vector described by the first 3 parameters.
ast.target: 指定围绕由前 3 个参数描述的 [x,y,z] 方向向量，按最后一个参数指定的角度进行顺时针 3D 旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a clockwise rotation by the given angle about the X axis.
ast.target: 指定围绕 X 轴按给定角度进行顺时针旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a clockwise rotation by the given angle about the Y axis.
ast.target: 指定围绕 Y 轴按给定角度进行顺时针旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a clockwise rotation by the given angle about the Z axis.
ast.target: 指定围绕 Z 轴按给定角度进行顺时针旋转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 2D scale operation by the [sx,sy] scaling vector described by the 2 parameters. If the second parameter is not provided, it is takes a value equal to the first.
ast.target: 指定由 2 个参数描述的 [sx,sy] 缩放向量进行 2D 缩放操作。如果未提供第二个参数，则其值等于第一个参数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 3D scale operation by the [sx,sy,sz] scaling vector described by the 3 parameters.
ast.target: 指定由 3 个参数描述的 [sx,sy,sz] 缩放向量进行 3D 缩放操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a scale operation using the [sx,1] scaling vector, where sx is given as the parameter.
ast.target: 指定使用 [sx,1] 缩放向量的缩放操作，其中 sx 作为参数给出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a scale operation using the [sy,1] scaling vector, where sy is given as the parameter.
ast.target: 指定使用 [sy,1] 缩放向量的缩放操作，其中 sy 作为参数给出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a scale operation using the [1,1,sz] scaling vector, where sz is given as the parameter.
ast.target: 指定使用 [1,1,sz] 缩放向量的缩放操作，其中 sz 作为参数给出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a skew transformation along the X and Y axes. The first angle parameter specifies the skew on the X axis. The second angle parameter specifies the skew on the Y axis. If the second parameter is not given then a value of 0 is used for the Y angle (ie: no skew on the Y axis).
ast.target: 指定沿 X 轴和 Y 轴的倾斜变换。第一个角度参数指定 X 轴上的倾斜。第二个角度参数指定 Y 轴上的倾斜。如果未给出第二个参数，则 Y 轴角度使用值 0（即：Y 轴上无倾斜）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a skew transformation along the X axis by the given angle.
ast.target: 指定沿 X 轴按给定角度进行倾斜变换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a skew transformation along the Y axis by the given angle.
ast.target: 指定沿 Y 轴按给定角度进行倾斜变换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 2D translation by the vector [tx, ty], where tx is the first translation-value parameter and ty is the optional second translation-value parameter.
ast.target: 指定由向量 [tx, ty] 进行的 2D 平移，其中 tx 是第一个平移值参数，ty 是可选的第二个平移值参数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a 3D translation by the vector [tx,ty,tz], with tx, ty and tz being the first, second and third translation-value parameters respectively.
ast.target: 指定由向量 [tx,ty,tz] 进行的 3D 平移，其中 tx、ty 和 tz 分别是第一个、第二个和第三个平移值参数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a translation by the given amount in the X direction.
ast.target: 指定在 X 方向上按给定量进行平移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a translation by the given amount in the Y direction.
ast.target: 指定在 Y 方向上按给定量进行平移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a translation by the given amount in the Z direction. Note that percentage values are not allowed in the translateZ translation-value, and if present are evaluated as 0.
ast.target: 指定在 Z 方向上按给定量进行平移。请注意，百分比值在 translateZ 平移值中不允许，如果存在则计算为 0。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A two-dimensional transformation is applied to an element through the 'transform' property. This property contains a list of transform functions similar to those allowed by SVG.
ast.target: 通过 'transform' 属性将二维变换应用于元素。此属性包含一系列变换函数，类似于 SVG 所允许的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Establishes the origin of transformation for an element.
ast.target: 为元素建立变换原点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Every property that is able to undergo a transition will do so.
ast.target: 每个能够进行过渡的属性都将进行过渡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No property will transition.
ast.target: 没有属性会进行过渡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property combines four of the transition properties into a single property.
ast.target: 简写属性将四个过渡属性合并为一个属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines when the transition will start. It allows a transition to begin execution some period of time from when it is applied.
ast.target: 定义过渡何时开始。它允许过渡在应用后的一段时间后开始执行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how long the transition from the old value to the new value should take.
ast.target: 指定从旧值过渡到新值所需的时间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the name of the CSS property to which the transition is applied.
ast.target: 指定应用过渡的 CSS 属性的名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes how the intermediate values used during a transition will be calculated.
ast.target: 描述过渡期间使用的中间值将如何计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used to indicate whether the element can have focus.
ast.target: 用于指示元素是否可以获得焦点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the appearance of selection.
ast.target: 控制选择的外观。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element does not contain an accelerator key sequence.
ast.target: 该元素不包含加速键序列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element contains an accelerator key sequence.
ast.target: 该元素包含加速键序列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: IE only. Has the ability to turn off its system underlines for accelerator keys until the ALT key is pressed
ast.target: 仅限 IE。能够关闭其加速键的系统下划线，直到按下 ALT 键。

ast.name: description
ast.source: IE only. Used to extend behaviors of the browser
ast.target: 仅限 IE。用于扩展浏览器的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Bottom-to-top block flow. Layout is horizontal.
ast.target: 从下到上的块流。布局是水平的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Left-to-right direction. The flow orientation is vertical.
ast.target: 从左到右的方向。流向是垂直的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right-to-left direction. The flow orientation is vertical.
ast.target: 从右到左的方向。流向是垂直的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Top-to-bottom direction. The flow orientation is horizontal.
ast.target: 从上到下的方向。流向是水平的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the block-progression value and the flow orientation
ast.target: 设置块进展值和流向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The nearest zoomable parent element begins zooming when the user hits a zoom limit during a manipulation. No bounce effect is shown.
ast.target: 当用户在操作过程中达到缩放限制时，最近的可缩放父元素开始缩放。不显示弹跳效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A bounce effect is shown when the user hits a zoom limit during a manipulation.
ast.target: 当用户在操作过程中达到缩放限制时，会显示弹跳效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the zoom behavior that occurs when a user hits the zoom limit during a manipulation.
ast.target: 指定当用户在操作过程中达到缩放限制时发生的缩放行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element is not zoomable.
ast.target: 该元素不可缩放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element is zoomable.
ast.target: 该元素可缩放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether zooming is enabled.
ast.target: 指定是否启用缩放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for the -ms-content-zoom-limit-min and -ms-content-zoom-limit-max properties.
ast.target: -ms-content-zoom-limit-min 和 -ms-content-zoom-limit-max 属性的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the maximum zoom factor.
ast.target: 指定最大缩放因子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the minimum zoom factor.
ast.target: 指定最小缩放因子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the motion of the content after the contact is picked up is always adjusted so that it lands on a snap-point.
ast.target: 指示在拾取接触点后，内容的运动始终会被调整，使其落在吸附点上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that zooming is unaffected by any defined snap-points.
ast.target: 指示缩放不受任何已定义吸附点的影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the motion of the content after the contact is picked up may be adjusted if the content would normally stop "close enough" to a snap-point.
ast.target: 指示在拾取接触点后，如果内容通常会停止在“足够接近”吸附点的位置，则内容的运动可能会被调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies where the snap-points will be placed.
ast.target: 指定吸附点将被放置的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the position of individual snap-points as a comma-separated list of zoom factors.
ast.target: 以逗号分隔的缩放因子列表形式指定各个吸附点的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for the -ms-content-zoom-snap-type and -ms-content-zoom-snap-points properties.
ast.target: -ms-content-zoom-snap-type 和 -ms-content-zoom-snap-points 属性的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines where zoom snap-points are located.
ast.target: 定义缩放吸附点的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how zooming is affected by defined snap-points.
ast.target: 指定缩放如何受已定义吸附点的影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: IE only. Used to produce visual effects.
ast.target: 仅限 IE。用于产生视觉效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: specifies the parameters of a flexible length: the positive and negative flexibility, and the preferred size.
ast.target: 指定弹性长度的参数：正负弹性以及首选尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The cross-start margin edge of the flexbox item is placed flush with the cross-start edge of the line.
ast.target: 弹性盒项目的交叉起始外边距边缘与行的交叉起始边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the cross size property of the flexbox item is anything other than 'auto', this value is identical to 'start'.
ast.target: 如果弹性盒项目的交叉尺寸属性不是 'auto'，则此值与 'start' 相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the order in which children of a flex container appear within the flex container, by assigning them to ordinal groups.
ast.target: 通过将子项分配到序数组，控制子项在弹性容器内出现的顺序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The block container is not a CSS Region.
ast.target: 块容器不是 CSS 区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Makes a block container a region and associates it with a named flow.
ast.target: 使块容器成为区域，并将其与命名流关联。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element is not moved to a named flow and normal CSS processing takes place.
ast.target: 元素不会移动到命名流中，并进行正常的 CSS 处理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Places an element or its contents into a named flow.
ast.target: 将元素或其内容放入命名流中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used to place grid items and explicitly defined grid cells in the Grid.
ast.target: 用于在网格中放置网格项和明确定义的网格单元格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Places the center of the Grid Item's margin box at the center of the Grid Item's column.
ast.target: 将网格项的外边距框的中心放置在网格项列的中心。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns the end edge of the Grid Item's margin box to the end edge of the Grid Item's column.
ast.target: 将网格项的外边距框的结束边缘与网格项列的结束边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns the starting edge of the Grid Item's margin box to the starting edge of the Grid Item's column.
ast.target: 将网格项的外边距框的起始边缘与网格项列的起始边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ensures that the Grid Item's margin box is equal to the size of the Grid Item's column.
ast.target: 确保网格项的外边距框等于网格项列的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns the columns in a grid.
ast.target: 对齐网格中的列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lays out the columns of the grid.
ast.target: 布局网格的列。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the number of columns to span.
ast.target: 指定要跨越的列数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grid-layer is similar in concept to z-index, but avoids overloading the meaning of the z-index property, which is applicable only to positioned elements.
ast.target: 网格层在概念上类似于 z-index，但避免了 z-index 属性含义的重载，该属性仅适用于定位元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: grid-row is used to place grid items and explicitly defined grid cells in the Grid.
ast.target: grid-row 用于在网格中放置网格项和明确定义的网格单元格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Places the center of the Grid Item's margin box at the center of the Grid Item's row.
ast.target: 将网格项的外边距框的中心放置在网格项行的中心。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns the end edge of the Grid Item's margin box to the end edge of the Grid Item's row.
ast.target: 将网格项的外边距框的结束边缘与网格项行的结束边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns the starting edge of the Grid Item's margin box to the starting edge of the Grid Item's row.
ast.target: 将网格项的外边距框的起始边缘与网格项行的起始边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ensures that the Grid Item's margin box is equal to the size of the Grid Item's row.
ast.target: 确保网格项的外边距框等于网格项行的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns the rows in a grid.
ast.target: 对齐网格中的行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the number of rows to span.
ast.target: 指定要跨越的行数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Properties will be adjusted as applicable.
ast.target: 属性将根据适用情况进行调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No adjustments will be applied.
ast.target: 不应用任何调整。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies if properties should be adjusted in high contrast mode.
ast.target: 指定在高对比度模式下是否应调整属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent chooses a value that adapts to the current layout.
ast.target: 用户代理选择一个适应当前布局的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the minimum number of characters in a hyphenated word.
ast.target: 指定带连字符单词中的最小字符数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: There is no limit.
ast.target: 没有限制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates the maximum number of successive hyphenated lines in an element.
ast.target: 指示元素中连续带连字符行的最大数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the maximum amount of unfilled space (before justification) that may be left in the line box before hyphenation is triggered to pull part of a word from the next line back up into the current line.
ast.target: 指定在触发连字符以将单词的一部分从下一行拉回当前行之前，行框中可能留下的未填充空间的最大量（在对齐之前）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets the interpolation (resampling) method used to stretch images.
ast.target: 获取或设置用于拉伸图像的插值（重采样）方法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any of the range of character values available to the -ms-layout-grid-char property.
ast.target: -ms-layout-grid-char 属性可用的任何字符值范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any of the range of line values available to the -ms-layout-grid-line property.
ast.target: -ms-layout-grid-line 属性可用的任何行值范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any of the range of mode values available to the -ms-layout-grid-mode property.
ast.target: -ms-layout-grid-mode 属性可用的任何模式值范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Any of the range of type values available to the -ms-layout-grid-type property.
ast.target: -ms-layout-grid-type 属性可用的任何类型值范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets or retrieves the composite document grid properties that specify the layout of text characters.
ast.target: 设置或检索指定文本字符布局的复合文档网格属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Largest character in the font of the element is used to set the character grid.
ast.target: 使用元素字体中最大的字符来设置字符网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default. No character grid is set.
ast.target: 默认。不设置字符网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets or retrieves the size of the character grid used for rendering the text content of an element.
ast.target: 设置或检索用于渲染元素文本内容的字符网格的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default. No grid line is set.
ast.target: 默认。不设置网格线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets or retrieves the gridline value used for rendering the text content of an element.
ast.target: 设置或检索用于渲染元素文本内容的网格线值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default. Both the char and line grid modes are enabled. This setting is necessary to fully enable the layout grid on an element.
ast.target: 默认。字符和行网格模式均已启用。此设置对于在元素上完全启用布局网格是必需的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only a character grid is used. This is recommended for use with block-level elements, such as a blockquote, where the line grid is intended to be disabled.
ast.target: 仅使用字符网格。建议用于块级元素，例如 blockquote，其中行网格旨在被禁用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only a line grid is used. This is recommended for use with inline elements, such as a span, to disable the horizontal grid on runs of text that act as a single entity in the grid layout.
ast.target: 仅使用行网格。建议用于内联元素，例如 span，以禁用在网格布局中作为单个实体运行的文本上的水平网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No grid is used.
ast.target: 不使用网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets whether the text layout grid uses two dimensions.
ast.target: 获取或设置文本布局网格是否使用两个维度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grid used for monospaced layout. All noncursive characters are treated as equal; every character is centered within a single grid space by default.
ast.target: 用于等宽布局的网格。所有非草书字符均被视为相等；默认情况下，每个字符都居中于单个网格空间内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Default. Grid used for Japanese and Korean characters.
ast.target: 默认。用于日文和韩文字符的网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grid used for Chinese, as well as Japanese (Genko) and Korean characters. Only the ideographs, kanas, and wide characters are snapped to the grid.
ast.target: 用于中文以及日文（原稿）和韩文字符的网格。只有表意文字、假名和宽字符会吸附到网格。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets or retrieves the type of grid used for rendering the text content of an element.
ast.target: 设置或检索用于渲染元素文本内容的网格类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sequences of CJK characters can no longer break on implied break points. This option should only be used where the presence of word separator characters still creates line-breaking opportunities, as in Korean.
ast.target: CJK 字符序列不再能在隐含的断点处断开。此选项应仅在存在单词分隔符字符仍能产生换行机会的情况下使用，例如在韩语中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks CJK scripts using the least restrictive set of line-breaking rules. Typically used for short lines, such as in newspapers.
ast.target: 使用限制最少的换行规则集来断开 CJK 脚本。通常用于短行，例如在报纸中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks CJK scripts using a normal set of line-breaking rules.
ast.target: 使用常规换行规则集来断开 CJK 脚本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No preference, UA should use the first scrolling method in the list that it supports.
ast.target: 无偏好，用户代理应使用其支持的列表中的第一种滚动方法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates the element displays auto-hiding scrollbars during mouse interactions and panning indicators during touch and keyboard interactions.
ast.target: 指示元素在鼠标交互期间显示自动隐藏的滚动条，在触摸和键盘交互期间显示平移指示器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates the element does not display scrollbars or panning indicators, even when its content overflows.
ast.target: 指示元素不显示滚动条或平移指示器，即使其内容溢出也是如此。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scrollbars are typically narrow strips inserted on one or two edges of an element and which often have arrows to click on and a "thumb" to drag up and down (or left and right) to move the contents of the element.
ast.target: 滚动条通常是插入元素一个或两个边缘的窄条，通常带有可点击的箭头和一个可上下（或左右）拖动的“滑块”来移动元素的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specify whether content is clipped when it overflows the element's content area.
ast.target: 指定当内容溢出元素的内容区域时是否裁剪内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Establishes the origin for the perspective property. It effectively sets the X  position at which the viewer appears to be looking at the children of the element.
ast.target: 为 perspective 属性建立原点。它有效地设置了观看者似乎正在查看元素子项的 X 位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Establishes the origin for the perspective property. It effectively sets the Y position at which the viewer appears to be looking at the children of the element.
ast.target: 为 perspective 属性建立原点。它有效地设置了观看者似乎正在查看元素子项的 Y 位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies whether a progress control displays as a bar or a ring.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定进度控件是显示为条形还是环形。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the top and left edges of the scroll box and scroll arrows of a scroll bar.
ast.target: 确定滚动条的滚动框和滚动箭头的顶部和左边缘的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the arrow elements of a scroll arrow.
ast.target: 确定滚动箭头的箭头元素的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the main elements of a scroll bar, which include the scroll box, track, and scroll arrows.
ast.target: 确定滚动条的主要元素的颜色，包括滚动框、轨道和滚动箭头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the gutter of a scroll bar.
ast.target: 确定滚动条的凹槽的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the scroll box and scroll arrows of a scroll bar.
ast.target: 确定滚动条的滚动框和滚动箭头的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the bottom and right edges of the scroll box and scroll arrows of a scroll bar.
ast.target: 确定滚动条的滚动框和滚动箭头的底部和右边缘的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the color of the track element of a scroll bar.
ast.target: 确定滚动条的轨道元素的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that indicates the scrolling behavior that occurs when a user hits the content boundary during a manipulation.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指示在操作期间用户碰到内容边界时发生的滚动行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a shorthand value that sets values for the -ms-scroll-limit-x-min, -ms-scroll-limit-y-min, -ms-scroll-limit-x-max, and -ms-scroll-limit-y-max properties.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个简写值，用于设置 -ms-scroll-limit-x-min、-ms-scroll-limit-y-min、-ms-scroll-limit-x-max 和 -ms-scroll-limit-y-max 属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies the maximum value for the scrollLeft property.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定 scrollLeft 属性的最大值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies the minimum value for the scrollLeft property.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定 scrollLeft 属性的最小值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies the maximum value for the scrollTop property.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定 scrollTop 属性的最大值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies the minimum value for the scrollTop property.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定 scrollTop 属性的最小值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that defines where snap-points will be located along the x-axis.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值定义吸附点将沿 x 轴放置的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that defines where snap-points will be located along the y-axis.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值定义吸附点将沿 y 轴放置的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The visual viewport of this scroll container must ignore snap points, if any, when scrolled.
ast.target: 此滚动容器的可视视口在滚动时必须忽略吸附点（如果有）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The visual viewport of this scroll container is guaranteed to rest on a snap point when there are no active scrolling operations.
ast.target: 当没有活动的滚动操作时，此滚动容器的可视视口保证停留在吸附点上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The visual viewport of this scroll container may come to rest on a snap point at the termination of a scroll at the discretion of the UA given the parameters of the scroll.
ast.target: 此滚动容器的可视视口在滚动终止时可能会根据用户代理在滚动参数方面的判断停留在吸附点上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that defines what type of snap-point should be used for the current element. There are two type of snap-points, with the primary difference being whether or not the user is guaranteed to always stop on a snap-point.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值定义当前元素应使用何种类型的吸附点。有两种类型的吸附点，主要区别在于用户是否保证始终停留在吸附点上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a shorthand value that sets values for the -ms-scroll-snap-type and -ms-scroll-snap-points-x properties.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个简写值，用于设置 -ms-scroll-snap-type 和 -ms-scroll-snap-points-x 属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a shorthand value that sets values for the -ms-scroll-snap-type and -ms-scroll-snap-points-y properties.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个简写值，用于设置 -ms-scroll-snap-type 和 -ms-scroll-snap-points-y 属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that specifies whether vertical-to-horizontal scroll wheel translation occurs on the specified element.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指定在指定元素上是否发生垂直到水平的滚轮转换。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates 1/4em extra spacing between runs of ideographic letters and non-ideographic letters, such as Latin-based, Cyrillic, Greek, Arabic or Hebrew.
ast.target: 在表意文字字母和非表意文字字母（如基于拉丁语、西里尔语、希腊语、阿拉伯语或希伯来语）的运行之间创建 1/4em 的额外间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates 1/4em extra spacing between runs of ideographic letters and numeric glyphs.
ast.target: 在表意文字字母和数字符号的运行之间创建 1/4em 的额外间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates extra spacing between normal (non wide) parenthesis and ideographs.
ast.target: 在普通（非宽）括号和表意文字之间创建额外间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Extends the width of the space character while surrounded by ideographs.
ast.target: 当空格字符被表意文字包围时，扩展其宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No extra space is created.
ast.target: 不创建额外空间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Creates extra non-breaking spacing around punctuation as required by language-specific typographic conventions.
ast.target: 根据特定语言的排版惯例，在标点符号周围创建必要的额外不间断间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether or not a full-width punctuation mark character should be trimmed if it appears at the beginning of a line, so that its 'ink' lines up with the first glyph in the line above and below.
ast.target: 确定是否应修剪出现在行首的全角标点符号字符，以便其'墨迹'与上下行的第一个字形对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attempt to typeset horizontally all consecutive characters within the box such that they take up the space of a single character within the vertical line box.
ast.target: 尝试将方框内的所有连续字符水平排版，使其在垂直行框中占据单个字符的空间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Attempt to typeset horizontally each maximal sequence of consecutive ASCII digits (U+0030-U+0039) that has as many or fewer characters than the specified integer such that it takes up the space of a single character within the vertical line box.
ast.target: 尝试将每个最大连续ASCII数字序列（U+0030-U+0039）水平排版，其字符数不超过指定整数，使其在垂直行框中占据单个字符的空间。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No special processing.
ast.target: 无特殊处理。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property specifies the combination of multiple characters into the space of a single character.
ast.target: 此属性指定将多个字符组合到单个字符空间中的方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA determines the justification algorithm to follow, based on a balance between performance and adequate presentation quality.
ast.target: 用户代理根据性能与足够呈现质量之间的平衡来确定要遵循的对齐算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Justification primarily changes spacing both at word separators and at grapheme cluster boundaries in all scripts except those in the connected and cursive groups. This value is sometimes used in e.g. Japanese, often with the 'text-align-last' property.
ast.target: 对齐主要改变除连接体和草书体组之外的所有文字中单词分隔符和字素簇边界处的间距。此值有时用于例如日语，通常与'text-align-last'属性一起使用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Justification primarily changes spacing at word separators and at grapheme cluster boundaries in clustered scripts. This value is typically used for Southeast Asian scripts such as Thai.
ast.target: 对齐主要改变聚类文字中单词分隔符和字素簇边界处的间距。此值通常用于东南亚文字，如泰语。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Justification primarily changes spacing at word separators and at inter-graphemic boundaries in scripts that use no word spaces. This value is typically used for CJK languages.
ast.target: 对齐主要改变不使用单词空格的文字中单词分隔符和字素间边界处的间距。此值通常用于中日韩语言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Justification primarily changes spacing at word separators. This value is typically used for languages that separate words using spaces, like English or (sometimes) Korean.
ast.target: 对齐主要改变单词分隔符处的间距。此值通常用于使用空格分隔单词的语言，如英语或（有时）韩语。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Justification primarily stretches Arabic and related scripts through the use of kashida or other calligraphic elongation.
ast.target: 对齐主要通过使用卡希达或其他书法延伸来拉伸阿拉伯语及相关文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Selects the justification algorithm used when 'text-align' is set to 'justify'. The property applies to block containers, but the UA may (but is not required to) also support it on inline elements.
ast.target: 选择当'text-align'设置为'justify'时使用的对齐算法。该属性适用于块容器，但用户代理也可以（但不是必须）在内联元素上支持它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets or retrieves the ratio of kashida expansion to white space expansion when justifying lines of text in the object.
ast.target: 设置或检索在对象中对齐文本行时，卡希达扩展与空白扩展的比率。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Clip inline content that overflows. Characters may be only partially rendered.
ast.target: 裁剪溢出的内联内容。字符可能仅部分渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Render an ellipsis character (U+2026) to represent clipped inline content.
ast.target: 渲染省略号字符（U+2026）以表示被裁剪的内联内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text can overflow for example when it is prevented from wrapping
ast.target: 文本可能溢出，例如当它被阻止换行时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The underline is aligned with the alphabetic baseline. In this case the underline is likely to cross some descenders.
ast.target: 下划线与字母基线对齐。在这种情况下，下划线可能会穿过一些下行字母。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent may use any algorithm to determine the underline's position. In horizontal line layout, the underline should be aligned as for alphabetic. In vertical line layout, if the language is set to Japanese or Korean, the underline should be aligned as for over.
ast.target: 用户代理可以使用任何算法来确定下划线的位置。在水平行布局中，下划线应与字母基线对齐。在垂直行布局中，如果语言设置为日语或韩语，下划线应与上划线对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The underline is aligned with the 'top' (right in vertical writing) edge of the element's em-box. In this mode, an overline also switches sides.
ast.target: 下划线与元素的em框的'顶部'（垂直书写时为右侧）边缘对齐。在此模式下，上划线也会切换边。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The underline is aligned with the 'bottom' (left in vertical writing) edge of the element's em-box. In this case the underline usually does not cross the descenders. This is sometimes called 'accounting' underline.
ast.target: 下划线与元素的em框的'底部'（垂直书写时为左侧）边缘对齐。在这种情况下，下划线通常不会穿过下行字母。这有时被称为'会计'下划线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element is a passive element, with several exceptions.
ast.target: 该元素是一个被动元素，但有几个例外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element will zoom on double-tap.
ast.target: 该元素将在双击时缩放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element is a manipulation-causing element.
ast.target: 该元素是一个引起操作的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element is a manipulation-blocking element.
ast.target: 该元素是一个阻止操作的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element permits touch-driven panning on the horizontal axis. The touch pan is performed on the nearest ancestor with horizontally scrollable content.
ast.target: 该元素允许在水平轴上进行触摸驱动的平移。触摸平移在具有水平可滚动内容的最近祖先上执行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element permits touch-driven panning on the vertical axis. The touch pan is performed on the nearest ancestor with vertically scrollable content.
ast.target: 该元素允许在垂直轴上进行触摸驱动的平移。触摸平移在具有垂直可滚动内容的最近祖先上执行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element permits pinch-zooming. The pinch-zoom is performed on the nearest ancestor with zoomable content.
ast.target: 该元素允许捏合缩放。捏合缩放在具有可缩放内容的最近祖先上执行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether and how a given region can be manipulated by the user.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值指示给定区域是否以及如何被用户操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grippers are always on.
ast.target: 夹点始终开启。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Grippers are always off.
ast.target: 夹点始终关闭。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that toggles the 'gripper' visual elements that enable touch text selection.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，该值切换启用触摸文本选择的'夹点'视觉元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The x coordinate of the origin for transforms applied to an element with respect to its border box.
ast.target: 应用于元素的变换原点的x坐标，相对于其边框盒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The y coordinate of the origin for transforms applied to an element with respect to its border box.
ast.target: 应用于元素的变换原点的y坐标，相对于其边框盒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The z coordinate of the origin for transforms applied to an element with respect to its border box.
ast.target: 应用于元素的变换原点的z坐标，相对于其边框盒。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lines may break between any two grapheme clusters for non-CJK scripts.
ast.target: 对于非中日韩文字，行可以在任何两个字素簇之间断开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Block characters can no longer create implied break points.
ast.target: 块字符不能再创建隐含的断点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Breaks non-CJK scripts according to their own rules.
ast.target: 根据非中日韩文字自身的规则断行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies line break opportunities for non-CJK scripts.
ast.target: 指定非中日韩文字的换行机会。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An unbreakable 'word' may be broken at an arbitrary point if there are no otherwise-acceptable break points in the line.
ast.target: 如果行中没有其他可接受的断点，则不可断开的'单词'可以在任意点断开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lines may break only at allowed break points.
ast.target: 行只能在允许的断点处断开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether the UA may break within a word to prevent overflow when an otherwise-unbreakable string is too long to fit.
ast.target: 指定用户代理是否可以在单词内断行以防止溢出，当其他情况下不可断开的字符串太长而无法容纳时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For floats an exclusion is created, for all other elements an exclusion is not created.
ast.target: 对于浮动元素，会创建一个排除区域；对于所有其他元素，则不创建排除区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline flow content can flow on all sides of the exclusion.
ast.target: 内联流内容可以在排除区域的所有边上流动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline flow content can only wrap on top and bottom of the exclusion and must leave the areas to the start and end edges of the exclusion box empty.
ast.target: 内联流内容只能在排除区域的顶部和底部换行，并且必须将排除区域盒的起始和结束边缘区域留空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline flow content can wrap on the end side of the exclusion area but must leave the area to the start edge of the exclusion area empty.
ast.target: 内联流内容可以在排除区域的结束边换行，但必须将排除区域的起始边缘区域留空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline flow content can wrap on the side of the exclusion with the largest available space for the given line, and must leave the other side of the exclusion empty.
ast.target: 内联流内容可以在给定行具有最大可用空间的排除区域边上换行，并且必须将排除区域的另一边留空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline flow content can flow around the edge of the exclusion with the smallest available space within the flow content's containing block, and must leave the other edge of the exclusion empty.
ast.target: 内联流内容可以在流内容包含块内具有最小可用空间的排除区域边缘周围流动，并且必须将排除区域的另一边缘留空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline flow content can wrap on the start edge of the exclusion area but must leave the area to end edge of the exclusion area empty.
ast.target: 内联流内容可以在排除区域的起始边缘换行，但必须将排除区域的结束边缘区域留空。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An element becomes an exclusion when its 'wrap-flow' property has a computed value other than 'auto'.
ast.target: 当元素的 'wrap-flow' 属性计算值不为 'auto' 时，该元素即成为排除区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that is used to offset the inner wrap shape from other shapes.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，用于将内部环绕形状相对于其他形状进行偏移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The exclusion element does not inherit its parent node's wrapping context. Its descendants are only subject to exclusion shapes defined inside the element.
ast.target: 排除元素不继承其父节点的环绕上下文。其后代内容仅受该元素内部定义的排除形状影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The exclusion element inherits its parent node's wrapping context. Its descendant inline content wraps around exclusions defined outside the element.
ast.target: 排除元素继承其父节点的环绕上下文。其后代行内内容会环绕在该元素外部定义的排除区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies if an element inherits its parent wrapping context. In other words if it is subject to the exclusions defined outside the element.
ast.target: 指定元素是否继承其父级的环绕上下文。换言之，即该元素是否受其外部定义的排除区域影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for both 'direction' and 'block-progression'.
ast.target: 'direction' 和 'block-progression' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets or retrieves the magnification scale of the object.
ast.target: 设置或检索对象的放大比例。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gets or sets a value that indicates whether an animation is used when zooming.
ast.target: 获取或设置一个值，指示在缩放时是否使用动画。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent automatically determines which element to navigate the focus to in response to directional navigational input.
ast.target: 用户代理会自动确定在响应方向导航输入时将焦点导航到哪个元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the user agent should target the frame that the element is in.
ast.target: 指示用户代理应将目标定位到元素所在的框架。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the user agent should target the full window.
ast.target: 指示用户代理应将目标定位到整个窗口。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides an way to control directional focus navigation.
ast.target: 提供一种控制方向焦点导航的方法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element's sequential navigation order is assigned automatically by the user agent.
ast.target: 元素的顺序导航顺序由用户代理自动分配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides an input-method-neutral way of specifying the sequential navigation order (also known as 'tabbing order').
ast.target: 提供一种与输入法无关的方式来指定顺序导航顺序（也称为 'tabbing order'）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Defines how to alter the representation when the counter value is negative.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。定义当计数器值为负数时如何改变其表示形式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The replaced content is sized to maintain its aspect ratio while fitting within the element's content box: its concrete object size is resolved as a contain constraint against the element's used width and height.
ast.target: 替换内容在保持其宽高比的同时，调整大小以适应元素的内容框：其具体对象尺寸根据元素的使用宽度和高度，作为包含约束来解析。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The replaced content is sized to maintain its aspect ratio while filling the element's entire content box: its concrete object size is resolved as a cover constraint against the element's used width and height.
ast.target: 替换内容在保持其宽高比的同时，调整大小以填充元素的整个内容框：其具体对象尺寸根据元素的使用宽度和高度，作为覆盖约束来解析。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The replaced content is sized to fill the element's content box: the object's concrete object size is the element's used width and height.
ast.target: 替换内容调整大小以填充元素的内容框：对象的具体对象尺寸即为元素的使用宽度和高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The replaced content is not resized to fit inside the element's content box
ast.target: 替换内容不会调整大小以适应元素的内容框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Size the content as if 'none' or 'contain' were specified, whichever would result in a smaller concrete object size.
ast.target: 调整内容大小，如同指定了 'none' 或 'contain'，取其中导致具体对象尺寸较小的那个。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how the contents of a replaced element should be scaled relative to the box established by its used height and width.
ast.target: 指定替换元素的内容应如何相对于由其使用高度和宽度建立的框进行缩放。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the alignment of the replaced element inside its box.
ast.target: 确定替换元素在其框内的对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Opacity of an element's text, where 1 is opaque and 0 is entirely transparent.
ast.target: 元素文本的不透明度，其中 1 表示完全不透明，0 表示完全透明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the minimum number of line boxes in a block container that must be left in a fragment before a fragmentation break.
ast.target: 指定在分页符之前，块容器中必须保留的最小行框数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines which row of a inline-table should be used as baseline of inline-table.
ast.target: 确定行内表格的哪一行应作为行内表格的基线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property determines the width of the tab character (U+0009), in space characters (U+0020), when rendered.
ast.target: 此属性决定制表符（U+0009）在渲染时的宽度，以空格字符（U+0020）为单位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For non-replaced elements, the effect of this value depends on which of related properties have the value 'auto' as well.
ast.target: 对于非替换元素，此值的效果取决于相关属性中哪些也具有 'auto' 值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'bottom'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'bottom'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'top'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'top'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'right'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'right'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'left'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'left'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Permits the user agent to render a custom outline style, typically the default platform style.
ast.target: 允许用户代理渲染自定义轮廓样式，通常是默认的平台样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Performs a color inversion on the pixels on the screen.
ast.target: 对屏幕上的像素执行颜色反转。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property for 'outline-style', 'outline-width', and 'outline-color'.
ast.target: 'outline-style'、'outline-width' 和 'outline-color' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The color of the outline.
ast.target: 轮廓的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Offset the outline and draw it beyond the border edge.
ast.target: 偏移轮廓并将其绘制在边框边缘之外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Style of the outline.
ast.target: 轮廓的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Width of the outline.
ast.target: 轮廓的宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The behavior of the 'auto' value is UA-dependent, but should cause a scrolling mechanism to be provided for overflowing boxes.
ast.target: 'auto' 值的行为取决于用户代理，但应为溢出的框提供滚动机制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content is clipped and no scrolling mechanism should be provided to view the content outside the clipping region.
ast.target: 内容被裁剪，且不应提供滚动机制来查看裁剪区域之外的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as the standardized 'clip', except doesn't establish a block formatting context.
ast.target: 与标准化的 'clip' 相同，但不建立块格式化上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content is clipped and if the user agent uses a scrolling mechanism that is visible on the screen (such as a scroll bar or a panner), that mechanism should be displayed for a box whether or not any of its content is clipped.
ast.target: 内容被裁剪，并且如果用户代理使用在屏幕上可见的滚动机制（如滚动条或平移器），则无论其内容是否被裁剪，都应为该框显示该机制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content is not clipped, i.e., it may be rendered outside the content box.
ast.target: 内容不被裁剪，即，它可以在内容框之外渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for setting 'overflow-x' and 'overflow-y'.
ast.target: 设置 'overflow-x' 和 'overflow-y' 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An otherwise unbreakable sequence of characters may be broken at an arbitrary point if there are no otherwise-acceptable break points in the line.
ast.target: 如果行中没有其他可接受的断点，则原本不可断开的字符序列可以在任意点断开。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether the UA may break within a word to prevent overflow when an otherwise-unbreakable string is too long to fit within the line box.
ast.target: 指定当原本不可断开的字符串过长而无法适应行框时，用户代理是否可以在单词内断行以防止溢出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the handling of overflow in the horizontal direction.
ast.target: 指定水平方向上的溢出处理方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the handling of overflow in the vertical direction.
ast.target: 指定垂直方向上的溢出处理方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies a "fixed-width" counter style, where representations shorter than the pad value are padded with a particular <symbol>
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。指定一种“固定宽度”的计数器样式，其中表示长度短于填充值的表示将用特定的 <symbol> 填充。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand property to set values for the thickness of the padding area. If left is omitted, it is the same as right. If bottom is omitted it is the same as top, if right is omitted it is the same as top. The value may not be negative.
ast.target: 用于设置内边距区域厚度的简写属性。如果省略 left，则与 right 相同。如果省略 bottom，则与 top 相同；如果省略 right，则与 top 相同。该值不能为负数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'padding-bottom'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'padding-bottom'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'padding-top'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'padding-top'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'padding-right'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'padding-right'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Logical 'padding-left'. Mapping depends on the parent element's 'writing-mode', 'direction', and 'text-orientation'.
ast.target: 逻辑 'padding-left'。映射取决于父元素的 'writing-mode'、'direction' 和 'text-orientation'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a page break after the generated box.
ast.target: 总是在生成的盒子之后强制分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page break after generated box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在生成的盒子之后分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break after the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的盒子之后分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks after the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a left page.
ast.target: 在生成的盒子之后强制一个或两个分页，使下一页格式化为左页。

ast.name: description
