ast.source: Force one or two page breaks after the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a right page.
ast.target: 在生成的盒子之后强制一个或两个分页，使下一页格式化为右页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines rules for page breaks after an element.
ast.target: 定义元素之后的分页规则。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a page break before the generated box.
ast.target: 总是在生成的盒子之前强制分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page break before the generated box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在生成的盒子之前分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break before the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的盒子之前分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks before the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a left page.
ast.target: 在生成的盒子之前强制一个或两个分页，使下一页格式化为左页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Force one or two page breaks before the generated box so that the next page is formatted as a right page.
ast.target: 在生成的盒子之前强制一个或两个分页，使下一页格式化为右页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines rules for page breaks before an element.
ast.target: 定义元素之前的分页规则。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page break inside the generated box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在生成的盒子内部分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break inside the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的盒子内部分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines rules for page breaks inside an element.
ast.target: 定义元素内部的分页规则。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element is painted with the standard order of painting operations: the 'fill' is painted first, then its 'stroke' and finally its markers.
ast.target: 元素按照标准的绘制操作顺序进行绘制：先绘制 'fill'，然后是其 'stroke'，最后是其标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the order that the three paint operations that shapes and text are rendered with: their fill, their stroke and any markers they might have.
ast.target: 控制形状和文本渲染时三种绘制操作的顺序：它们的填充、描边以及它们可能具有的任何标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The given element can be the target element for pointer events whenever the pointer is over either the interior or the perimeter of the element.
ast.target: 当指针位于元素的内部或边界上时，该给定元素可以成为指针事件的目标元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The given element can be the target element for pointer events whenever the pointer is over the interior of the element.
ast.target: 当指针位于元素的内部时，该给定元素可以成为指针事件的目标元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The given element does not receive pointer events.
ast.target: 该给定元素不接收指针事件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The given element can be the target element for pointer events when the pointer is over a "painted" area.
ast.target: 当指针位于“已绘制”区域上时，该给定元素可以成为指针事件的目标元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The given element can be the target element for pointer events whenever the pointer is over the perimeter of the element.
ast.target: 当指针位于元素的边界上时，该给定元素可以成为指针事件的目标元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The given element can be the target element for pointer events when the 'visibility' property is set to visible and the pointer is over either the interior or the perimeter of the element.
ast.target: 当 'visibility' 属性设置为 visible 且指针位于元素的内部或边界上时，该给定元素可以成为指针事件的目标元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The given element can be the target element for pointer events when the 'visibility' property is set to visible and when the pointer is over the interior of the element.
ast.target: 当 'visibility' 属性设置为 visible 且指针位于元素的内部时，该给定元素可以成为指针事件的目标元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The given element can be the target element for pointer events when the 'visibility' property is set to visible and when the pointer is over a 'painted' area.
ast.target: 当 'visibility' 属性设置为 visible 且指针位于 'painted' 区域上时，该给定元素可以成为指针事件的目标元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The given element can be the target element for pointer events when the 'visibility' property is set to visible and when the pointer is over the perimeter of the element.
ast.target: 当 'visibility' 属性设置为 visible 且指针位于元素的边界上时，该给定元素可以成为指针事件的目标元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies under what circumstances a given element can be the target element for a pointer event.
ast.target: 指定在什么情况下给定元素可以成为指针事件的目标元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box's position (and possibly size) is specified with the 'top', 'right', 'bottom', and 'left' properties. These properties specify offsets with respect to the box's 'containing block'.
ast.target: 盒子的位置（可能还有大小）由 'top'、'right'、'bottom' 和 'left' 属性指定。这些属性指定了相对于盒子 'containing block' 的偏移量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box's position is calculated according to the 'absolute' model, but in addition, the box is fixed with respect to some reference. As with the 'absolute' model, the box's margins do not collapse with any other margins.
ast.target: 盒子的位置根据 'absolute' 模型计算，但除此之外，盒子相对于某个参考点是固定的。与 'absolute' 模型一样，盒子的外边距不与任何其他外边距折叠。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box's position is calculated according to the 'absolute' model.
ast.target: 盒子的位置根据 'absolute' 模型计算。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box's position is calculated according to the normal flow (this is called the position in normal flow). Then the box is offset relative to its normal position.
ast.target: 盒子的位置根据正常流计算（这称为正常流中的位置）。然后盒子相对于其正常位置进行偏移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box is a normal box, laid out according to the normal flow. The 'top', 'right', 'bottom', and 'left' properties do not apply.
ast.target: 盒子是一个普通盒子，根据正常流进行布局。'top'、'right'、'bottom' 和 'left' 属性不适用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box's position is calculated according to the normal flow. Then the box is offset relative to its flow root and containing block and in all cases, including table elements, does not affect the position of any following boxes.
ast.target: 盒子的位置根据正常流计算。然后盒子相对于其流根和包含块进行偏移，并且在所有情况下，包括表格元素，都不会影响任何后续盒子的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The position CSS property sets how an element is positioned in a document. The top, right, bottom, and left properties determine the final location of positioned elements.
ast.target: CSS position 属性设置元素在文档中的定位方式。top、right、bottom 和 left 属性决定定位元素的最终位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies a <symbol> that is prepended to the marker representation.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。指定一个 <symbol>，它被添加到标记表示的前面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The 'open-quote' and 'close-quote' values of the 'content' property produce no quotations marks, as if they were 'no-open-quote' and 'no-close-quote' respectively.
ast.target: 'content' 属性的 'open-quote' 和 'close-quote' 值不产生引号，就像它们分别是 'no-open-quote' 和 'no-close-quote' 一样。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies quotation marks for any number of embedded quotations.
ast.target: 为任意数量的嵌套引号指定引号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The range depends on the counter system.
ast.target: 范围取决于计数器系统。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If used as the first value in a range, it represents negative infinity; if used as the second value, it represents positive infinity.
ast.target: 如果用作范围中的第一个值，它表示负无穷；如果用作第二个值，它表示正无穷。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Defines the ranges over which the counter style is defined.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。定义计数器样式所定义的范围。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA presents a bidirectional resizing mechanism to allow the user to adjust both the height and the width of the element.
ast.target: 用户代理呈现一个双向调整大小机制，允许用户调整元素的高度和宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA presents a unidirectional horizontal resizing mechanism to allow the user to adjust only the width of the element.
ast.target: 用户代理呈现一个单向水平调整大小机制，允许用户仅调整元素的宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA does not present a resizing mechanism on the element, and the user is given no direct manipulation mechanism to resize the element.
ast.target: 用户代理不在元素上呈现调整大小机制，用户没有直接操作机制来调整元素的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA presents a unidirectional vertical resizing mechanism to allow the user to adjust only the height of the element.
ast.target: 用户代理呈现一个单向垂直调整大小机制，允许用户仅调整元素的高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether or not an element is resizable by the user, and if so, along which axis/axes.
ast.target: 指定元素是否可由用户调整大小，如果是，沿哪个轴/哪些轴。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how far an absolutely positioned box's right margin edge is offset to the left of the right edge of the box's 'containing block'.
ast.target: 指定绝对定位盒子的右外边距边缘相对于盒子 'containing block' 的右边缘向左偏移多远。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent determines how the ruby contents are aligned. This is the initial value.
ast.target: 用户代理决定如何对齐 ruby 内容。这是初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby content is centered within its box.
ast.target: ruby 内容在其框内居中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text content is aligned with the start edge of the base.
ast.target: ruby 文本内容与基底的起始边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the ruby text is not adjacent to a line edge, it is aligned as in 'auto'. If it is adjacent to a line edge, then it is still aligned as in auto, but the side of the ruby text that touches the end of the line is lined up with the corresponding edge of the base.
ast.target: 如果 ruby 文本不与行边缘相邻，则其对齐方式与 'auto' 相同。如果它与行边缘相邻，则其对齐方式仍与 auto 相同，但 ruby 文本触及行尾的一侧将与基底的相应边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text content is aligned with the end edge of the base.
ast.target: ruby 文本内容与基底的结束边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby content expands as defined for normal text justification (as defined by 'text-justify'),
ast.target: ruby 内容按照为正常文本对齐（由 'text-justify' 定义）所定义的方式扩展。

ast.name: description
ast.source: As for 'space-between' except that there exists an extra justification opportunities whose space is distributed half before and half after the ruby content.
ast.target: 与 'space-between' 类似，但存在一个额外的对齐机会，其空间一半分配在 ruby 内容之前，一半分配在之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how text is distributed within the various ruby boxes when their contents do not exactly fill their respective boxes.
ast.target: 指定当各种 ruby 框的内容不能完全填满其各自的框时，文本如何在其中分布。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text can overhang text adjacent to the base on either side. This is the initial value.
ast.target: ruby 文本可以悬垂在基底两侧相邻的文本上。这是初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text can overhang the text that follows it.
ast.target: ruby 文本可以悬垂在紧随其后的文本上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text cannot overhang any text adjacent to its base, only its own base.
ast.target: ruby 文本不能悬垂在其基底相邻的任何文本上，只能悬垂在其自身的基底上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text can overhang the text that precedes it.
ast.target: ruby 文本可以悬垂在紧接其前的文本上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether, and on which side, ruby text is allowed to partially overhang any adjacent text in addition to its own base, when the ruby text is wider than the ruby base.
ast.target: 决定当 ruby 文本比 ruby 基底宽时，是否以及在哪一侧允许 ruby 文本部分悬垂在其自身基底之外的任何相邻文本上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text appears after the base. This is a relatively rare setting used in ideographic East Asian writing systems, most easily found in educational text.
ast.target: ruby 文本出现在基底之后。这是一个相对罕见的设置，用于表意文字的东亚书写系统，在教育文本中最容易找到。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text appears before the base. This is the most common setting used in ideographic East Asian writing systems.
ast.target: ruby 文本出现在基底之前。这是表意文字东亚书写系统中最常用的设置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ruby text appears on the right of the base. Unlike 'before' and 'after', this value is not relative to the text flow direction.
ast.target: ruby 文本出现在基底的右侧。与 'before' 和 'after' 不同，此值不相对于文本流方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used by the parent of elements with display: ruby-text to control the position of the ruby text with respect to its base.
ast.target: 由 display: ruby-text 的元素的父元素使用，用于控制 ruby 文本相对于其基底的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The value of attribute 'x' is a string value. The string value is evaluated as a <number> to determine the number of ruby base elements to be spanned by the annotation element.
ast.target: 属性 'x' 的值是一个字符串值。该字符串值被计算为一个 <number>，以确定注释元素要跨越的 ruby 基底元素的数量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No spanning. The computed value is '1'.
ast.target: 不跨越。计算值为 '1'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scrolls in an instant fashion.
ast.target: 以即时方式滚动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Scrolls in a smooth fashion using a user-agent-defined timing function and time period.
ast.target: 使用用户代理定义的计时函数和时间周期，以平滑方式滚动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the scrolling behavior for a scrolling box, when scrolling happens due to navigation or CSSOM scrolling APIs.
ast.target: 指定当由于导航或 CSSOM 滚动 API 而发生滚动时，滚动框的滚动行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies that this element does not contribute a snap point.
ast.target: 指定此元素不贡献吸附点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the x and y coordinate within the element which will align with the nearest ancestor scroll container's snap-destination for the respective axis.
ast.target: 定义元素内的 x 和 y 坐标，该坐标将与最近祖先滚动容器的吸附目标点对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Define the x and y coordinate within the scroll container's visual viewport which element snap points will align with.
ast.target: 定义滚动容器可视视口内的 x 和 y 坐标，元素吸附点将与之对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No snap points are defined by this scroll container.
ast.target: 此滚动容器未定义任何吸附点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines an interval at which snap points are defined, starting from the container's relevant start edge.
ast.target: 定义一个间隔，在该间隔上定义吸附点，从容器的相关起始边缘开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the positioning of snap points along the x axis of the scroll container it is applied to.
ast.target: 定义吸附点沿其应用到的滚动容器的 x 轴的定位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the positioning of snap points along the y axis of the scroll container it is applied to.
ast.target: 定义吸附点沿其应用到的滚动容器的 y 轴的定位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines how strictly snap points are enforced on the scroll container.
ast.target: 定义吸附点在滚动容器上强制执行的严格程度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the alpha channel threshold used to extract the shape using an image. A value of 0.5 means that the shape will enclose all the pixels that are more than 50% opaque.
ast.target: 定义用于使用图像提取形状的 alpha 通道阈值。值为 0.5 表示形状将包围所有不透明度超过 50% 的像素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Adds a margin to a 'shape-outside'. This defines a new shape that is the smallest contour that includes all the points that are the 'shape-margin' distance outward in the perpendicular direction from a point on the underlying shape.
ast.target: 为 'shape-outside' 添加边距。这定义了一个新形状，它是包含所有在垂直方向上距离基础形状上的点 'shape-margin' 距离的点的最小轮廓。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The background is painted within (clipped to) the margin box.
ast.target: 背景在（裁剪到）边距框内绘制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The float area is unaffected.
ast.target: 浮动区域不受影响。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Suppresses aural rendering.
ast.target: 抑制听觉渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emphasize the contrast between clean edges of artwork over rendering speed and geometric precision.
ast.target: 强调清晰边缘的图形效果，而非渲染速度和几何精度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emphasize geometric precision over speed and crisp edges.
ast.target: 强调几何精度，而非速度和清晰边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emphasize rendering speed over geometric precision and crisp edges.
ast.target: 强调渲染速度，而非几何精度和清晰边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides hints about what tradeoffs to make as it renders vector graphics elements such as <path> elements and basic shapes such as circles and rectangles.
ast.target: 提供关于在渲染矢量图形元素（如 <path> 元素）和基本形状（如圆形和矩形）时应做出何种权衡的提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The size CSS at-rule descriptor, used with the @page at-rule, defines the size and orientation of the box which is used to represent a page. Most of the time, this size corresponds to the target size of the printed page if applicable.
ast.target: CSS @page 规则的 size 描述符，用于定义表示页面的框的大小和方向。大多数情况下，此大小对应于打印页面的目标大小（如果适用）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Reference font by URL
ast.target: 通过 URL 引用字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Optional hint describing the format of the font resource.
ast.target: 描述字体资源格式的可选提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Format-specific string that identifies a locally available copy of a given font.
ast.target: 标识给定字体的本地可用副本的特定格式字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @font-face descriptor. Specifies the resource containing font data. It is required, whether the font is downloadable or locally installed.
ast.target: @font-face 描述符。指定包含字体数据的资源。无论字体是可下载的还是本地安装的，此属性都是必需的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates what color to use at that gradient stop.
ast.target: 指示在该渐变停止点使用什么颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the opacity of a given gradient stop.
ast.target: 定义给定渐变停止点的不透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Paints along the outline of the given graphical element.
ast.target: 沿着给定图形元素的轮廓进行绘制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that no dashing is used.
ast.target: 表示不使用虚线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the pattern of dashes and gaps used to stroke paths.
ast.target: 控制用于描边路径的虚线和间隙的模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the distance into the dash pattern to start the dash.
ast.target: 指定在虚线模式中开始虚线的距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the stroke for each subpath does not extend beyond its two endpoints.
ast.target: 表示每个子路径的描边不会延伸到其两个端点之外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that at each end of each subpath, the shape representing the stroke will be extended by a half circle with a radius equal to the stroke width.
ast.target: 表示在每个子路径的每一端，代表描边的形状将通过一个半径等于描边宽度的半圆进行延伸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that at the end of each subpath, the shape representing the stroke will be extended by a rectangle with the same width as the stroke width and whose length is half of the stroke width.
ast.target: 表示在每个子路径的末端，代表描边的形状将通过一个宽度与描边宽度相同、长度为描边宽度一半的矩形进行延伸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the shape to be used at the end of open subpaths when they are stroked.
ast.target: 指定在描边时用于开放子路径末端的形状。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that a bevelled corner is to be used to join path segments.
ast.target: 表示在连接路径段时使用斜角连接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that a sharp corner is to be used to join path segments.
ast.target: 表示在连接路径段时使用尖角连接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that a round corner is to be used to join path segments.
ast.target: 表示在连接路径段时使用圆角连接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the shape to be used at the corners of paths or basic shapes when they are stroked.
ast.target: 指定在描边时用于路径或基本形状拐角的形状。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When two line segments meet at a sharp angle and miter joins have been specified for 'stroke-linejoin', it is possible for the miter to extend far beyond the thickness of the line stroking the path.
ast.target: 当两条线段以尖角相交且为'stroke-linejoin'指定了斜接连接时，斜接可能会远远超出描边路径的线条厚度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the opacity of the painting operation used to stroke the current object.
ast.target: 指定用于描边当前对象的绘制操作的不透明度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the width of the stroke on the current object.
ast.target: 指定当前对象的描边宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies a <symbol> that is appended to the marker representation.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。指定附加到标记表示的<symbol>。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents "sign-value" numbering systems, which, rather than using reusing digits in different positions to change their value, define additional digits with much larger values, so that the value of the number can be obtained by adding all the digits together.
ast.target: 表示“符号-数值”编号系统，该系统不通过在不同位置重复使用数字来改变其值，而是定义具有更大值的附加数字，因此数字的值可以通过将所有数字相加来获得。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Interprets the list of counter symbols as digits to an alphabetic numbering system, similar to the default lower-alpha counter style, which wraps from "a", "b", "c", to "aa", "ab", "ac".
ast.target: 将计数器符号列表解释为字母编号系统的数字，类似于默认的 lower-alpha 计数器样式，该样式从 \"a\", \"b\", \"c\" 循环到 \"aa\", \"ab\", \"ac\"。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cycles repeatedly through its provided symbols, looping back to the beginning when it reaches the end of the list.
ast.target: 循环遍历其提供的符号，当到达列表末尾时返回开头。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the algorithm of another counter style, but alter other aspects.
ast.target: 使用另一个计数器样式的算法，但更改其他方面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Runs through its list of counter symbols once, then falls back.
ast.target: 遍历其计数器符号列表一次，然后回退。

ast.name: description
ast.source: interprets the list of counter symbols as digits to a "place-value" numbering system, similar to the default 'decimal' counter style.
ast.target: 将计数器符号列表解释为“位值”编号系统的数字，类似于默认的 'decimal' 计数器样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cycles repeatedly through its provided symbols, doubling, tripling, etc. the symbols on each successive pass through the list.
ast.target: 循环遍历其提供的符号，在每次遍历列表时使符号加倍、三倍等。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies which algorithm will be used to construct the counter's representation based on the counter value.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。指定将使用哪种算法根据计数器值构建计数器的表示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @counter-style descriptor. Specifies the symbols used by the marker-construction algorithm specified by the system descriptor.
ast.target: @counter-style 描述符。指定由系统描述符指定的标记构建算法使用的符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use any automatic table layout algorithm.
ast.target: 使用任何自动表格布局算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Use the fixed table layout algorithm.
ast.target: 使用固定表格布局算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls the algorithm used to lay out the table cells, rows, and columns.
ast.target: 控制用于布局表格单元格、行和列的算法。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the width of the tab character (U+0009), in space characters (U+0020), when rendered.
ast.target: 确定制表符 (U+0009) 的宽度，以空格字符 (U+0020) 为单位，在渲染时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inline contents are aligned to the end edge of the line box.
ast.target: 行内内容对齐到行框的结束边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The inline contents are aligned to the start edge of the line box.
ast.target: 行内内容对齐到行框的起始边缘。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes how inline contents of a block are horizontally aligned if the contents do not completely fill the line box.
ast.target: 描述当内容未完全填充行框时，块的行内内容如何水平对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content on the affected line is aligned per 'text-align' unless 'text-align' is set to 'justify', in which case it is 'start-aligned'.
ast.target: 受影响行上的内容根据 'text-align' 对齐，除非 'text-align' 设置为 'justify'，此时为 'start-aligned'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rendered characters are aligned such that the end of the resulting rendered text is at the initial current text position.
ast.target: 渲染的字符对齐方式使得渲染文本的末尾位于初始当前文本位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rendered characters are aligned such that the geometric middle of the resulting rendered text is at the initial current text position.
ast.target: 渲染的字符对齐方式使得渲染文本的几何中心位于初始当前文本位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rendered characters are aligned such that the start of the resulting rendered text is at the initial current text position.
ast.target: 渲染的字符对齐方式使得渲染文本的起始位于初始当前文本位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used to align (start-, middle- or end-alignment) a string of text relative to a given point.
ast.target: 用于相对于给定点对齐（起始、中间或结束对齐）文本字符串。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Decorations applied to font used for an element's text.
ast.target: 应用于元素文本所用字体的装饰。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the indentation applied to lines of inline content in a block. The indentation only affects the first line of inline content in the block unless the 'hanging' keyword is specified, in which case it affects all lines except the first.
ast.target: 指定应用于块中行内内容行的缩进。除非指定 'hanging' 关键字，否则缩进仅影响块中的第一行行内内容，在这种情况下，它影响除第一行之外的所有行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This value is equivalent to 'sideways-right' in 'vertical-rl' writing mode and equivalent to 'sideways-left' in 'vertical-lr' writing mode.
ast.target: 此值在 'vertical-rl' 书写模式下等同于 'sideways-right'，在 'vertical-lr' 书写模式下等同于 'sideways-left'。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In vertical writing modes, this causes text to be set as if in a horizontal layout, but rotated 90° clockwise.
ast.target: 在垂直书写模式下，这会导致文本像在水平布局中一样设置，但顺时针旋转 90°。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In vertical writing modes, characters from horizontal-only scripts are rendered upright, i.e. in their standard horizontal orientation.
ast.target: 在垂直书写模式下，仅水平脚本的字符被直立渲染，即以其标准水平方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the orientation of text within a line.
ast.target: 指定行内文本的朝向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Text can overflow for example when it is prevented from wrapping.
ast.target: 文本可能会溢出，例如当它被阻止换行时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the user agent shall emphasize geometric precision over legibility and rendering speed.
ast.target: 表示用户代理应强调几何精度而非易读性和渲染速度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the user agent shall emphasize legibility over rendering speed and geometric precision.
ast.target: 表示用户代理应强调易读性而非渲染速度和几何精度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the user agent shall emphasize rendering speed over legibility and geometric precision.
ast.target: 表示用户代理应强调渲染速度而非易读性和几何精度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The creator of SVG content might want to provide a hint to the implementation about what tradeoffs to make as it renders text. The 'text-rendering' property provides these hints.
ast.target: SVG 内容的创建者可能希望向实现提供关于在渲染文本时应做出哪些权衡的提示。'text-rendering' 属性提供了这些提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables shadow effects to be applied to the text of the element.
ast.target: 启用将阴影效果应用于元素的文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Puts the first typographic letter unit of each word in titlecase.
ast.target: 将每个单词的第一个排版字母单元设置为标题大小写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Puts all letters in lowercase.
ast.target: 将所有字母设置为小写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No effects.
ast.target: 无效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Puts all letters in uppercase.
ast.target: 将所有字母设置为大写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls capitalization effects of an element's text.
ast.target: 控制元素文本的大小写效果。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The underline is aligned with the under edge of the element's content box.
ast.target: 下划线与元素内容框的下边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how far an absolutely positioned box's top margin edge is offset below the top edge of the box's 'containing block'.
ast.target: 指定绝对定位框的顶部外边距边缘相对于其包含块的顶部边缘的偏移量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent may determine any permitted touch behaviors for touches that begin on the element.
ast.target: 用户代理可以确定在元素上开始的触摸的任何允许触摸行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent may consider touches that begin on the element only for the purposes of scrolling and continuous zooming.
ast.target: 用户代理可以仅出于滚动和连续缩放的目的考虑在元素上开始的触摸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Touches that begin on the element must not trigger default touch behaviors.
ast.target: 在元素上开始的触摸不得触发默认触摸行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent may consider touches that begin on the element only for the purposes of horizontally scrolling the element's nearest ancestor with horizontally scrollable content.
ast.target: 用户代理可以仅出于水平滚动元素最近的具有水平可滚动内容的祖先的目的考虑在元素上开始的触摸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The user agent may consider touches that begin on the element only for the purposes of vertically scrolling the element's nearest ancestor with vertically scrollable content.
ast.target: 用户代理可以仅出于垂直滚动元素最近的具有垂直可滚动内容的祖先的目的考虑在元素上开始的触摸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether touch input may trigger default behavior supplied by user agent.
ast.target: 确定触摸输入是否可以触发用户代理提供的默认行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: All children of this element are rendered flattened into the 2D plane of the element.
ast.target: 此元素的所有子元素都被渲染并展平到元素的二维平面中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Flattening is not performed, so children maintain their position in 3D space.
ast.target: 不执行展平，因此子元素保持其在三维空间中的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines how nested elements are rendered in 3D space.
ast.target: 定义嵌套元素在三维空间中的渲染方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inside the element, reordering is strictly in sequence according to the 'direction' property; the implicit part of the bidirectional algorithm is ignored.
ast.target: 在元素内部，重新排序严格按照 'direction' 属性的顺序进行；双向算法的隐式部分被忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the element is inline-level, this value opens an additional level of embedding with respect to the bidirectional algorithm. The direction of this embedding level is given by the 'direction' property.
ast.target: 如果元素是行内级元素，此值会相对于双向算法打开一个额外的嵌入级别。此嵌入级别的方向由 'direction' 属性给出。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The contents of the element are considered to be inside a separate, independent paragraph.
ast.target: 元素的内容被视为位于一个单独的、独立的段落内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This combines the isolation behavior of 'isolate' with the directional override behavior of 'bidi-override'
ast.target: 这结合了 'isolate' 的隔离行为和 'bidi-override' 的方向覆盖行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element does not open an additional level of embedding with respect to the bidirectional algorithm. For inline-level elements, implicit reordering works across element boundaries.
ast.target: 该元素不会相对于双向算法打开额外的嵌入级别。对于行内级元素，隐式重新排序会跨越元素边界进行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For the purposes of the Unicode bidirectional algorithm, the base directionality of each bidi paragraph for which the element forms the containing block is determined not by the element's computed 'direction'.
ast.target: 就 Unicode 双向算法而言，该元素构成包含块的每个双向段落的基本方向性不是由元素计算出的 'direction' 决定的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The level of embedding with respect to the bidirectional algorithm.
ast.target: 相对于双向算法的嵌入级别。

ast.name: description
ast.source: WGL4 character set (Pan-European).
ast.target: WGL4 字符集（泛欧洲）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Multilingual European Subset No. 1. Latin. Covers ~44 languages.
ast.target: 多语言欧洲子集第 1 号。拉丁语。覆盖约 44 种语言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Multilingual European Subset No. 2. Latin, Greek, and Cyrillic. Covers ~128 language.
ast.target: 多语言欧洲子集第 2 号。拉丁语、希腊语和西里尔语。覆盖约 128 种语言。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The Multilingual European Subset No. 3. Covers all characters belonging to European scripts.
ast.target: 多语言欧洲子集第 3 号。覆盖属于欧洲文字的所有字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Basic Latin (ASCII).
ast.target: 基本拉丁语（ASCII）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Latin-1 Supplement. Accented characters for Western European languages, common punctuation characters, multiplication and division signs.
ast.target: 拉丁语-1 补充。西欧语言的重音字符、常见标点字符、乘号和除号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Latin Extended-A. Accented characters for for Czech, Dutch, Polish, and Turkish.
ast.target: 拉丁语扩展-A。捷克语、荷兰语、波兰语和土耳其语的重音字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Latin Extended-B. Croatian, Slovenian, Romanian, Non-European and historic latin, Khoisan, Pinyin, Livonian, Sinology.
ast.target: 拉丁语扩展-B。克罗地亚语、斯洛文尼亚语、罗马尼亚语、非欧洲和历史拉丁语、科伊桑语、拼音、利沃尼亚语、汉学。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Latin Extended Additional. Vietnamese, German captial sharp s, Medievalist, Latin general use.
ast.target: 拉丁语扩展附加。越南语、德语大写尖S、中世纪研究、拉丁语通用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: International Phonetic Alphabet Extensions.
ast.target: 国际音标扩展。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Greek and Coptic.
ast.target: 希腊语和科普特语。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Greek Extended. Accented characters for polytonic Greek.
ast.target: 希腊语扩展。多调希腊语的重音字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Cyrillic Supplement. Extra letters for Komi, Khanty, Chukchi, Mordvin, Kurdish, Aleut, Chuvash, Abkhaz, Azerbaijani, and Orok.
ast.target: 西里尔语补充。科米语、汉特语、楚科奇语、莫尔多瓦语、库尔德语、阿留申语、楚瓦什语、阿布哈兹语、阿塞拜疆语和奥罗克语的额外字母。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Latin, Greek, Cyrillic, some punctuation and symbols.
ast.target: 拉丁语、希腊语、西里尔语、一些标点和符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Arabic Supplement. Additional letters for African languages, Khowar, Torwali, Burushaski, and early Persian.
ast.target: 阿拉伯语补充。非洲语言、科瓦尔语、托尔瓦利语、布鲁夏斯基语和早期波斯语的额外字母。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Arabic Extended-A. Additional letters for African languages, European and Central Asian languages, Rohingya, Tamazight, Arwi, and Koranic annotation signs.
ast.target: 阿拉伯语扩展-A。非洲语言、欧洲和中亚语言、罗兴亚语、塔马齐格特语、阿尔维语和古兰经注释符号的额外字母。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Warang Citi.
ast.target: 瓦兰齐地文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tai Tham.
ast.target: 老傣仂文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tai Viet.
ast.target: 傣担文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Myanmar (Burmese).
ast.target: 缅甸语。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ethiopic Supplement. Extra Syllables for Sebatbeit, and Tonal marks
ast.target: 埃塞俄比亚语补充。塞巴特贝特语的额外音节和声调标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ethiopic Extended. Extra Syllables for Me'en, Blin, and Sebatbeit.
ast.target: 埃塞俄比亚语扩展。梅恩语、布林语和塞巴特贝特语的额外音节。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Ethiopic Extended-A. Extra characters for Gamo-Gofa-Dawro, Basketo, and Gumuz.
ast.target: 埃塞俄比亚语扩展-A。加莫-戈法-道罗语、巴凯托语和古穆兹语的额外字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sundanese Supplement. Punctuation.
ast.target: 巽他语补充。标点符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: CJK (Chinese, Japanese, Korean) Unified Ideographs. Most common ideographs for modern Chinese and Japanese.
ast.target: 中日韩统一表意文字。现代中文和日文最常用的表意文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: CJK Unified Ideographs Extension A. Rare ideographs.
ast.target: 中日韩统一表意文字扩展 A。罕见表意文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Kangxi Radicals.
ast.target: 康熙部首。

ast.name: description
ast.source: CJK Radicals Supplement. Alternative forms of Kangxi Radicals.
ast.target: 中日韩部首补充。康熙部首的替代形式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hangul Jamo.
ast.target: 韩文字母 Jamo。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Hangul Syllables.
ast.target: 韩文音节。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Japanese Kanji, Hiragana and Katakana characters plus Yen/Yuan symbol.
ast.target: 日文汉字、平假名和片假名字符加上日元/人民币符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Yi Syllables.
ast.target: 彝文音节。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Yi Radicals.
ast.target: 彝文部首。

ast.name: description
ast.source: General Punctuation.
ast.target: 通用标点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: CJK Symbols and Punctuation.
ast.target: 中日韩符号和标点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Superscripts and Subscripts.
ast.target: 上标和下标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Currency Symbols.
ast.target: 货币符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Letterlike Symbols.
ast.target: 类字母符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Number Forms.
ast.target: 数字形式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Mathematical Operators.
ast.target: 数学运算符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Miscellaneous Technical.
ast.target: 杂项技术符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Private Use Area.
ast.target: 专用区。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Alphabetic Presentation Forms. Ligatures for latin, Armenian, and Hebrew.
ast.target: 字母表达形式。拉丁文、亚美尼亚文和希伯来文的连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Arabic Presentation Forms-A. Contextual forms / ligatures for Persian, Urdu, Sindhi, Central Asian languages, etc, Arabic pedagogical symbols, word ligatures.
ast.target: 阿拉伯文表达形式-A。波斯语、乌尔都语、信德语、中亚语言等的上下文形式/连字，阿拉伯文教学符号，单词连字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emoji: Emoticons.
ast.target: 表情符号：表情图标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emoji: Miscellaneous Symbols.
ast.target: 表情符号：杂项符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emoji: Miscellaneous Symbols and Pictographs.
ast.target: 表情符号：杂项符号和象形文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emoji: Supplemental Symbols and Pictographs.
ast.target: 表情符号：补充符号和象形文字。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Emoji: Transport and Map Symbols.
ast.target: 表情符号：交通和地图符号。

ast.name: description
ast.source: @font-face descriptor. Defines the set of Unicode codepoints that may be supported by the font face for which it is declared.
ast.target: @font-face 描述符。定义声明它的字体面可能支持的 Unicode 码位集合。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The content of the element must be selected atomically
ast.target: 元素的内容必须被原子性地选中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: UAs must not allow a selection which is started in this element to be extended outside of this element.
ast.target: 用户代理不得允许在此元素内开始的选区扩展到此元素之外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The UA must not allow selections to be started in this element.
ast.target: 用户代理不得允许在此元素内开始选区。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The element imposes no constraint on the selection.
ast.target: 该元素对选区不施加任何约束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Align the dominant baseline of the parent box with the equivalent, or heuristically reconstructed, baseline of the element inline box.
ast.target: 将父框的主导基线与元素内联框的等效基线或启发式重建的基线对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Align the 'alphabetic' baseline of the element with the 'alphabetic' baseline of the parent element.
ast.target: 将元素的“字母”基线与父元素的“字母”基线对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Align the after edge of the extended inline box with the after-edge of the line box.
ast.target: 将扩展内联框的后边缘与行框的后边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Align the 'middle' baseline of the inline element with the middle baseline of the parent.
ast.target: 将内联元素的“中间”基线与父元素的中间基线对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Lower the baseline of the box to the proper position for subscripts of the parent's box. (This value has no effect on the font size of the element's text.)
ast.target: 将框的基线降低到父框下标的适当位置。（此值不影响元素文本的字体大小。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Raise the baseline of the box to the proper position for superscripts of the parent's box. (This value has no effect on the font size of the element's text.)
ast.target: 将框的基线提升到父框上标的适当位置。（此值不影响元素文本的字体大小。）

ast.name: description
ast.source: Align the bottom of the box with the after-edge of the parent element's font.
ast.target: 将框的底部与父元素字体的后边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Align the top of the box with the before-edge of the parent element's font.
ast.target: 将框的顶部与父元素字体的前边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Align the before edge of the extended inline box with the before-edge of the line box.
ast.target: 将扩展内联框的前边缘与行框的前边缘对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Affects the vertical positioning of the inline boxes generated by an inline-level element inside a line box.
ast.target: 影响行框内由内联级元素生成的内联框的垂直定位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Table-specific. If used on elements other than rows, row groups, columns, or column groups, 'collapse' has the same meaning as 'hidden'.
ast.target: 表格专用。如果用于行、行组、列或列组以外的元素，“collapse”与“hidden”含义相同。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The generated box is invisible (fully transparent, nothing is drawn), but still affects layout.
ast.target: 生成的框不可见（完全透明，不绘制任何内容），但仍影响布局。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The generated box is visible.
ast.target: 生成的框可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether the boxes generated by an element are rendered. Invisible boxes still affect layout (set the 'display' property to 'none' to suppress box generation altogether).
ast.target: 指定元素生成的框是否被渲染。不可见的框仍影响布局（将“display”属性设置为“none”可完全抑制框的生成）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Changes the appearance of buttons and other controls to resemble native controls.
ast.target: 更改按钮和其他控件的外观，使其类似于原生控件。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies a filter effect where the first filter in the list takes the element's background image as the input image.
ast.target: 应用滤镜效果，其中列表中的第一个滤镜将元素的背景图像作为输入图像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the alignment of nested elements within an outer flexible box element.
ast.target: 指定外部弹性框元素内嵌套元素的对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In webkit applications, -webkit-box-direction specifies whether a box lays out its contents normally (from the top or left edge), or in reverse (from the bottom or right edge).
ast.target: 在 Webkit 应用中，-webkit-box-direction 指定一个框是正常（从顶部或左边缘）还是反向（从底部或右边缘）排列其内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies an element's flexibility.
ast.target: 指定元素的灵活性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In webkit applications, -webkit-box-orient specifies whether a box lays out its contents horizontally or vertically.
ast.target: 在 Webkit 应用中，-webkit-box-orient 指定一个框是水平还是垂直排列其内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies alignment of child elements within the current element in the direction of orientation.
ast.target: 指定当前元素内子元素在方向上的对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reflection appears above the border box.
ast.target: 反射出现在边框框上方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reflection appears below the border box.
ast.target: 反射出现在边框框下方。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reflection appears to the left of the border box.
ast.target: 反射出现在边框框左侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The reflection appears to the right of the border box.
ast.target: 反射出现在边框框右侧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines a reflection of a border box.
ast.target: 定义边框框的反射。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page/column break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在生成的框之前/之后进行分页/分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page/column break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框之前/之后进行分页/分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a column break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框之前/之后进行分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框之前/之后进行分页。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Always force a column break before/after the generated box.
ast.target: 总是在生成的框之前/之后强制分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column break behavior before the generated box.
ast.target: 描述生成的框之前的分页/分栏行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Neither force nor forbid a page/column break inside the generated box.
ast.target: 既不强制也不禁止在生成的框内部进行分页/分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a page/column break inside the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框内部进行分页/分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Avoid a column break inside the generated box.
ast.target: 避免在生成的框内部进行分栏。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the page/column break behavior inside the generated box.
ast.target: 描述生成的框内部的分页/分栏行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property is a shorthand for setting 'column-rule-width', 'column-rule-style', and 'column-rule-color' at the same place in the style sheet. Omitted values are set to their initial values.
ast.target: 此属性是同时设置“column-rule-width”、“column-rule-style”和“column-rule-color”的简写属性。省略的值将设置为其初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property provides low-level control over OpenType font features. It is intended as a way of providing access to font features that are not widely used but are needed for a particular use case.
ast.target: 此属性提供对 OpenType 字体特性的底层控制。它旨在作为一种访问那些不常用但特定用例所需的字体特性的方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies line-breaking rules for CJK (Chinese, Japanese, and Korean) text.
ast.target: 指定中日韩文本的换行规则。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines the mask painting area, which determines the area that is affected by the mask.
ast.target: 确定蒙版绘制区域，该区域决定了受蒙版影响的区域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines the behavior of nonbreaking spaces within text.
ast.target: 定义文本中不间断空格的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies whether to use native-style scrolling in an overflow:scroll element.
ast.target: 指定在 overflow:scroll 元素中是否使用原生风格的滚动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Content flows as it would in a regular content box.
ast.target: 内容像在常规内容框中一样流动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the content fits within the CSS Region, then this property has no effect.
ast.target: 如果内容适合 CSS 区域，则此属性无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The 'region-fragment' property controls the behavior of the last region associated with a named flow.
ast.target: “region-fragment”属性控制与命名流关联的最后一个区域的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Determines whether a user can edit the content of an element.
ast.target: 确定用户是否可以编辑元素的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the minimum number of line boxes of a block container that must be left in a fragment after a break.
ast.target: 指定在分页后必须留在片段中的块容器的最小行框数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the width of the content area, padding area or border area (depending on 'box-sizing') of certain boxes.
ast.target: 指定某些框的内容区域、内边距区域或边框区域的宽度（取决于“box-sizing”）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Expresses no particular intent.
ast.target: 不表达特定意图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the author expects to animate or change something about the element's contents in the near future.
ast.target: 表示作者预计在不久的将来会动画化或更改元素内容的某些方面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the author expects to animate or change the scroll position of the element in the near future.
ast.target: 表示作者预计在不久的将来会动画化或更改元素的滚动位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Provides a rendering hint to the user agent, stating what kinds of changes the author expects to perform on the element.
ast.target: 向用户代理提供渲染提示，说明作者预计会对元素执行何种更改。

ast.name: description
ast.source: No additional spacing is applied. Computes to zero.
ast.target: 不应用额外间距。计算为零。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies additional spacing between "words".
ast.target: 指定“单词”之间的额外间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Top-to-bottom block flow direction. The writing mode is horizontal.
ast.target: 从上到下的块流方向。书写模式为水平。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Left-to-right block flow direction. The writing mode is vertical, while the typographic mode is horizontal.
ast.target: 从左到右的块流方向。书写模式为垂直，而排版模式为水平。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right-to-left block flow direction. The writing mode is vertical, while the typographic mode is horizontal.
ast.target: 从右到左的块流方向。书写模式为垂直，而排版模式为水平。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Left-to-right block flow direction. The writing mode is vertical.
ast.target: 从左到右的块流方向。书写模式为垂直。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Right-to-left block flow direction. The writing mode is vertical.
ast.target: 从右到左的块流方向。书写模式为垂直。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This is a shorthand property for both 'direction' and 'block-progression'.
ast.target: 这是“direction”和“block-progression”的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The stack level of the generated box in the current stacking context is 0. The box does not establish a new stacking context unless it is the root element.
ast.target: 生成的框在当前堆叠上下文中的堆叠级别为 0。除非是根元素，否则该框不会建立新的堆叠上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For a positioned box, the 'z-index' property specifies the stack level of the box in the current stacking context and whether the box establishes a local stacking context.
ast.target: 对于定位框，“z-index”属性指定该框在当前堆叠上下文中的堆叠级别，以及该框是否建立局部堆叠上下文。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Specifies the magnification scale of the object. See 'transform: scale()' for a standards-based alternative.
ast.target: 非标准。指定对象的缩放比例。有关基于标准的替代方案，请参见“transform: scale()”。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Aligns the Input Method Editor (IME) candidate window box relative to the element on which the IME composition is active.
ast.target: 将输入法编辑器（IME）候选窗口框相对于 IME 组合活动所在的元素进行对齐。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-binding CSS property is used by Mozilla-based applications to attach an XBL binding to a DOM element.
ast.target: -moz-binding CSS 属性被基于 Mozilla 的应用程序用于将 XBL 绑定附加到 DOM 元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The non-standard -moz-float-edge CSS property specifies whether the height and width properties of the element include the margin, border, or padding thickness.
ast.target: 非标准的 -moz-float-edge CSS 属性指定元素的 height 和 width 属性是否包含边距、边框或内边距厚度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-force-broken-image-icon extended CSS property can be used to force the broken image icon to be shown even when a broken image has an alt attribute.
ast.target: -moz-force-broken-image-icon 扩展 CSS 属性可用于强制显示损坏图像图标，即使损坏的图像具有 alt 属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: For certain XUL elements and pseudo-elements that use an image from the list-style-image property, this property specifies a region of the image that is used in place of the whole image. This allows elements to use different pieces of the same image to improve performance.
ast.target: 对于某些使用 list-style-image 属性中图像的 XUL 元素和伪元素，此属性指定用于替代整个图像的图像区域。这允许元素使用同一图像的不同部分以提高性能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-orient CSS property specifies the orientation of the element to which it's applied.
ast.target: -moz-orient CSS 属性指定应用它的元素的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In Mozilla applications like Firefox, the -moz-outline-radius CSS property can be used to give an element's outline rounded corners.
ast.target: 在 Mozilla 应用程序（如 Firefox）中，-moz-outline-radius CSS 属性可用于为元素的轮廓添加圆角。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In Mozilla applications, the -moz-outline-radius-bottomleft CSS property can be used to round the bottom-left corner of an element's outline.
ast.target: 在 Mozilla 应用程序中，-moz-outline-radius-bottomleft CSS 属性可用于将元素轮廓的左下角变为圆角。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In Mozilla applications, the -moz-outline-radius-bottomright CSS property can be used to round the bottom-right corner of an element's outline.
ast.target: 在 Mozilla 应用程序中，-moz-outline-radius-bottomright CSS 属性可用于将元素轮廓的右下角变为圆角。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In Mozilla applications, the -moz-outline-radius-topleft CSS property can be used to round the top-left corner of an element's outline.
ast.target: 在 Mozilla 应用程序中，-moz-outline-radius-topleft CSS 属性可用于将元素轮廓的左上角变为圆角。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In Mozilla applications, the -moz-outline-radius-topright CSS property can be used to round the top-right corner of an element's outline.
ast.target: 在 Mozilla 应用程序中，-moz-outline-radius-topright CSS 属性可用于将元素轮廓的右上角变为圆角。

ast.name: description
ast.source: -moz-stack-sizing is an extended CSS property. Normally, a stack will change its size so that all of its child elements are completely visible. For example, moving a child of the stack far to the right will widen the stack so the child remains visible.
ast.target: -moz-stack-sizing 是一个扩展 CSS 属性。通常，堆栈会改变其大小，以便其所有子元素完全可见。例如，将堆栈的一个子元素向右移动很远，将加宽堆栈以使该子元素保持可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-text-blink non-standard Mozilla CSS extension specifies the blink mode.
ast.target: -moz-text-blink 非标准 Mozilla CSS 扩展指定闪烁模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: In Mozilla applications, -moz-user-input determines if an element will accept user input.
ast.target: 在 Mozilla 应用程序中，-moz-user-input 确定元素是否接受用户输入。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-user-modify property has no effect. It was originally planned to determine whether or not the content of an element can be edited by a user.
ast.target: -moz-user-modify 属性无效。它最初计划用于确定元素的内容是否可由用户编辑。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-window-dragging CSS property specifies whether a window is draggable or not. It only works in Chrome code, and only on Mac OS X.
ast.target: -moz-window-dragging CSS 属性用于指定窗口是否可拖动。此属性仅在 Chrome 代码中有效，且仅适用于 Mac OS X。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-window-shadow CSS property specifies whether a window will have a shadow. It only works on Mac OS X.
ast.target: -moz-window-shadow CSS 属性用于指定窗口是否具有阴影。此属性仅适用于 Mac OS X。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-border-before CSS property is a shorthand property for setting the individual logical block start border property values in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: -webkit-border-before CSS 属性是一个简写属性，用于在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑块起始边框的属性值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-border-before-color CSS property sets the color of the individual logical block start border in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: -webkit-border-before-color CSS 属性用于在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑块起始边框的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-border-before-style CSS property sets the style of the individual logical block start border in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: -webkit-border-before-style CSS 属性用于在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑块起始边框的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-border-before-width CSS property sets the width of the individual logical block start border in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: -webkit-border-before-width CSS 属性用于在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑块起始边框的宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-line-clamp CSS property allows limiting of the contents of a block container to the specified number of lines.
ast.target: -webkit-line-clamp CSS 属性允许将块容器的内容限制在指定的行数内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask CSS property alters the visibility of an element by either partially or fully hiding it. This is accomplished by either masking or clipping the image at specific points.
ast.target: mask CSS 属性通过部分或完全隐藏元素来改变其可见性。这是通过在特定点遮罩或裁剪图像来实现的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If a -webkit-mask-image is specified, -webkit-mask-attachment determines whether the mask image's position is fixed within the viewport, or scrolls along with its containing block.
ast.target: 如果指定了 -webkit-mask-image，-webkit-mask-attachment 将决定遮罩图像的位置是固定在视口内，还是随其包含块一起滚动。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-mask-composite property specifies the manner in which multiple mask images applied to the same element are composited with one another. Mask images are composited in the opposite order that they are declared with the -webkit-mask-image property.
ast.target: -webkit-mask-composite 属性指定应用于同一元素的多个遮罩图像相互合成的方式。遮罩图像的合成顺序与它们在 -webkit-mask-image 属性中声明的顺序相反。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-position CSS property sets the initial position, relative to the mask position layer defined by mask-origin, for each defined mask image.
ast.target: mask-position CSS 属性为每个已定义的遮罩图像设置初始位置，该位置相对于由 mask-origin 定义的遮罩位置层。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-mask-position-x CSS property sets the initial horizontal position of a mask image.
ast.target: -webkit-mask-position-x CSS 属性设置遮罩图像的初始水平位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-mask-position-y CSS property sets the initial vertical position of a mask image.
ast.target: -webkit-mask-position-y CSS 属性设置遮罩图像的初始垂直位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-mask-repeat-x property specifies whether and how a mask image is repeated (tiled) horizontally.
ast.target: -webkit-mask-repeat-x 属性指定遮罩图像是否以及如何在水平方向上重复（平铺）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -webkit-mask-repeat-y property specifies whether and how a mask image is repeated (tiled) vertically.
ast.target: -webkit-mask-repeat-y 属性指定遮罩图像是否以及如何在垂直方向上重复（平铺）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the elements accent
ast.target: 设置元素强调色的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The align-tracks CSS property sets the alignment in the masonry axis for grid containers that have masonry in their block axis.
ast.target: align-tracks CSS 属性为在其块轴具有砌体布局的网格容器设置砌体轴上的对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The composite operation to use when multiple animations affect the same property.
ast.target: 当多个动画影响同一属性时使用的合成操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The animation-range CSS shorthand property is used to set the start and end of an animation's attachment range along its timeline, i.e. where along the timeline an animation will start and end.
ast.target: animation-range CSS 简写属性用于设置动画在其时间线上附加范围的起始和结束位置，即动画将在时间线的何处开始和结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The animation-range-end CSS property is used to set the end of an animation's attachment range along its timeline, i.e. where along the timeline an animation will end.
ast.target: animation-range-end CSS 属性用于设置动画在其时间线上附加范围的结束位置，即动画将在时间线的何处结束。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The animation-range-start CSS property is used to set the start of an animation's attachment range along its timeline, i.e. where along the timeline an animation will start.
ast.target: animation-range-start CSS 属性用于设置动画在其时间线上附加范围的起始位置，即动画将在时间线的何处开始。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the names of one or more @scroll-timeline at-rules to describe the element's scroll animations.
ast.target: 指定一个或多个 @scroll-timeline at 规则的名称，以描述元素的滚动动画。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The aspect-ratio   CSS property sets a preferred aspect ratio for the box, which will be used in the calculation of auto sizes and some other layout functions.
ast.target: aspect-ratio CSS 属性为盒子设置首选宽高比，该宽高比将用于计算自动尺寸和某些其他布局功能。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The backdrop-filter CSS property lets you apply graphical effects such as blurring or color shifting to the area behind an element. Because it applies to everything behind the element, to see the effect you must make the element or its background at least partially transparent.
ast.target: backdrop-filter CSS 属性允许您对元素后面的区域应用图形效果，例如模糊或颜色偏移。由于它应用于元素后面的所有内容，要看到效果，您必须使元素或其背景至少部分透明。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The border-block CSS property is a shorthand property for setting the individual logical block border property values in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: border-block CSS 属性是一个简写属性，用于在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑块边框的属性值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The border-end-end-radius CSS property defines a logical border radius on an element, which maps to a physical border radius that depends on on the element's writing-mode, direction, and text-orientation.
ast.target: border-end-end-radius CSS 属性在元素上定义一个逻辑边框半径，该半径映射到一个物理边框半径，具体取决于元素的书写模式、方向和文本方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The border-end-start-radius CSS property defines a logical border radius on an element, which maps to a physical border radius depending on the element's writing-mode, direction, and text-orientation.
ast.target: border-end-start-radius CSS 属性在元素上定义一个逻辑边框半径，该半径映射到一个物理边框半径，具体取决于元素的书写模式、方向和文本方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The border-inline CSS property is a shorthand property for setting the individual logical inline border property values in a single place in the style sheet.
ast.target: border-inline CSS 属性是一个简写属性，用于在样式表中一次性设置各个逻辑行内边框的属性值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The border-start-end-radius CSS property defines a logical border radius on an element, which maps to a physical border radius depending on the element's writing-mode, direction, and text-orientation.
ast.target: border-start-end-radius CSS 属性在元素上定义一个逻辑边框半径，该半径映射到一个物理边框半径，具体取决于元素的书写模式、方向和文本方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The border-start-start-radius CSS property defines a logical border radius on an element, which maps to a physical border radius that depends on the element's writing-mode, direction, and text-orientation.
ast.target: border-start-start-radius CSS 属性在元素上定义一个逻辑边框半径，该半径映射到一个物理边框半径，具体取决于元素的书写模式、方向和文本方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box-align CSS property specifies how an element aligns its contents across its layout in a perpendicular direction. The effect of the property is only visible if there is extra space in the box.
ast.target: box-align CSS 属性指定元素如何在其布局的垂直方向上对齐其内容。仅当盒子中存在额外空间时，该属性的效果才可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box-direction CSS property specifies whether a box lays out its contents normally (from the top or left edge), or in reverse (from the bottom or right edge).
ast.target: box-direction CSS 属性指定盒子是正常布局其内容（从顶部或左侧边缘开始），还是反向布局（从底部或右侧边缘开始）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-box-flex and -webkit-box-flex CSS properties specify how a -moz-box or -webkit-box grows to fill the box that contains it, in the direction of the containing box's layout.
ast.target: -moz-box-flex 和 -webkit-box-flex CSS 属性指定 -moz-box 或 -webkit-box 如何沿包含它的盒子的布局方向增长以填充该盒子。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box-flex-group CSS property assigns the flexbox's child elements to a flex group.
ast.target: box-flex-group CSS 属性将弹性盒子的子元素分配给一个弹性组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box-lines CSS property determines whether the box may have a single or multiple lines (rows for horizontally oriented boxes, columns for vertically oriented boxes).
ast.target: box-lines CSS 属性决定盒子是具有单行还是多行（对于水平方向的盒子是行，对于垂直方向的盒子是列）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box-ordinal-group CSS property assigns the flexbox's child elements to an ordinal group.
ast.target: box-ordinal-group CSS 属性将弹性盒子的子元素分配给一个序数组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The box-orient CSS property specifies whether an element lays out its contents horizontally or vertically.
ast.target: box-orient CSS 属性指定元素是水平还是垂直布局其内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The -moz-box-pack and -webkit-box-pack CSS properties specify how a -moz-box or -webkit-box packs its contents in the direction of its layout. The effect of this is only visible if there is extra space in the box.
ast.target: -moz-box-pack 和 -webkit-box-pack CSS 属性指定 -moz-box 或 -webkit-box 如何沿其布局方向打包其内容。仅当盒子中存在额外空间时，该效果才可见。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Shorthand for setting caret-color and caret-shape.
ast.target: 设置 caret-color 和 caret-shape 的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the desired shape of the text insertion caret.
ast.target: 指定文本插入光标的期望形状。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The color-scheme CSS property allows an element to indicate which color schemes it can comfortably be rendered in.
ast.target: color-scheme CSS 属性允许元素指示它可以舒适地渲染在哪些配色方案中。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Size of an element when the element is subject to size containment.
ast.target: 当元素受尺寸包含约束时的元素尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Block size of an element when the element is subject to size containment.
ast.target: 当元素受尺寸包含约束时的元素块尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Height of an element when the element is subject to size containment.
ast.target: 当元素受尺寸包含约束时的元素高度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Inline size of an element when the element is subject to size containment.
ast.target: 当元素受尺寸包含约束时的元素行内尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Width of an element when the element is subject to size containment.
ast.target: 当元素受尺寸包含约束时的元素宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The container shorthand CSS property establishes the element as a query container and specifies the name or name for the containment context used in a container query.
ast.target: container 简写 CSS 属性将元素建立为查询容器，并指定容器查询中使用的包含上下文的名称或名称。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The container-name CSS property specifies a list of query container names used by the @container at-rule in a container query.
ast.target: container-name CSS 属性指定容器查询中 @container at 规则使用的查询容器名称列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The container-type CSS property is used to define the type of containment used in a container query.
ast.target: container-type CSS 属性用于定义容器查询中使用的包含类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Controls whether or not an element renders its contents at all, along with forcing a strong set of containments, allowing user agents to potentially omit large swathes of layout and rendering work until it becomes needed.
ast.target: 控制元素是否渲染其内容，并强制执行一组强包含，允许用户代理在需要之前可能省略大量的布局和渲染工作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The counter-set CSS property sets a CSS counter to a given value. It manipulates the value of existing counters, and will only create new counters if there isn't already a counter of the given name on the element.
ast.target: counter-set CSS 属性用于将 CSS 计数器设置为给定值。它操作现有计数器的值，并且仅当元素上不存在给定名称的计数器时才会创建新计数器。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-optical-sizing CSS property allows developers to control whether browsers render text with slightly differing visual representations to optimize viewing at different sizes, or not. This only works for fonts that have an optical size variation axis.
ast.target: font-optical-sizing CSS 属性允许开发者控制浏览器是否以略有不同的视觉表现形式渲染文本，以优化不同尺寸下的显示效果。此属性仅适用于具有光学尺寸变化轴的字体。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-palette CSS property allows specifying one of the many palettes contained in a font that a user agent should use for the font. Users can also override the values in a palette or create a new palette by using the @font-palette-values at-rule.
ast.target: font-palette CSS 属性允许指定字体中包含的众多调色板之一，供用户代理用于该字体。用户还可以通过使用 @font-palette-values at 规则来覆盖调色板中的值或创建新的调色板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-variation-settings CSS property provides low-level control over OpenType or TrueType font variations, by specifying the four letter axis names of the features you want to vary, along with their variation values.
ast.target: font-variation-settings CSS 属性通过指定要变化的特征的四字母轴名称及其变化值，提供对 OpenType 或 TrueType 字体变化的底层控制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-smooth CSS property controls the application of anti-aliasing when fonts are rendered.
ast.target: font-smooth CSS 属性控制字体渲染时抗锯齿的应用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-synthesis-position CSS property lets you specify whether or not a browser may synthesize the subscript and superscript "position" typefaces when they are missing in a font family, while using font-variant-position to set the positions.
ast.target: font-synthesis-position CSS 属性允许您指定当字体系列中缺少下标和上标“位置”字形时，浏览器是否可以合成它们，同时使用 font-variant-position 来设置位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-synthesis-small-caps CSS property lets you specify whether or not the browser may synthesize small-caps typeface when it is missing in a font family. Small-caps glyphs typically use the form of uppercase letters but are reduced to the size of lowercase letters.
ast.target: font-synthesis-small-caps CSS 属性允许您指定当字体系列中缺少小型大写字母字形时，浏览器是否可以合成它们。小型大写字母字形通常使用大写字母的形式，但尺寸缩小到小写字母的大小。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-synthesis-style CSS property lets you specify whether or not the browser may synthesize the oblique typeface when it is missing in a font family.
ast.target: font-synthesis-style CSS 属性允许您指定当字体系列中缺少斜体字形时，浏览器是否可以合成它们。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-synthesis-weight CSS property lets you specify whether or not the browser may synthesize the bold typeface when it is missing in a font family.
ast.target: font-synthesis-weight CSS 属性允许您指定当字体系列中缺少粗体字形时，浏览器是否可以合成它们。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-variant-emoji CSS property specifies the default presentation style for displaying emojis.
ast.target: font-variant-emoji CSS 属性指定显示表情符号的默认呈现样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows authors to opt certain elements out of forced colors mode. This then restores the control of those values to CSS
ast.target: 允许作者将某些元素排除在强制颜色模式之外。这随后将这些值的控制权交还给 CSS。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The gap CSS property is a shorthand property for row-gap and column-gap specifying the gutters between grid rows and columns.
ast.target: gap CSS 属性是 row-gap 和 column-gap 的简写属性，用于指定网格行和列之间的间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hanging-punctuation CSS property specifies whether a punctuation mark should hang at the start or end of a line of text. Hanging punctuation may be placed outside the line box.
ast.target: hanging-punctuation CSS 属性指定标点符号是否应悬挂在文本行的开头或结尾。悬挂标点可以放置在行框之外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A hyphenate character used at the end of a line.
ast.target: 用于行尾的连字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The hyphenate-limit-chars CSS property specifies the minimum word length to allow hyphenation of words as well as the minimum number of characters before and after the hyphen.
ast.target: hyphenate-limit-chars CSS 属性指定允许单词连字符断行的最小单词长度，以及连字符前后所需的最小字符数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The initial-letter CSS property specifies styling for dropped, raised, and sunken initial letters.
ast.target: initial-letter CSS 属性指定下沉、上浮和嵌入首字母的样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The initial-letter-align CSS property specifies the alignment of initial letters within a paragraph.
ast.target: initial-letter-align CSS 属性指定段落内首字母的对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Enables or disables the obscuring a sensitive test input.
ast.target: 启用或禁用对敏感测试输入的遮蔽。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The justify-tracks CSS property sets the alignment in the masonry axis for grid containers that have masonry in their inline axis
ast.target: justify-tracks CSS 属性为在其内联轴上具有砌体布局的网格容器设置砌体轴上的对齐方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The line-height-step CSS property defines the step units for line box heights. When the step unit is positive, line box heights are rounded up to the closest multiple of the unit. Negative values are invalid.
ast.target: line-height-step CSS 属性定义行框高度的步进单位。当步进单位为正数时，行框高度将向上舍入到最接近的单位倍数。负值无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The margin-block CSS property defines the logical block start and end margins of an element, which maps to physical margins depending on the element's writing mode, directionality, and text orientation.
ast.target: margin-block CSS 属性定义元素的逻辑块起始和结束外边距，这些外边距根据元素的书写模式、方向性和文本方向映射到物理外边距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The margin-inline CSS property defines the logical inline start and end margins of an element, which maps to physical margins depending on the element's writing mode, directionality, and text orientation.
ast.target: margin-inline CSS 属性定义元素的逻辑内联起始和结束外边距，这些外边距根据元素的书写模式、方向性和文本方向映射到物理外边距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The margin-trim property allows the container to trim the margins of its children where they adjoin the container’s edges.
ast.target: margin-trim 属性允许容器在其子元素的外边距与容器边缘相邻时对其进行修剪。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-border-mode CSS property specifies the blending mode used in a mask border.
ast.target: mask-border-mode CSS 属性指定在遮罩边框中使用的混合模式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-border-outset CSS property specifies the distance by which an element's mask border is set out from its border box.
ast.target: mask-border-outset CSS 属性指定元素的遮罩边框从其边框盒向外设置的距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-border-repeat CSS property defines how the edge regions of a source image are adjusted to fit the dimensions of an element's mask border.
ast.target: mask-border-repeat CSS 属性定义如何调整源图像的边缘区域以适应元素遮罩边框的尺寸。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-border-slice CSS property divides the image specified by mask-border-source into regions. These regions are used to form the components of an element's mask border.
ast.target: mask-border-slice CSS 属性将 mask-border-source 指定的图像划分为区域。这些区域用于构成元素遮罩边框的各个部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The mask-border-source CSS property specifies the source image used to create an element's mask border.

The mask-border-slice property is used to divide the source image into regions, which are then dynamically applied to the final mask border.
ast.target: mask-border-source CSS 属性指定用于创建元素遮罩边框的源图像。\n\nmask-border-slice 属性用于将源图像划分为区域，然后这些区域被动态应用到最终的遮罩边框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-border-width CSS property specifies the width of an element's mask border.
ast.target: mask-border-width CSS 属性指定元素遮罩边框的宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-clip CSS property determines the area, which is affected by a mask. The painted content of an element must be restricted to this area.
ast.target: mask-clip CSS 属性决定受遮罩影响的区域。元素的绘制内容必须限制在此区域内。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The mask-composite CSS property represents a compositing operation used on the current mask layer with the mask layers below it.
ast.target: mask-composite CSS 属性表示在当前遮罩层与其下方的遮罩层之间使用的合成操作。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The masonry-auto-flow CSS property modifies how items are placed when using masonry in CSS Grid Layout.
ast.target: masonry-auto-flow CSS 属性修改在 CSS 网格布局中使用砌体布局时项目的放置方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describe a notion of "depth" for each element of a mathematical formula, with respect to the top-level container of that formula.
ast.target: 描述数学公式中每个元素相对于该公式顶层容器的“深度”概念。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used for positioning superscript during the layout of MathML scripted elements.
ast.target: 用于在 MathML 脚本元素的布局中定位上标。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The math-style property indicates whether MathML equations should render with normal or compact height.
ast.target: math-style 属性指示 MathML 方程应以正常高度还是紧凑高度渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The max-lines property forces a break after a set number of lines
ast.target: max-lines 属性在达到设定行数后强制换行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The offset CSS property is a shorthand property for animating an element along a defined path.
ast.target: offset CSS 属性是沿定义路径为元素设置动画的简写属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines an anchor point of the box positioned along the path. The anchor point specifies the point of the box which is to be considered as the point that is moved along the path.
ast.target: 定义沿路径定位的盒子的锚点。锚点指定盒子上被视为沿路径移动的点。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The offset-distance CSS property specifies a position along an offset-path.
ast.target: offset-distance CSS 属性指定沿偏移路径的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the initial position of the offset path. If position is specified with static, offset-position would be ignored.
ast.target: 指定偏移路径的初始位置。如果使用 static 指定位置，则 offset-position 将被忽略。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The offset-rotate CSS property defines the direction of the element while positioning along the offset path.
ast.target: offset-rotate CSS 属性定义元素沿偏移路径定位时的方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overflow-anchor CSS property provides a way to opt out browser scroll anchoring behavior which adjusts scroll position to minimize content shifts.
ast.target: overflow-anchor CSS 属性提供了一种退出浏览器滚动锚定行为的方法，该行为会调整滚动位置以最小化内容偏移。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overflow-block CSS media feature can be used to test how the output device handles content that overflows the initial containing block along the block axis.
ast.target: overflow-block CSS 媒体特征可用于测试输出设备如何处理沿块轴溢出初始包含块的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overflow-clip-box CSS property specifies relative to which box the clipping happens when there is an overflow. It is short hand for the overflow-clip-box-inline and overflow-clip-box-block properties.
ast.target: overflow-clip-box CSS 属性指定当发生溢出时，相对于哪个盒子进行裁剪。它是 overflow-clip-box-inline 和 overflow-clip-box-block 属性的简写。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overflow-clip-margin CSS property determines how far outside its bounds an element with overflow: clip may be painted before being clipped.
ast.target: overflow-clip-margin CSS 属性确定具有 overflow: clip 的元素在被裁剪之前可以在其边界之外绘制多远。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overflow-inline CSS media feature can be used to test how the output device handles content that overflows the initial containing block along the inline axis.
ast.target: overflow-inline CSS 媒体特征可用于测试输出设备如何处理沿内联轴溢出初始包含块的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overscroll-behavior CSS property is shorthand for the overscroll-behavior-x and overscroll-behavior-y properties, which allow you to control the browser's scroll overflow behavior — what happens when the boundary of a scrolling area is reached.
ast.target: overscroll-behavior CSS 属性是 overscroll-behavior-x 和 overscroll-behavior-y 属性的简写，允许您控制浏览器的滚动溢出行为——即当到达滚动区域边界时会发生什么。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overscroll-behavior-block CSS property sets the browser's behavior when the block direction boundary of a scrolling area is reached.
ast.target: overscroll-behavior-block CSS 属性设置当到达滚动区域的块方向边界时浏览器的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overscroll-behavior-inline CSS property sets the browser's behavior when the inline direction boundary of a scrolling area is reached.
ast.target: overscroll-behavior-inline CSS 属性设置当到达滚动区域的内联方向边界时浏览器的行为。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overscroll-behavior-x CSS property is allows you to control the browser's scroll overflow behavior — what happens when the boundary of a scrolling area is reached — in the x axis direction.
ast.target: overscroll-behavior-x CSS 属性允许您控制浏览器在 x 轴方向上的滚动溢出行为——即当到达滚动区域边界时会发生什么。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The overscroll-behavior-y CSS property is allows you to control the browser's scroll overflow behavior — what happens when the boundary of a scrolling area is reached — in the y axis direction.
ast.target: overscroll-behavior-y CSS 属性允许您控制浏览器的滚动溢出行为——即当滚动区域的边界被触及时会发生什么——在 y 轴方向上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The padding-block CSS property defines the logical block start and end padding of an element, which maps to physical padding properties depending on the element's writing mode, directionality, and text orientation.
ast.target: padding-block CSS 属性定义元素的逻辑块起始和结束内边距，根据元素的书写模式、方向性和文本方向，映射到物理内边距属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The padding-inline CSS property defines the logical inline start and end padding of an element, which maps to physical padding properties depending on the element's writing mode, directionality, and text orientation.
ast.target: padding-inline CSS 属性定义元素的逻辑行内起始和结束内边距，根据元素的书写模式、方向性和文本方向，映射到物理内边距属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The page CSS property is used to specify the named page, a specific type of page defined by the @page at-rule.
ast.target: page CSS 属性用于指定命名页面，即由 @page at 规则定义的特定页面类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The place-content CSS shorthand property sets both the align-content and justify-content properties.
ast.target: place-content CSS 简写属性同时设置 align-content 和 justify-content 属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The CSS place-items shorthand property sets both the align-items and justify-items properties. The first value is the align-items property value, the second the justify-items one. If the second value is not present, the first value is also used for it.
ast.target: CSS place-items 简写属性同时设置 align-items 和 justify-items 属性。第一个值是 align-items 属性值，第二个是 justify-items 属性值。如果第二个值不存在，则第一个值也用于它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The place-self CSS property is a shorthand property sets both the align-self and justify-self properties. The first value is the align-self property value, the second the justify-self one. If the second value is not present, the first value is also used for it.
ast.target: place-self CSS 属性是一个简写属性，同时设置 align-self 和 justify-self 属性。第一个值是 align-self 属性值，第二个是 justify-self 属性值。如果第二个值不存在，则第一个值也用于它。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines what optimization the user agent is allowed to do when adjusting the appearance for an output device.
ast.target: 定义当为输出设备调整外观时，允许用户代理进行何种优化。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The rotate CSS property allows you to specify rotation transforms individually and independently of the transform property. This maps better to typical user interface usage, and saves having to remember the exact order of transform functions to specify in the transform value.
ast.target: rotate CSS 属性允许您单独且独立于 transform 属性来指定旋转变换。这更符合典型的用户界面用法，并且无需记住在 transform 值中指定变换函数的确切顺序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The row-gap CSS property specifies the gutter between grid rows.
ast.target: row-gap CSS 属性指定网格行之间的间距。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This property controls how ruby annotation boxes should be rendered when there are more than one in a ruby container box: whether each pair should be kept separate, the annotations should be collapsed and rendered as a group, or the separation should be determined based on the space available.
ast.target: 此属性控制当 ruby 容器框中存在多个 ruby 注释框时应如何渲染它们：是保持每对分离、将注释折叠并作为一组渲染，还是根据可用空间确定分离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scale CSS property allows you to specify scale transforms individually and independently of the transform property. This maps better to typical user interface usage, and saves having to remember the exact order of transform functions to specify in the transform value.
ast.target: scale CSS 属性允许您单独且独立于 transform 属性来指定缩放变换。这更符合典型的用户界面用法，并且无需记住在 transform 值中指定变换函数的确切顺序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scrollbar-color CSS property sets the color of the scrollbar track and thumb.
ast.target: scrollbar-color CSS 属性设置滚动条轨道和滑块的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scrollbar-gutter CSS property allows authors to reserve space for the scrollbar, preventing unwanted layout changes as the content grows while also avoiding unnecessary visuals when scrolling isn't needed.
ast.target: scrollbar-gutter CSS 属性允许作者为滚动条预留空间，防止在内容增长时出现不必要的布局更改，同时在不需要滚动时避免不必要的视觉元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scrollbar-width property allows the author to set the maximum thickness of an element’s scrollbars when they are shown.
