ast.target: scrollbar-width 属性允许作者设置元素滚动条显示时的最大厚度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin property is a shorthand property which sets all of the scroll-margin longhands, assigning values much like the margin property does for the margin-* longhands.
ast.target: scroll-margin 属性是一个简写属性，设置所有 scroll-margin 长手属性，其赋值方式类似于 margin 属性对 margin-* 长手属性的赋值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-block property is a shorthand property which sets the scroll-margin longhands in the block dimension.
ast.target: scroll-margin-block 属性是一个简写属性，设置块维度中的 scroll-margin 长手属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-margin-inline property is a shorthand property which sets the scroll-margin longhands in the inline dimension.
ast.target: scroll-margin-inline 属性是一个简写属性，设置行内维度中的 scroll-margin 长手属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-padding property is a shorthand property which sets all of the scroll-padding longhands, assigning values much like the padding property does for the padding-* longhands.
ast.target: scroll-padding 属性是一个简写属性，设置所有 scroll-padding 长手属性，其赋值方式类似于 padding 属性对 padding-* 长手属性的赋值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-padding-block property is a shorthand property which sets the scroll-padding longhands for the block dimension.
ast.target: scroll-padding-block 属性是一个简写属性，设置块维度的 scroll-padding 长手属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-padding-inline property is a shorthand property which sets the scroll-padding longhands for the inline dimension.
ast.target: scroll-padding-inline 属性是一个简写属性，设置行内维度的 scroll-padding 长手属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The scroll-snap-stop CSS property defines whether the scroll container is allowed to "pass over" possible snap positions.
ast.target: scroll-snap-stop CSS 属性定义滚动容器是否允许“跳过”可能的吸附位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The scroll-snap-type-y CSS property defines how strictly snap points are enforced on the vertical axis of the scroll container in case there is one.

Specifying any precise animations or physics used to enforce those snap points is not covered by this property but instead left up to the user agent.
ast.target: scroll-snap-type-y CSS 属性定义在滚动容器的垂直轴上（如果存在）强制执行吸附点的严格程度。\n\n指定用于强制执行这些吸附点的任何精确动画或物理效果不在此属性范围内，而是由用户代理决定。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines a name that can be used to identify the source element of a scroll timeline, along with the scrollbar axis that should provide the timeline.
ast.target: 定义一个名称，可用于标识滚动时间线的源元素，以及应提供时间线的滚动条轴。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the scrollbar that will be used to provide the timeline for a scroll-timeline animation
ast.target: 指定将用于为 scroll-timeline 动画提供时间线的滚动条。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines a name that can be used to identify an element as the source of a scroll-timeline.
ast.target: 定义一个名称，可用于将元素标识为滚动时间线的源。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-decoration-skip CSS property specifies what parts of the element’s content any text decoration affecting the element must skip over. It controls all text decoration lines drawn by the element and also any text decoration lines drawn by its ancestors.
ast.target: text-decoration-skip CSS 属性指定元素内容的哪些部分必须跳过任何影响该元素的文本装饰。它控制元素绘制的所有文本装饰线，以及其祖先绘制的任何文本装饰线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-decoration-skip-ink CSS property specifies how overlines and underlines are drawn when they pass over glyph ascenders and descenders.
ast.target: text-decoration-skip-ink CSS 属性指定当上划线和下划线经过字形上升部和下降部时如何绘制。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-decoration-thickness CSS property sets the thickness, or width, of the decoration line that is used on text in an element, such as a line-through, underline, or overline.
ast.target: text-decoration-thickness CSS 属性设置用于元素中文本的装饰线（如删除线、下划线或上划线）的粗细或宽度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-emphasis CSS property is a shorthand property for setting text-emphasis-style and text-emphasis-color in one declaration. This property will apply the specified emphasis mark to each character of the element's text, except separator characters, like spaces,  and control characters.
ast.target: text-emphasis CSS 属性是一个简写属性，用于在一条声明中设置 text-emphasis-style 和 text-emphasis-color。此属性将指定的强调标记应用于元素文本的每个字符，但分隔符字符（如空格）和控制字符除外。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-emphasis-color CSS property defines the color used to draw emphasis marks on text being rendered in the HTML document. This value can also be set and reset using the text-emphasis shorthand.
ast.target: text-emphasis-color CSS 属性定义用于在 HTML 文档中渲染的文本上绘制强调标记的颜色。此值也可以使用 text-emphasis 简写属性进行设置和重置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-emphasis-position CSS property describes where emphasis marks are drawn at. The effect of emphasis marks on the line height is the same as for ruby text: if there isn't enough place, the line height is increased.
ast.target: text-emphasis-position CSS 属性描述强调标记绘制的位置。强调标记对行高的影响与 ruby 文本相同：如果没有足够的空间，行高会增加。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-emphasis-style CSS property defines the type of emphasis used. It can also be set, and reset, using the text-emphasis shorthand.
ast.target: text-emphasis-style CSS 属性定义所使用的强调类型。它也可以使用 text-emphasis 简写属性进行设置和重置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-size-adjust CSS property controls the text inflation algorithm used on some smartphones and tablets. Other browsers will ignore this property.
ast.target: text-size-adjust CSS 属性控制某些智能手机和平板电脑上使用的文本膨胀算法。其他浏览器将忽略此属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-underline-offset CSS property sets the offset distance of an underline text decoration line (applied using text-decoration) from its original position.
ast.target: text-underline-offset CSS 属性设置下划线文本装饰线（使用 text-decoration 应用）与其原始位置的偏移距离。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The text-wrap CSS property controls how text inside an element is wrapped.
ast.target: text-wrap CSS 属性控制元素内文本的换行方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The timeline-scope CSS property modifies the scope of a named animation timeline.
ast.target: timeline-scope CSS 属性修改命名动画时间线的作用域。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The transform-box CSS property defines the layout box to which the transform and transform-origin properties relate.
ast.target: transform-box CSS 属性定义 transform 和 transform-origin 属性所关联的布局框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The transition-behavior CSS property specifies whether transitions will be started for properties whose animation behavior is discrete.
ast.target: transition-behavior CSS 属性指定是否为动画行为为离散的属性启动过渡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The translate CSS property allows you to specify translation transforms individually and independently of the transform property. This maps better to typical user interface usage, and saves having to remember the exact order of transform functions to specify in the transform value.
ast.target: translate CSS 属性允许您单独且独立于 transform 属性来指定平移变换。这更符合典型的用户界面用法，并且无需记住在 transform 值中指定变换函数的确切顺序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The view-timeline CSS shorthand property is used to define a named view progress timeline, which is progressed through based on the change in visibility of an element (known as the subject) inside a scrollable element (scroller). view-timeline is set on the subject.
ast.target: view-timeline CSS 简写属性用于定义一个命名的视图进度时间线，该时间线基于元素（称为主体）在可滚动元素（滚动器）内可见性的变化而推进。view-timeline 设置在主体上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The view-timeline-name CSS property is used to define the name of a named view progress timeline, which is progressed through based on the change in visibility of an element (known as the subject) inside a scrollable element (scroller). view-timeline is set on the subject.
ast.target: view-timeline-name CSS 属性用于定义命名视图进度时间线的名称，该时间线基于元素（称为主体）在可滚动元素（滚动器）内可见性的变化而推进。view-timeline 设置在主体上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The view-transition-name CSS property provides the selected element with a distinct identifying name (a custom-ident) and causes it to participate in a separate view transition from the root view transition — or no view transition if the none value is specified.
ast.target: view-transition-name CSS 属性为选定的元素提供一个独特的标识名称（自定义标识），并使其参与与根视图过渡分开的视图过渡——或者如果指定了 none 值，则不参与任何视图过渡。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies how whitespace is handled in an element.
ast.target: 指定元素中如何处理空白字符。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The white-space-collapse CSS property controls how white space inside an element is collapsed.
ast.target: white-space-collapse CSS 属性控制元素内空白字符的折叠方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The speak-as descriptor specifies how a counter symbol constructed with a given @counter-style will be represented in the spoken form. For example, an author can specify a counter symbol to be either spoken as its numerical value or just represented with an audio cue.
ast.target: speak-as 描述符指定使用给定 @counter-style 构造的计数器符号在口语形式中的表示方式。例如，作者可以指定计数器符号是按其数值发音，还是仅用音频提示表示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The base-palette CSS descriptor is used to specify the name or index of a pre-defined palette to be used for creating a new palette. If the specified base-palette does not exist, then the palette defined at index 0 will be used.
ast.target: base-palette CSS 描述符用于指定用于创建新调色板的预定义调色板的名称或索引。如果指定的 base-palette 不存在，则将使用索引 0 处定义的调色板。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The override-colors CSS descriptor is used to override colors in the chosen base-palette for a color font.
ast.target: override-colors CSS 描述符用于覆盖颜色字体中所选 base-palette 中的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the ascent metric of a font.
ast.target: 描述字体的上升度量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the descent metric of a font.
ast.target: 描述字体的下降度量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The font-display descriptor determines how a font face is displayed based on whether and when it is downloaded and ready to use.
ast.target: font-display 描述符用于根据字体是否以及何时下载并准备就绪来决定其显示方式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the line-gap metric of a font.
ast.target: 描述字体的行间距度量。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A multiplier for glyph outlines and metrics of a font.
ast.target: 字体字形轮廓和度量的乘数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The bleed CSS at-rule descriptor, used with the @page at-rule, specifies the extent of the page bleed area outside the page box. This property only has effect if crop marks are enabled using the marks property.
ast.target: bleed CSS at-rule 描述符，与 @page at-rule 一起使用，用于指定页面出血区域在页面框外的范围。此属性仅在通过 marks 属性启用裁剪标记时生效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The marks CSS at-rule descriptor, used with the @page at-rule, adds crop and/or cross marks to the presentation of the document. Crop marks indicate where the page should be cut. Cross marks are used to align sheets.
ast.target: marks CSS at-rule 描述符，与 @page at-rule 一起使用，用于在文档的呈现中添加裁剪标记和/或十字标记。裁剪标记指示页面应被裁剪的位置。十字标记用于对齐纸张。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the syntax of the custom property registration represented by the @property rule, controlling how the property’s value is parsed at computed value time.
ast.target: 指定由 @property 规则表示的自定义属性注册的语法，控制在计算值时如何解析该属性的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the inherit flag of the custom property registration represented by the @property rule, controlling whether or not the property inherits by default.
ast.target: 指定由 @property 规则表示的自定义属性注册的继承标志，控制该属性是否默认继承。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the initial value of the custom property registration represented by the @property rule, controlling the property’s initial value.
ast.target: 指定由 @property 规则表示的自定义属性注册的初始值，控制该属性的初始值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines character set of the document.
ast.target: 定义文档的字符集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines a custom counter style.
ast.target: 定义自定义计数器样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Allows for linking to fonts that are automatically activated when needed. This permits authors to work around the limitation of 'web-safe' fonts, allowing for consistent rendering independent of the fonts available in a given user's environment.
ast.target: 允许链接到在需要时自动激活的字体。这使作者能够绕过“网络安全”字体的限制，实现独立于特定用户环境中可用字体的一致渲染。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines named values for the indices used to select alternate glyphs for a given font family.
ast.target: 为用于为给定字体系列选择替代字形的索引定义命名值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Includes content of another file.
ast.target: 包含另一个文件的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines set of animation key frames.
ast.target: 定义一组动画关键帧。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Declare a cascade layer and the order of precedence in case of multiple cascade layers.
ast.target: 声明一个级联层以及在存在多个级联层时的优先顺序。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Defines a stylesheet for a particular media type.
ast.target: 为特定媒体类型定义样式表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Gecko-specific at-rule that restricts the style rules contained within it based on the URL of the document.
ast.target: Gecko 特有的 at-rule，根据文档的 URL 限制其中包含的样式规则。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the size, zoom factor, and orientation of the viewport.
ast.target: 指定视口的大小、缩放因子和方向。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Declares a prefix and associates it with a namespace name.
ast.target: 声明一个前缀并将其与命名空间名称关联。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Directive defines various page parameters.
ast.target: 指令定义各种页面参数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the aspect of custom properties and variables.
ast.target: 描述自定义属性和变量的方面。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A conditional group rule whose condition tests whether the user agent supports CSS property:value pairs.
ast.target: 一个条件组规则，其条件测试用户代理是否支持 CSS 属性:值对。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies while an element is being activated by the user. For example, between the times the user presses the mouse button and releases it.
ast.target: 当元素被用户激活时应用。例如，在用户按下鼠标按钮和释放它之间的时间段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that acts as the source anchor of a hyperlink. Applies to both visited and unvisited links.
ast.target: 表示充当超链接源锚点的元素。适用于已访问和未访问的链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Radio and checkbox elements can be toggled by the user. Some menu items are 'checked' when the user selects them. When such elements are toggled 'on' the :checked pseudo-class applies.
ast.target: 单选按钮和复选框元素可以由用户切换。一些菜单项在用户选择时会被“选中”。当此类元素被切换为“开启”时，:checked 伪类适用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Indicates whether or not a scrollbar corner is present.
ast.target: 非标准。指示是否存在滚动条角落。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Applies to buttons and track pieces. Indicates whether or not the button or track piece will decrement the view's position when used.
ast.target: 非标准。适用于按钮和轨道片段。指示按钮或轨道片段在使用时是否会减少视图的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies to the one or more UI elements that are the default among a set of similar elements. Typically applies to context menu items, buttons, and select lists/menus.
ast.target: 适用于一组相似元素中作为默认值的 UI 元素。通常适用于上下文菜单项、按钮和选择列表/菜单。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents user interface elements that are in a disabled state; such elements have a corresponding enabled state.
ast.target: 表示处于禁用状态的用户界面元素；此类元素具有对应的启用状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Applies to buttons and track pieces. Applies when both buttons are displayed together at the same end of the scrollbar.
ast.target: 非标准。适用于按钮和轨道片段。当两个按钮同时显示在滚动条的同一端时适用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that has no children at all.
ast.target: 表示没有任何子元素的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents user interface elements that are in an enabled state; such elements have a corresponding disabled state.
ast.target: 表示处于启用状态的用户界面元素；此类元素具有对应的禁用状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Applies to buttons and track pieces. Indicates whether the object is placed after the thumb.
ast.target: 非标准。适用于按钮和轨道片段。指示对象是否放置在滑块之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When printing double-sided documents, the page boxes on left and right pages may be different. This can be expressed through CSS pseudo-classes defined in the  page context.
ast.target: 当打印双面文档时，左右页面的页面框可能不同。这可以通过在页面上下文中定义的 CSS 伪类来表达。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as :nth-child(1). Represents an element that is the first child of some other element.
ast.target: 与 :nth-child(1) 相同。表示是某个其他元素的第一个子元素的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as :nth-of-type(1). Represents an element that is the first sibling of its type in the list of children of its parent element.
ast.target: 与 :nth-of-type(1) 相同。表示在其父元素的子元素列表中，是其类型中第一个兄弟元素的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies while an element has the focus (accepts keyboard or mouse events, or other forms of input).
ast.target: 当元素获得焦点（接受键盘或鼠标事件或其他形式的输入）时适用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Matches any element that has its fullscreen flag set.
ast.target: 匹配任何设置了全屏标志的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents any element that is defined to occur entirely after a :current element.
ast.target: 表示任何被定义为完全出现在 :current 元素之后的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Applies to any scrollbar pieces that have a horizontal orientation.
ast.target: 非标准。适用于具有水平方向的任何滚动条片段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When evaluated in the context of a shadow tree, matches the shadow tree's host element.
ast.target: 在影子树上下文中求值时，匹配影子树的宿主元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: When evaluated in the context of a shadow tree, it matches the shadow tree's host element if the host element, in its normal context, matches the selector argument.
ast.target: 在影子树上下文中求值时，如果宿主元素在其正常上下文中匹配选择器参数，则匹配影子树的宿主元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Tests whether there is an ancestor, outside the shadow tree, which matches a particular selector.
ast.target: 测试在影子树外部是否存在匹配特定选择器的祖先元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies while the user designates an element with a pointing device, but does not necessarily activate it. For example, a visual user agent could apply this pseudo-class when the cursor (mouse pointer) hovers over a box generated by the element.
ast.target: 当用户用指向设备指定一个元素但不一定激活它时适用。例如，当光标（鼠标指针）悬停在元素生成的框上时，视觉用户代理可以应用此伪类。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Applies to buttons and track pieces. Indicates whether or not the button or track piece will increment the view's position when used.
ast.target: 非标准。适用于按钮和轨道片段。指示按钮或轨道片段在使用时是否会增加视图的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies to UI elements whose value is in an indeterminate state.
ast.target: 适用于值处于不确定状态的 UI 元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used in conjunction with the min and max attributes, whether on a range input, a number field, or any other types that accept those attributes.
ast.target: 与 min 和 max 属性结合使用，无论是在范围输入、数字字段还是任何其他接受这些属性的类型上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An element is :valid or :invalid when it is, respectively, valid or invalid with respect to data validity semantics defined by a different specification.
ast.target: 当元素分别符合或不符合由不同规范定义的数据有效性语义时，该元素是 :valid 或 :invalid。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that is in language specified.
ast.target: 表示处于指定语言中的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as :nth-last-child(1). Represents an element that is the last child of some other element.
ast.target: 与 :nth-last-child(1) 相同。表示是某个其他元素的最后一个子元素的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Same as :nth-last-of-type(1). Represents an element that is the last sibling of its type in the list of children of its parent element.
ast.target: 与 :nth-last-of-type(1) 相同。表示在其父元素的子元素列表中，是其类型的最后一个兄弟元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies to links that have not yet been visited.
ast.target: 适用于尚未被访问过的链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Takes a selector list as its argument. It represents an element that is represented by its argument.
ast.target: 接受一个选择器列表作为其参数。它表示由其参数所表示的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that is represented by the selector list passed as its argument. Standardized as :matches().
ast.target: 表示由作为其参数传递的选择器列表所表示的元素。已标准化为 :matches()。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Matches elements representing broken images.
ast.target: 非标准。匹配表示损坏图像的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Matches elements when a drag-over event applies to it.
ast.target: 非标准。当拖放悬停事件应用于元素时进行匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Represents an element that is the first child node of some other element.
ast.target: 非标准。表示作为某个其他元素的第一个子节点的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Matches an element that has focus and focus ring drawing is enabled in the browser.
ast.target: 非标准。匹配具有焦点且浏览器中启用了焦点环绘制的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Matches any element that has its fullscreen flag set. Standardized as :fullscreen.
ast.target: 匹配任何设置了全屏标志的元素。已标准化为 :fullscreen。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Represents an element that is the last child node of some other element.
ast.target: 非标准。表示作为某个其他元素的最后一个子节点的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Matches elements, such as images, that haven't started loading yet.
ast.target: 非标准。匹配尚未开始加载的元素，例如图像。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The same as :empty, except that it additionally matches elements that only contain code points affected by whitespace processing. Standardized as :blank.
ast.target: 与 :empty 相同，但它还额外匹配仅包含受空白处理影响的码点的元素。已标准化为 :blank。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deprecated. Represents placeholder text in an input field. Use ::-moz-placeholder for Firefox 19+.
ast.target: 已弃用。表示输入字段中的占位符文本。对于 Firefox 19+，请使用 ::-moz-placeholder。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Represents any submit button when the contents of the associated form are not valid.
ast.target: 非标准。当关联表单的内容无效时，表示任何提交按钮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Matches elements representing images that have been blocked from loading.
ast.target: 非标准。匹配表示已被阻止加载的图像的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Represents any validated form element whose value isn't valid
ast.target: 非标准。表示任何值无效的已验证表单元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Represents any validated form element whose value is valid
ast.target: 非标准。表示任何值有效的已验证表单元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Matches elements representing images that have been disabled due to the user's preferences.
ast.target: 非标准。匹配因用户偏好而被禁用的图像元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Matches elements in an inactive window.
ast.target: 非标准。匹配非活动窗口中的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents placeholder text in an input field. Note: for Edge use the pseudo-element ::-ms-input-placeholder. Standardized as ::placeholder.
ast.target: 表示输入字段中的占位符文本。注意：对于 Edge，请使用伪元素 ::-ms-input-placeholder。已标准化为 ::placeholder。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Windows Store apps only. Applies one or more styles to an element when it has focus and the user presses the space bar.
ast.target: 仅限 Windows 应用商店应用。当元素获得焦点且用户按下空格键时，对其应用一个或多个样式。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that is in the language specified. Accepts a comma separated list of language tokens.
ast.target: 表示处于指定语言中的元素。接受以逗号分隔的语言标记列表。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Applies to track pieces. Applies when there is no button at that end of the track.
ast.target: 非标准。适用于轨道片段。当轨道那一端没有按钮时应用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The negation pseudo-class, :not(X), is a functional notation taking a simple selector (excluding the negation pseudo-class itself) as an argument. It represents an element that is not represented by its argument.
ast.target: 否定伪类 :not(X) 是一个函数表示法，接受一个简单选择器（不包括否定伪类本身）作为参数。它表示不由其参数表示的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that has an+b-1 siblings before it in the document tree, for any positive integer or zero value of n, and has a parent element.
ast.target: 表示在文档树中其前面有 an+b-1 个兄弟元素（对于任何正整数或零值 n），并且具有父元素的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that has an+b-1 siblings after it in the document tree, for any positive integer or zero value of n, and has a parent element.
ast.target: 表示在文档树中其后面有 an+b-1 个兄弟元素（对于任何正整数或零值 n），并且具有父元素的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that has an+b-1 siblings with the same expanded element name after it in the document tree, for any zero or positive integer value of n, and has a parent element.
ast.target: 表示在文档树中其后面有 an+b-1 个具有相同扩展元素名称的兄弟元素（对于任何零或正整数值 n），并且具有父元素的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that has an+b-1 siblings with the same expanded element name before it in the document tree, for any zero or positive integer value of n, and has a parent element.
ast.target: 表示在文档树中其前面有 an+b-1 个具有相同扩展元素名称的兄弟元素（对于任何零或正整数值 n），并且具有父元素的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that has a parent element and whose parent element has no other element children. Same as :first-child:last-child or :nth-child(1):nth-last-child(1), but with a lower specificity.
ast.target: 表示具有父元素且其父元素没有其他元素子元素的元素。与 :first-child:last-child 或 :nth-child(1):nth-last-child(1) 相同，但具有较低的特异性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Matches every element that is the only child of its type, of its parent. Same as :first-of-type:last-of-type or :nth-of-type(1):nth-last-of-type(1), but with a lower specificity.
ast.target: 匹配其父元素中唯一一个该类型子元素的每个元素。与 :first-of-type:last-of-type 或 :nth-of-type(1):nth-last-of-type(1) 相同，但具有较低的特异性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A form element is :required or :optional if a value for it is, respectively, required or optional before the form it belongs to is submitted. Elements that are not form elements are neither required nor optional.
ast.target: 如果表单元素在提交其所属表单之前需要或可选填写值，则该表单元素分别为 :required 或 :optional。非表单元素既不是必需的也不是可选的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents any element that is defined to occur entirely prior to a :current element.
ast.target: 表示任何被定义为完全发生在 :current 元素之前的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: An element whose contents are not user-alterable is :read-only. However, elements whose contents are user-alterable (such as text input fields) are considered to be in a :read-write state. In typical documents, most elements are :read-only.
ast.target: 内容不可由用户更改的元素是 :read-only。然而，内容可由用户更改的元素（如文本输入字段）被视为处于 :read-write 状态。在典型文档中，大多数元素是 :read-only。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents an element that is the root of the document. In HTML 4, this is always the HTML element.
ast.target: 表示文档的根元素。在 HTML 4 中，这始终是 HTML 元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents any element that is in the contextual reference element set.
ast.target: 表示任何在上下文引用元素集中的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Applies to buttons and track pieces. Applies when both buttons are displayed separately at either end of the scrollbar.
ast.target: 非标准。适用于按钮和轨道片段。当两个按钮分别显示在滚动条的两端时应用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Applies to buttons and track pieces. Indicates whether the object is placed before the thumb.
ast.target: 非标准。适用于按钮和轨道片段。指示对象是否放置在滑块之前。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Some URIs refer to a location within a resource. This kind of URI ends with a 'number sign' (#) followed by an anchor identifier (called the fragment identifier).
ast.target: 一些 URI 引用资源内的某个位置。这类 URI 以“数字符号”(#) 结尾，后跟一个锚标识符（称为片段标识符）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Applies to any scrollbar pieces that have a vertical orientation.
ast.target: 非标准。适用于具有垂直方向的任何滚动条片段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Applies once the link has been visited by the user.
ast.target: 适用于用户访问过的链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Non-standard. Applies to all scrollbar pieces. Indicates whether or not the window containing the scrollbar is currently active.
ast.target: 非标准。适用于所有滚动条片段。指示包含滚动条的窗口当前是否处于活动状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :current CSS pseudo-class selector is a time-dimensional pseudo-class that represents the element, or an ancestor of the element, that is currently being displayed
ast.target: :current CSS 伪类选择器是一个时间维度伪类，表示当前正在显示的元素或其祖先元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :blank CSS pseudo-class selects empty user input elements (eg. <input> or <textarea>).
ast.target: :blank CSS 伪类选择空的用户输入元素（例如 <input> 或 <textarea>）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :defined CSS pseudo-class represents any element that has been defined. This includes any standard element built in to the browser, and custom elements that have been successfully defined (i.e. with the CustomElementRegistry.define() method).
ast.target: :defined CSS 伪类表示任何已定义的元素。这包括浏览器内置的任何标准元素，以及已成功定义的自定义元素（即通过 CustomElementRegistry.define() 方法）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :dir() CSS pseudo-class matches elements based on the directionality of the text contained in them.
ast.target: :dir() CSS 伪类根据元素中包含的文本的方向性来匹配元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :focus-visible pseudo-class applies while an element matches the :focus pseudo-class and the UA determines via heuristics that the focus should be made evident on the element.
ast.target: :focus-visible 伪类在元素匹配 :focus 伪类且用户代理通过启发式方法确定应在该元素上明确显示焦点时应用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :focus-within pseudo-class applies to any element for which the :focus pseudo class applies as well as to an element whose descendant in the flat tree (including non-element nodes, such as text nodes) matches the conditions for matching :focus.
ast.target: :focus-within 伪类适用于任何 :focus 伪类适用的元素，以及其扁平树中的后代（包括非元素节点，如文本节点）匹配 :focus 匹配条件的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: :The :has() CSS pseudo-class represents an element if any of the selectors passed as parameters (relative to the :scope of the given element), match at least one element.
ast.target: :has() CSS 伪类表示如果作为参数传递的任何选择器（相对于给定元素的 :scope）至少匹配一个元素，则该元素匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :is() CSS pseudo-class function takes a selector list as its argument, and selects any element that can be selected by one of the selectors in that list. This is useful for writing large selectors in a more compact form.
ast.target: :is() CSS 伪类函数接受一个选择器列表作为其参数，并选择可以由该列表中的某个选择器选择的任何元素。这对于以更紧凑的形式编写大型选择器很有用。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :local-link CSS pseudo-class represents an link to the same document
ast.target: :local-link CSS 伪类表示指向同一文档的链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :paused CSS pseudo-class selector is a resource state pseudo-class that will match an audio, video, or similar resource that is capable of being “played” or “paused”, when that element is “paused”.
ast.target: :paused CSS 伪类选择器是一种资源状态伪类，当音频、视频或类似资源处于“暂停”状态时，它将匹配这些能够被“播放”或“暂停”的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :placeholder-shown CSS pseudo-class represents any <input> or <textarea> element that is currently displaying placeholder text.
ast.target: :placeholder-shown CSS 伪类表示当前正在显示占位符文本的任何 <input> 或 <textarea> 元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :playing CSS pseudo-class selector is a resource state pseudo-class that will match an audio, video, or similar resource that is capable of being “played” or “paused”, when that element is “playing”.
ast.target: :playing CSS 伪类选择器是一种资源状态伪类，当音频、视频或类似资源处于“播放”状态时，它将匹配这些能够被“播放”或“暂停”的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :target-within CSS pseudo-class represents an element that is a target element or contains an element that is a target. A target element is a unique element with an id matching the URL's fragment.
ast.target: :target-within CSS 伪类表示一个目标元素或包含目标元素的元素。目标元素是一个具有与 URL 片段匹配的 id 的唯一元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :user-invalid CSS pseudo-class represents any validated form element whose value isn't valid based on their validation constraints, after the user has interacted with it.
ast.target: :user-invalid CSS 伪类表示任何经过验证的表单元素，其值在用户交互后，根据其验证约束被判定为无效。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :user-valid CSS pseudo-class represents any validated form element whose value validates correctly based on its validation constraints. However, unlike :valid it only matches once the user has interacted with it.
ast.target: :user-valid CSS 伪类表示任何经过验证的表单元素，其值根据其验证约束被正确验证。然而，与 :valid 不同的是，它仅在用户交互后才匹配。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :where() CSS pseudo-class function takes a selector list as its argument, and selects any element that can be selected by one of the selectors in that list.
ast.target: :where() CSS 伪类函数接受一个选择器列表作为其参数，并选择该列表中任何一个选择器可以选择的任何元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :picture-in-picture CSS pseudo-class matches the element which is currently in picture-in-picture mode.
ast.target: :picture-in-picture CSS 伪类匹配当前处于画中画模式的元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents a styleable child pseudo-element immediately after the originating element's actual content.
ast.target: 表示一个可样式化的子伪元素，紧接在原始元素的实际内容之后。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used to create a backdrop that hides the underlying document for an element in a top layer (such as an element that is displayed fullscreen).
ast.target: 用于创建一个背景层，以隐藏顶层元素（例如全屏显示的元素）下方的文档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents a styleable child pseudo-element immediately before the originating element's actual content.
ast.target: 表示一个可样式化的子伪元素，紧接在原始元素的实际内容之前。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Deprecated. Matches the distribution list itself, on elements that have one. Use ::slotted for forward compatibility.
ast.target: 已弃用。匹配分发列表本身，适用于拥有该列表的元素。为向前兼容，请使用 ::slotted。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the first letter of an element, if it is not preceded by any other content (such as images or inline tables) on its line.
ast.target: 表示元素的第一个字母，前提是该字母所在行之前没有其他内容（例如图像或内联表格）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Describes the contents of the first formatted line of its originating element.
ast.target: 描述其原始元素第一个格式化行的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used to style the bullet of a list element. Similar to the standardized ::marker.
ast.target: 用于设置列表元素项目符号的样式。类似于标准化的 ::marker。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Used to style the numbers of a list element. Similar to the standardized ::marker.
ast.target: 用于设置列表元素编号的样式。类似于标准化的 ::marker。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents placeholder text in an input field
ast.target: 表示输入字段中的占位符文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the bar portion of a progress bar.
ast.target: 表示进度条的条状部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the portion of a document that has been highlighted by the user.
ast.target: 表示用户高亮显示的文档部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the browse button of an input type=file control.
ast.target: 表示 input type=file 控件的浏览按钮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the check of a checkbox or radio button input control.
ast.target: 表示复选框或单选按钮输入控件的勾选标记。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the clear button of a text input control
ast.target: 表示文本输入控件的清除按钮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the drop-down button of a select control.
ast.target: 表示选择控件的下拉按钮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the portion of the slider track from its smallest value up to the value currently selected by the thumb. In a left-to-right layout, this is the portion of the slider track to the left of the thumb.
ast.target: 表示滑块轨道中从最小值到当前由滑块选定值的部分。在从左到右的布局中，这是滑块轨道在滑块左侧的部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the portion of the slider track from the value currently selected by the thumb up to the slider's largest value. In a left-to-right layout, this is the portion of the slider track to the right of the thumb.
ast.target: 表示滑块轨道中从当前由滑块选定值到滑块最大值的部分。在从左到右的布局中，这是滑块轨道在滑块右侧的部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the password reveal button of an input type=password control.
ast.target: 表示 input type=password 控件的密码显示按钮。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the portion of range input control (also known as a slider control) that the user drags.
ast.target: 表示范围输入控件（也称为滑块控件）中用户拖动的部分。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the tick marks of a slider that begin just after the thumb and continue up to the slider's largest value. In a left-to-right layout, these are the ticks to the right of the thumb.
ast.target: 表示滑块的刻度线，这些刻度线从滑块之后开始，一直延伸到滑块的最大值。在从左到右的布局中，这些是滑块右侧的刻度线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the tick marks of a slider that represent its smallest values up to the value currently selected by the thumb. In a left-to-right layout, these are the ticks to the left of the thumb.
ast.target: 表示滑块的刻度线，这些刻度线代表其最小值到当前由滑块选定的值。在从左到右的布局中，这些是滑块左侧的刻度线。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the tooltip of a slider (input type=range).
ast.target: 表示滑块（input type=range）的工具提示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the track of a slider.
ast.target: 表示滑块的轨道。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Represents the content of a text or password input control, or a select control.
ast.target: 表示文本或密码输入控件，或选择控件的内容。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Matches the shadow root if an element has a shadow tree.
ast.target: 如果元素具有影子树，则匹配其影子根。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::target-text CSS pseudo-element represents the text that has been scrolled to if the browser supports scroll-to-text fragments. It allows authors to choose how to highlight that section of text.
ast.target: ::target-text CSS 伪元素表示浏览器支持滚动到文本片段时已滚动到的文本。它允许作者选择如何高亮显示该部分文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::-moz-range-progress CSS pseudo-element is a Mozilla extension that represents the lower portion of the track (i.e., groove) in which the indicator slides in an <input> of type="range". This portion corresponds to values lower than the value currently selected by the thumb (i.e., virtual knob).
ast.target: ::-moz-range-progress CSS 伪元素是 Mozilla 扩展，表示 <input type=\"range\"> 中指示器滑动的轨道（即凹槽）的下部。这部分对应于当前由滑块（即虚拟旋钮）选定的值更低的值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::-moz-range-thumb CSS pseudo-element is a Mozilla extension that represents the thumb (i.e., virtual knob) of an <input> of type="range". The user can move the thumb along the input's track to alter its numerical value.
ast.target: ::-moz-range-thumb CSS 伪元素是 Mozilla 扩展，表示 <input type=\"range\"> 的滑块（即虚拟旋钮）。用户可以沿着输入控件的轨道移动滑块以更改其数值。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::-moz-range-track CSS pseudo-element is a Mozilla extension that represents the track (i.e., groove) in which the indicator slides in an <input> of type="range".
ast.target: ::-moz-range-track CSS 伪元素是 Mozilla 扩展，表示 <input type=\"range\"> 中指示器滑动的轨道（即凹槽）。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::grammar-error CSS pseudo-element represents a text segment which the user agent has flagged as grammatically incorrect.
ast.target: ::grammar-error CSS 伪元素表示用户代理标记为语法错误的文本段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::marker CSS pseudo-element selects the marker box of a list item, which typically contains a bullet or number. It works on any element or pseudo-element set to display: list-item, such as the <li> and <summary> elements.
ast.target: ::marker CSS 伪元素选择列表项的标记框，该框通常包含项目符号或编号。它适用于任何设置为 display: list-item 的元素或伪元素，例如 <li> 和 <summary> 元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::part CSS pseudo-element represents any element within a shadow tree that has a matching part attribute.
ast.target: ::part CSS 伪元素表示影子树中具有匹配 part 属性的任何元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::placeholder CSS pseudo-element represents the placeholder text of a form element.
ast.target: ::placeholder CSS 伪元素表示表单元素的占位符文本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The :slotted() CSS pseudo-element represents any element that has been placed into a slot inside an HTML template.
ast.target: :slotted() CSS 伪元素表示已放置在 HTML 模板插槽内的任何元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::spelling-error CSS pseudo-element represents a text segment which the user agent has flagged as incorrectly spelled.
ast.target: ::spelling-error CSS 伪元素表示用户代理标记为拼写错误的文本段。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::view-transition CSS pseudo-element represents the root of the view transitions overlay, which contains all view transitions and sits over the top of all other page content.
ast.target: ::view-transition CSS 伪元素表示视图过渡叠加层的根，该叠加层包含所有视图过渡并位于所有其他页面内容之上。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::view-transition-group CSS pseudo-element represents a single view transition group.
ast.target: ::view-transition-group CSS 伪元素表示单个视图过渡组。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::view-transition-image-pair CSS pseudo-element represents a container for a view transition's "old" and "new" view states \u2014 before and after the transition.
ast.target: ::view-transition-image-pair CSS 伪元素表示视图过渡的“旧”和“新”视图状态的容器——即过渡前后的状态。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::view-transition-new CSS pseudo-element represents the "new" view state of a view transition — a live representation of the new view, after the transition.
ast.target: ::view-transition-new CSS 伪元素表示视图过渡的“新”视图状态——即过渡后新视图的实时表示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The ::view-transition-old CSS pseudo-element represents the "old" view state of a view transition — a static screenshot of the old view, before the transition.
ast.target: ::view-transition-old CSS 伪元素表示视图过渡的“旧”视图状态——即过渡前旧视图的静态截图。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies the XML Namespace of the document. Default value is `"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml"`. This is required in documents parsed with XML parsers, and optional in text/html documents.
ast.target: 指定文档的 XML 命名空间。默认值是 `\"http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml\"`。这在使用 XML 解析器解析的文档中是必需的，在 text/html 文档中是可选的。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URIs of one or more metadata profiles, separated by white space.
ast.target: 一个或多个元数据配置文件的 URI，以空格分隔。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates the relative importance of the resource. Priority hints are delegated using the values:
ast.target: 指示资源的相对重要性。优先级提示通过以下值进行委托：

ast.name: description
ast.source: This attribute specifies [alternative style sheet](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Alternative_style_sheets) sets.
ast.target: 此属性指定[替代样式表](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/Alternative_style_sheets)集。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Background color for the document. _This method is non-conforming, use CSS [`background-color`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/background-color "The background-color CSS property sets the background color of an element.") property on the element instead._
ast.target: 文档的背景颜色。_此方法不符合规范，请改用元素上的 CSS [`background-color`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/background-color \"background-color CSS 属性设置元素的背景颜色。\") 属性。_

ast.name: description
ast.source: Function to call when the document loses focus.
ast.target: 当文档失去焦点时调用的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Function to call when the document fails to load properly.
ast.target: 当文档加载失败时调用的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Function to call when the document receives focus.
ast.target: 当文档获得焦点时调用的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Function to call when the document has finished loading.
ast.target: 当文档加载完成时调用的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Function to call when the user has moved forward in undo transaction history.
ast.target: 当用户在撤销事务历史中向前移动时调用的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Function to call when the document has been resized.
ast.target: 当文档被调整大小时调用的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Function to call when the user has moved backward in undo transaction history.
ast.target: 当用户在撤销事务历史中向后移动时调用的函数。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Foreground color of text. _This method is non-conforming, use CSS [`color`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/color "The color CSS property sets the foreground color value of an element's text and text decorations, and sets the currentcolor value.") property on the element instead._
ast.target: 文本的前景颜色。_此方法不符合规范，请改用元素上的 CSS [`color`](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/CSS/color \"color CSS 属性设置元素文本和文本装饰的前景颜色值，并设置 currentcolor 值。\") 属性。_

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the alignment of the rule on the page. If no value is specified, the default value is `left`.
ast.target: 设置规则在页面上的对齐方式。如果未指定值，则默认值为 `left`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the color of the rule through color name or hexadecimal value.
ast.target: 通过颜色名称或十六进制值设置规则的颜色。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the rule to have no shading.
ast.target: 设置规则无阴影。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the height, in pixels, of the rule.
ast.target: 设置规则的高度，以像素为单位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Sets the length of the rule on the page through a pixel or percentage value.
ast.target: 通过像素或百分比值设置规则在页面上的长度。

ast.name: description
ast.source: If the value of this attribute is set to `yes`, the definition text will not wrap. The default value is `no`.
ast.target: 如果此属性的值设置为 `yes`，则定义文本将不换行。默认值为 `no`。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
The direction in which text should be rendered in this element's contents. Possible values are:

*   `ltr`: Indicates that the text should go in a left-to-right direction.
*   `rtl`: Indicates that the text should go in a right-to-left direction.
ast.target:
应在此元素内容中渲染文本的方向。可能的值为：

*   `ltr`：表示文本应从左到右方向显示。
*   `rtl`：表示文本应从右到左方向显示。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates where to begin the next line after the break.
ast.target: 指示在换行后从何处开始下一行。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This attribute defines the URI of a resource that explains the change, such as a link to meeting minutes or a ticket in a troubleshooting system.
ast.target: 此属性定义了解释更改的资源的 URI，例如指向会议纪要或故障排除系统中工单的链接。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
`auto`: Indicates **no preference**. The browser may use its own heuristics to decide the priority of the image.

`high`: Indicates to the browser that the image is of **high** priority.

`low`: Indicates to the browser that the image is of **low** priority.
ast.target:
`auto`：表示**无偏好**。浏览器可以使用其自身的启发式方法来决定图像的优先级。

`high`：向浏览器表示该图像具有**高**优先级。

`low`：向浏览器表示该图像具有**低**优先级。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Specifies a [feature policy](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Feature_Policy) for the `<iframe>`.
ast.target: 为 `<iframe>` 指定[功能策略](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/HTTP/Feature_Policy)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Set to `true` if a cross-origin `<iframe>` should be allowed to invoke the [Payment Request API](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Payment_Request_API).
ast.target: 如果设置为 `true`，则应允许跨源 `<iframe>` 调用[支付请求 API](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/API/Payment_Request_API)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This attribute is considered a legacy attribute and redefined as `allow="payment"`.
ast.target: 此属性被视为遗留属性，并被重新定义为 `allow=\"payment\"`。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A space-separated list of URIs for archives of resources for the object.
ast.target: 一个以空格分隔的 URI 列表，用于对象的资源存档。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The width of a border around the control, in pixels.
ast.target: 控件周围边框的宽度，以像素为单位。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The URI of the object's implementation. It can be used together with, or in place of, the **data** attribute.
ast.target: 对象实现的 URI。它可以与 **data** 属性一起使用，或替代 **data** 属性。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The base path used to resolve relative URIs specified by **classid**, **data**, or **archive**. If not specified, the default is the base URI of the current document.
ast.target: 用于解析由 **classid**、**data** 或 **archive** 指定的相对 URI 的基本路径。如果未指定，则默认为当前文档的基本 URI。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The content type of the data specified by **classid**.
ast.target: 由 **classid** 指定的数据的内容类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The presence of this Boolean attribute makes this element a declaration only. The object must be instantiated by a subsequent `<object>` element. In HTML5, repeat the <object> element completely each that that the resource is reused.
ast.target: 此布尔属性的存在使此元素仅作为声明。该对象必须由后续的 `<object>` 元素实例化。在 HTML5 中，每次重用资源时都应完整重复 `<object>` 元素。

ast.name: description
ast.source: A message that the browser can show while loading the object's implementation and data.
ast.target: 浏览器在加载对象的实现和数据时可以显示的消息。

ast.name: description
ast.source: The position of the element in the tabbing navigation order for the current document.
ast.target: 元素在当前文档的制表符导航顺序中的位置。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Only used if the `valuetype` is set to "ref". Specifies the MIME type of values found at the URI specified by value.
ast.target: 仅在 `valuetype` 设置为 \"ref\" 时使用。指定在 value 指定的 URI 处找到的值的 MIME 类型。

ast.name: description
ast.source:
This attribute contains a list of space-separated strings. Each string is the `id` of a group of cells that this header applies to.

**Note:** Do not use this attribute as it is obsolete in the latest standard.
ast.target: 此属性包含一个以空格分隔的字符串列表。每个字符串是此标题所适用的一组单元格的 `id`。\n\n**注意：** 请勿使用此属性，因为它在最新标准中已过时。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Indicates that the dialog is active and available for interaction. When the `open` attribute is not set, the dialog shouldn't be shown to the user.
ast.target: 指示对话框处于活动状态且可供交互。当未设置 `open` 属性时，不应向用户显示对话框。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This attribute contains inline metadata that a user agent can use to verify that a fetched resource has been delivered free of unexpected manipulation. See [Subresource Integrity](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Security/Subresource_Integrity).
ast.target: 此属性包含内联元数据，用户代理可用于验证获取的资源在传递过程中未被意外篡改。参见[子资源完整性](https://developer.mozilla.org/en-US/docs/Web/Security/Subresource_Integrity)。

ast.name: description
ast.source: This Boolean attribute is set to indicate that the script should not be executed in browsers that support [ES2015 modules](https://hacks.mozilla.org/2015/08/es6-in-depth-modules/) — in effect, this can be used to serve fallback scripts to older browsers that do not support modular JavaScript code.
ast.target: 此布尔属性用于指示在支持 [ES2015 模块](https://hacks.mozilla.org/2015/08/es6-in-depth-modules/)的浏览器中不应执行该脚本——实际上，这可用于向不支持模块化 JavaScript 代码的旧版浏览器提供回退脚本。

ast.name: description
ast.source: Like the `textContent` attribute, this attribute sets the text content of the element. Unlike the `textContent` attribute, however, this attribute is evaluated as executable code after the node is inserted into the DOM.
ast.target: 与 `textContent` 属性类似，此属性设置元素的文本内容。但与 `textContent` 属性不同的是，此属性在节点插入 DOM 后会被作为可执行代码进行求值。
